vocabulary.contextTranslation: 韧性是指从生活中的困难时期恢复过来的能力

vocabulary.definition: n. 大灾难, 大祸；[化] 突变
vocabulary.context: They don't see every bump in the road as a catastrophe; they understand that things can't be perfect and they have realistic expectations of themselves and what they can achieve.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们并不认为道路上的每一次坎坷都是一场灾难；他们明白事情不可能完美，他们对自己和自己能够实现的目标抱有现实的期望

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 加强, 变坚固；v.i. 变强, 股票上涨
vocabulary.context: Because if you are resilient, you will be able to face, overcome and even be strengthened by the challenges and problems in your life.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 因为如果你有韧性，你就能够面对、克服生活中的挑战和问题，甚至变得更加坚强

vocabulary.definition: adj. 放射学的
vocabulary.context: If a child who plays football is subjected to advanced radiological and neurocognitive studies during the season and several months after the season, there can be evidence of brain damage at the cellular level of brain functioning, even if there were no documented concussions or reported symptoms.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果一个踢足球的孩子在赛季期间和赛季结束后几个月接受先进的放射学和神经认知研究，即使没有记录的脑震荡或报告的症状，也可能在大脑功能的细胞水平上存在脑损伤的证据

vocabulary.definition: adj. 小儿科的；[医] 儿科的
vocabulary.context: ...governing professional pediatrics associations in the United States and Canada, the American Academy of Pediatrics and the Canadian Pediatric Society, published a position paper recommending that children should no longer be allowed to engage in high-impact contact sports, exemplified by boxing, and willfully damage their developing brains.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...美国和加拿大的专业儿科协会、美国儿科学会和加拿大儿科协会发表了一份立场文件，建议不应再允许儿童从事以拳击为代表的高强度接触运动，并故意损害他们正在发育的大脑

vocabulary.definition: adj. （锻炼）高强度的; （材料）高强度的，承载重压的
vocabulary.context: Over the past two decades it has become clear that repetitive blows to the head in high-impact contact sports like football, ice hockey, mixed martial arts and boxing place athletes at risk of permanent brain damage.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在过去的二十年里，人们已经清楚地认识到，在足球、冰球、综合武术和拳击等高冲击力的接触运动中，头部的重复打击会使运动员面临永久性脑损伤的风险

vocabulary.definition: n. 石棉；[化] 石棉
vocabulary.context: We've known since the mid-70s that asbestos causes cancer and other serious diseases.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 自 70 年代中期以来，我们就知道石棉会导致癌症和其他严重疾病

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不可逆的, 不可改变的, 不能倒置的, 不能翻转的, 不能倒转的, 不可撤销的；[计] 不可逆的
vocabulary.context: If that child continues to play over many seasons, these cellular injuries accumulate to cause irreversible brain damage, which we know now by the name Chronic Traumatic Encephalopathy, or C.T.E., a disease that I first diagnosed in 2002.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果孩子继续打球很多个赛季，这些细胞损伤就会累积，导致不可逆的脑损伤，我们现在称之为慢性创伤性脑病，或 C.T.E.，这是我在 2002 年首次诊断出的一种疾病

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 改编成戏剧, 编写剧本；v.i. 戏剧化
vocabulary.context: There is even a Hollywood movie, "Concussion," due out this Christmas Day, that dramatizes the story of my discoveries in this area of research.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 甚至还有一部好莱坞电影《脑震荡》将于今年圣诞节上映，该电影戏剧化地讲述了我在这一研究领域的发现故事

vocabulary.definition: n. 神经原, 轴索, 神经细胞；[计] 神经元
vocabulary.context: In more than 30 years of looking at normal brain cells in the microscope, I have yet to see a neuron that naturally creates a new neuron to regenerate itself.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在 30 多年的显微镜下观察正常脑细胞的过程中，我还没有看到一个神经元能够自然地产生新的神经元来自我再生

vocabulary.definition: adv. 智力上；知性上；理智地
vocabulary.context: As we become more intellectually sophisticated and advanced, with greater and broader access to information and knowledge, we have given up old practices in the name of safety and progress.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 随着我们在智力上变得更加成熟和先进，获得信息和知识的机会越来越多，我们以安全和进步的名义放弃了旧的做法

vocabulary.definition: n. 脱碳
vocabulary.context: This is not just about decarbonization.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这不仅仅是脱碳问题

vocabulary.definition: n. 沼泽地
vocabulary.context: There is a play by one of my favorite writers, Nobel laureate Wole Soyinka, I would like to tell you about, "The Swamp Dwellers." "The Swamp Dwellers" is about a blind beggar who attempts to buy a piece of swampland because he believes that the swamps will provide him with a better livelihood.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我最喜欢的作家之一、诺贝尔奖获得者沃勒·索因卡（Wole Soyinka）有一部戏剧，我想向您介绍一下《沼泽居民》。 《沼泽居民》讲述了一个盲人乞丐试图购买一块沼泽地的故事，因为他相信沼泽会给他带来更好的生计

vocabulary.definition: n. [地]泥炭地
vocabulary.context: A peatland development fund could help us today to address the stubborn and seemingly persistent developmental challenges that the continent faces today.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 泥炭地发展基金可以帮助我们解决非洲大陆今天面临的顽固且看似持续的发展挑战

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 分配, 分摊, 分派；[法] 分派, 分摊, 分配
vocabulary.context: But we must also, in this fight against climate change, ensure that responsibility and accountability are adequately apportioned.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但在应对气候变化的斗争中，我们还必须确保责任和问责得到充分分配

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使隐退, 使隔绝, 扣押, 没收；[化] 螯合剂; 多价螯合剂
vocabulary.context: With 30 billion tons of carbon sequestered in the peatlands, we're talking at 1.5 trillion.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 泥炭地封存了 300 亿吨碳，我们所说的是 1.5 万亿吨

vocabulary.definition: v. 降临(于)
vocabulary.context: It will be devastating if the same fate were to befall the peatlands of the Congo Basin.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果同样的命运降临到刚果盆地的泥炭地，那将是毁灭性的

vocabulary.definition: n. 透明, 透明度, 透过性, 透明物, 清晰；[计] 透明性; 透明
vocabulary.context: It is about justice, and it is about transparency.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这关系到正义，也关系到透明度

vocabulary.definition: n. 负有责任, 可说明性；[化] 衡算计量
vocabulary.context: But we must also, in this fight against climate change, ensure that responsibility and accountability are adequately apportioned.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但在应对气候变化的斗争中，我们还必须确保责任和问责得到充分分配

vocabulary.definition: n. 资产, 有益的东西
vocabulary.context: The peatlands are an economic asset, which, if valued appropriately, could provide the stepping stone for these communities to improve their livelihoods.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 泥炭地是一种经济资产，如果对其估价适当，可以为这些社区改善生计提供垫脚石

vocabulary.definition: adj. 荷尔蒙的；[医] 激素的
vocabulary.context: It is actually a neurological sensitivity, initiated by hormonal changes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它实际上是一种由荷尔蒙变化引发的神经敏感性

vocabulary.definition: n. 细节, 琐事
vocabulary.context: If humans are generally geared to recall details about one another, this pattern is probably even more powerful among teenagers who are hyperattentive to social minutiae: who is in, who is out, who likes whom, who is mad at whom.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果人类通常倾向于回忆彼此的细节，那么这种模式在过度关注社会细节的青少年中可能更为强大：谁在，谁在外，谁喜欢谁，谁对谁生气

vocabulary.definition: adj. 探究, 探查, 探察(伤处), 探险, 探测, 勘探, 考察, 钻研, 探索；[医] 探察的
vocabulary.context: The results: Teens who played the Iowa Gambling Task under the eyes of fellow adolescents engaged in more exploratory behavior, learned faster from both positive and negative outcomes, and achieved better performance on the task than those who played in solitude.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 结果：在其他青少年的注视下玩爱荷华州赌博任务的青少年会进行更多的探索行为，从积极和消极的结果中学习得更快，并且比那些独自玩的人在任务中取得更好的表现

vocabulary.definition: n. 谨慎, 注意, 小心
vocabulary.context: Such wariness is well founded: statistics show, for example, that a teenage driver with a same-age passenger in the car is at higher risk of a fatal crash than an adolescent driving alone or with an adult.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这种谨慎是有根据的：例如，统计数据显示，车内有同龄乘客的青少年司机比独自驾驶或与成年人一起驾驶的青少年面临更高的致命事故风险

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不愿意的, 反对的
vocabulary.context: Yet, she noted, many young people are especially risk averse at school-afraid that one low test score or mediocre grade could cost them a spot at a selective university.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，她指出，许多年轻人在学校特别厌恶风险，担心考试成绩低或成绩平庸可能会让他们失去进入名牌大学的机会

vocabulary.definition: n. 认识, 认识力, 认识的结果；[医] 认识, 识别
vocabulary.context: Research shows that when we absorb information in order to teach it to someone else, we learn it more accurately and deeply, perhaps in part because we are engaging our social cognition.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 研究表明，当我们吸收信息以便将其教授给其他人时，我们会更准确、更深入地学习它，部分原因可能是我们正在调动我们的社会认知

vocabulary.definition: n. 爱好, 嗜好
vocabulary.context: Their penchant for social drama is not-or not only-a way of distracting themselves from their schoolwork or of driving adults crazy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们对社交戏剧的偏爱不是--或者不仅仅是--一种分散学业注意力或让成年人抓狂的方式

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 赋予实质, 使体现, 物质化；v.i. 成有形, 体现, 实现
vocabulary.context: Subjects played a computerized driving game in which the player must avoid crashing into a wall that materializes, without warning, on the roadway.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 受试者玩了一个计算机化的驾驶游戏，其中玩家必须避免撞到在没有警告的情况下出现在道路上的墙壁

vocabulary.definition: adj. 英国军人
vocabulary.context: The untrained, civilian American soldiers faced trained, regimented, and disciplined British soldiers, or "redcoats." France sent troops to help the Americans fight for their independence.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 未经训练的美国平民士兵面对的是训练有素、有组织、有纪律的英国士兵，或"红衣士兵"。法国派遣军队帮助美国争取独立

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不出所料的；不出奇的；意料中的
vocabulary.context: Unsurprisingly, all the colonists hated having to pay extra money for basic materials.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不出所料，所有殖民者都讨厌为基本材料支付额外费用

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 压制, 平息, 减轻
vocabulary.context: To quell any possible rebellion, Britain sent troops to Massachusetts.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为了平息任何可能的叛乱，英国向马萨诸塞州派遣军队

vocabulary.definition: n. 储蓄, 积蓄, 库存；v.t. 储蓄, 贮存
vocabulary.context: The troops found out about a group of rebellious colonists who had stockpiled some weapons in a small town outside of Boston called Lexington, so they went to go steal the weapons.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 部队发现一群叛逆的殖民者在波士顿郊外一个叫列克星敦的小镇囤积了一些武器，于是他们前去偷窃武器

vocabulary.definition: n. 前哨战, 小争论, 小冲突；v.i. 发生小争论, 侦察
vocabulary.context: At this small skirmish, eight minutemen died but only one British soldier was hurt.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在这场小规模冲突中，八名民兵死亡，但只有一名英国士兵受伤

vocabulary.definition: adj. 造反的, 反抗的；[法] 造反的, 反抗的, 反判的
vocabulary.context: The troops found out about a group of rebellious colonists who had stockpiled some weapons in a small town outside of Boston called Lexington, so they went to go steal the weapons.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 部队发现一群叛逆的殖民者在波士顿郊外一个叫列克星敦的小镇囤积了一些武器，于是他们前去偷窃武器

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 开拓殖民地；v.t. 殖民于, 移植于
vocabulary.context: Different groups of people came to colonize North America for different reasons.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不同的人群出于不同的原因来到北美殖民

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 宽容, 容许, 有耐力
vocabulary.context: Other individual settlers came to the new colonies because they held certain religious beliefs that European governments would not tolerate, and they wanted to live under rulers who shared their beliefs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 其他个人定居者来到新殖民地是因为他们持有欧洲政府不会容忍的某些宗教信仰，并且他们希望生活在与他们有共同信仰的统治者的统治下

vocabulary.definition: adv. 空虚地, 心不在焉地, 无表情地
vocabulary.context: Wrapped in their torn blankets, they would sit or lie on the ground, staring vacantly into space, unaware of who or where they were - strangers to their surroundings.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们裹着破烂的毯子，或坐或躺在地上，茫然地凝视着太空，不知道自己是谁或在哪里--对周围的环境来说是陌生人

vocabulary.definition: n. 大屠杀( bloodbath的复数形式 )
vocabulary.context: ...two World Wars, countless civil wars, the senseless chain of assassinations (Gandhi, the Kennedys, Martin Luther King, Sadat, Rabin), bloodbaths in Cambodia and Algeria, India and Pakistan, Ireland and Rwanda, Eritrea and Ethiopia, Sarajevo and Kosovo; the inhumanity in the Gulag and the tragedy of Hiroshima.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...两次世界大战，无数的内战，毫无意义的一系列暗杀（甘地、肯尼迪家族、马丁·路德·金、萨达特、拉宾），柬埔寨和阿尔及利亚、印度和巴基斯坦、爱尔兰和卢旺达、厄立特里亚和埃塞俄比亚、萨拉热窝和科索沃的大屠杀；古拉格集中营的不人道行为和广岛的悲剧

vocabulary.definition: n. 犹太人区；贫民区；v.t. 使集中居住
vocabulary.context: During the darkest of times, inside the ghettoes and death camps - and I'm glad that Mrs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在最黑暗的时期，在贫民窟和死亡集中营内 - 我很高兴夫人

vocabulary.definition: n. 优点, 阁下
vocabulary.context: Clinton, members of Congress, Ambassador Holbrooke, Excellencies, friends:
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 克林顿，国会议员，霍尔布鲁克大使，各位阁下，朋友们：

vocabulary.definition: adj. 形而上学的, 纯粹哲学的, 抽象的
vocabulary.context: Surely it will be judged, and judged severely, in both moral and metaphysical terms.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它肯定会受到道德和形而上学方面的评判，而且是严厉的评判

vocabulary.definition: adj. 英勇的；n. 勇敢的人
vocabulary.context: He mobilized the American people and the world, going into battle, bringing hundreds and thousands of valiant and brave soldiers in America to fight fascism, to fight dictatorship, to fight Hitler.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他动员美国人民和全世界，投入战斗，带领美国成千上万英勇的士兵去对抗法西斯、对抗独裁、对抗希特勒。 【08】他挑东西一定很挑剔

vocabulary.definition: n. 集体迫害, 大屠杀；v.t. 集体迫害, 大屠杀
vocabulary.context: And that happened after the Kristallnacht, after the first state sponsored pogrom, with hundreds of Jewish shops destroyed, synagogues burned, thousands of people put in concentration camps.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这发生在水晶之夜之后，在第一次国家支持的大屠杀之后，数百家犹太商店被毁，犹太教堂被烧毁，数千人被关进集中营

vocabulary.definition: n. 抽象化, 心不在焉, 空想, 提炼, 抽象派作品；[化] 提取; 抽取; 夺取; 夺取反应; 除去
vocabulary.context: Indifference reduces the Other to an abstraction.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 冷漠将他者降低为抽象

vocabulary.definition: adj. 麻烦的, 令人讨厌的
vocabulary.context: It is, after all, awkward, troublesome, to be involved in another person's pain and despair.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 毕竟，参与另一个人的痛苦和绝望是很尴尬、很麻烦的

vocabulary.definition: n. 箭鱼
vocabulary.context: Mahes, who is serving 90 days for stealing a swordfish steak from a midtown Manhattan restaurant.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Mahes，因从曼哈顿市中心一家餐厅偷窃剑鱼牛排而被判入狱 90 天

vocabulary.definition: n. 开胃酒
vocabulary.context: He strolls to a nice restaurant, sips a fine aperitif, savors a $50 meal and finishes with hot black coffee.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他漫步到一家不错的餐厅，喝了一杯精致的开胃酒，品尝了 50 美元的餐点，最后喝了热黑咖啡

vocabulary.definition: n. 羽衣甘蓝
vocabulary.context: He wandered to Florida and Virginia to pick collards and peaches in migrant camps where conditions were barely human.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他漫步到佛罗里达州和弗吉尼亚州，在移民营地采摘羽衣甘蓝和桃子，那里的条件几乎不适合人类

vocabulary.definition: n. 商业区与住宅区之间的地区
vocabulary.context: Mahes, who is serving 90 days for stealing a swordfish steak from a midtown Manhattan restaurant.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Mahes，因从曼哈顿市中心一家餐厅偷窃剑鱼牛排而被判入狱 90 天

vocabulary.definition: n. 大麻麻醉剂；[化] (印度)大麻; (印度)大麻浸膏
vocabulary.context: He would have stayed, but five years and one drug addiction later - to hashish - he was on the street.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他本想留下来，但五年后，吸毒成瘾--吸毒--他流落街头

vocabulary.definition: v. 意味, 带有…的性质( savor的第三人称单数 ); 给…加调味品; 使有风味; 品尝
vocabulary.context: He strolls to a nice restaurant, sips a fine aperitif, savors a $50 meal and finishes with hot black coffee.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他漫步到一家不错的餐厅，喝了一杯精致的开胃酒，品尝了 50 美元的餐点，最后喝了热黑咖啡

vocabulary.definition: n. 礼节, 拘谨, 正式手续；[化] 克式浓度
vocabulary.context: Court has become purely a formality for him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 上法庭对他来说纯粹是一种形式

vocabulary.definition: n. 入场许可, 主菜
vocabulary.context: In the past two years, he has seldom been free more than a few days before enjoying an illegal entree.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在过去的两年里，他很少有超过几天的空闲时间才能享用非法主菜

vocabulary.definition: n. 行为不检, 品行不良, 轻罪, 不端行为
vocabulary.context: He had done time for a string of misdemeanors.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他因一系列轻罪而被判刑

vocabulary.definition: n. 酒窖, 酒店
vocabulary.context: He does not want to hurt people or rob a bodega or hold up a taxi driver.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他不想伤害别人、抢劫杂货店或拦住出租车司机

vocabulary.definition: adj. 内省的；[医] 内省的
vocabulary.context: Frank Sinatra (remember him?) said it best in his introspective song "It Was A Very Good Year" that traces life from teens to twenties to thirties and beyond: "But now the days grow short, I'm in the autumn of the year.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 弗兰克·辛纳屈（还记得他吗？） 在他的自省歌曲《那是非常美好的一年》中说得最好，歌曲追溯了从十几岁到二十岁到三十岁乃至更久远的生活："但现在日子越来越短，我正处于一年的秋天

vocabulary.definition: n. 类似物, 相似情况；[医] 类似物, 同型物, 相似器官, 同功异质体
vocabulary.context: The analogue world has been replaced by the digital age.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 模拟世界已被数字时代取代

vocabulary.definition: v. 贪求, 觊觎( covet的现在分词 )
vocabulary.context: As Hannibal Lecter told Clarice in Silence of the Lambs , "We begin by coveting what we see every day."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 正如汉尼拔·莱克特在《沉默的羔羊》中告诉克拉丽丝的那样，"我们从贪图每天所看到的东西开始。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 三十( thirty的名词复数 ); 三十个; 三十年代; <网>一局中一方获得的第二分
vocabulary.context: Frank Sinatra (remember him?) said it best in his introspective song "It Was A Very Good Year" that traces life from teens to twenties to thirties and beyond: "But now the days grow short, I'm in the autumn of the year.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 弗兰克·辛纳屈（还记得他吗？） 在他的自省歌曲《那是非常美好的一年》中说得最好，歌曲追溯了从十几岁到二十岁到三十岁乃至更久远的生活："但现在日子越来越短，我正处于一年的秋天

vocabulary.definition: adj. 辛苦得到的
vocabulary.context: It suggests that a quick ten-minute read or video is equivalent to wisdom gained from years of hard-earned experience.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这表明，快速的十分钟阅读或视频相当于从多年来之不易的经验中获得的智慧

vocabulary.definition: n. 少量；渣滓；沉淀物（dreg的复数）
vocabulary.context: And now I think of my life as vintage wine, from fine old kegs, from the brim to the dregs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 现在我认为我的生活就像陈酿的葡萄酒，来自精美的老桶，从边缘到残渣

vocabulary.definition: n. 内省, 反省；[医] 内省
vocabulary.context: Trying to hang onto the fast lane too long deprives us of the introspection, self-understanding and deep thoughts that usually accompany growing older.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 试图在快车道上停留太久，会剥夺我们通常伴随着年龄增长的内省、自我理解和深刻思考

vocabulary.definition: n. 少量的美食, 珍馐, 珍品, 珍闻
vocabulary.context: This constant access to information leaves the impression that a tidbit of knowledge, or a sound bite, is enough to be relevant.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这种不断获取信息的方式给人留下的印象是，一点知识或一句话就足以相关

vocabulary.definition: n. 酒, 葡萄收获(期、量), 酿酒；v. 采葡萄；adj. 佳酿的, 古典的, 老式的
vocabulary.context: And now I think of my life as vintage wine, from fine old kegs, from the brim to the dregs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 现在我认为我的生活就像陈酿的葡萄酒，来自精美的老桶，从边缘到残渣

vocabulary.definition: adv. 行为上
vocabulary.context: Sport career termination induces dramatic changes in athletes' personal, social and occupational lives, this can in turn potentially affect individuals cognitively, emotionally and behaviourally (Taylor & Ogilvie, 1994).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 体育生涯的终止会引起运动员个人、社会和职业生活的巨大变化，这反过来又可能影响个人的认知、情感和行为（Taylor & Ogilvie，1994）

vocabulary.definition: n. 同一性
vocabulary.context: Reduce your exclusive identification with your sporting role and expand your self-identity to other pursuits
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 减少你对体育角色的专属认同，并将你的自我认同扩展到其他追求上

vocabulary.definition: n. 血清素；[化] 5-羟色胺
vocabulary.context: Athletes have had regular doses of serotonin daily for many years, when this is suddenly decreased or stopped outright, we see a huge upset to the chemistry of the body.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 多年来，运动员每天定期服用血清素，当血清素突然减少或完全停止时，我们会看到身体的化学物质发生巨大的变化

vocabulary.definition: v. （英）假定；设定；假设（等于hypothesize）
vocabulary.context: It has been hypothesised that the loss of a preferred or dominant role may subsequently affect a person's overall self-concept (Markus, 1977; Stryker, 1978).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有人假设，失去首选或主导角色可能会影响一个人的整体自我概念（Markus，1977；Stryker，1978）

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是一个非常具体的纽约市关注点和情节，一部恐怖片和一部戏剧，抓住了想象力并进行了深入的检查

vocabulary.definition: n. 拳师
vocabulary.context: He was incoherent and filthy, his pants around his ankles but boxer shorts intact.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他语无伦次，脏兮兮，裤子绕着脚踝，但平角短裤完好无损

vocabulary.definition: n. 救助者
vocabulary.context: I approached the rescuer in the green jacket and introduced myself.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我走近穿着绿夹克的救援人员并做了自我介绍

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 唤起, 引起, 召(魂)；[法] 提审, 移送
vocabulary.context: He in turn evoked the hallowed name of another, Wesley Autrey, who a couple of years earlier had laid down on top of a man having a seizure between the rails and waited as a train passed over them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他反过来又唤起了另一个人的神圣名字，韦斯利·奥特里（Wesley Autrey），几年前，他躺在铁轨之间一名癫痫发作的男子身上，等待火车从他们身上驶过

vocabulary.definition: adv. 显然地, 明显地, 清楚地
vocabulary.context: I distinctly remember a man yelling, "For God's sake, stay away from that third rail!"
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我清楚地记得一个人大喊："看在上帝的份上，远离第三根铁轨！"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 明显的, 公然的, 蓄意的；[法] 明显的, 公开的
vocabulary.context: Children tend to immediately express their emotional reactions in an overt and sometimes dramatic way.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 孩子们往往会立即以一种公开的、有时甚至是戏剧性的方式表达他们的情绪反应

vocabulary.definition: adj. 孩子似的, 天真烂漫的
vocabulary.context: You would probably find this behavior strange and childlike.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你可能会觉得这种行为很奇怪而且很孩子气

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不受欢迎的, 不合乎社会道德标准的；[法] 不受欢迎的人, 不良份子, 不法份子
vocabulary.context: But, acknowledging and accepting that you feel an undesirable emotion will not make it stronger or more intense.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但是，承认并接受你感受到的不良情绪并不会让它变得更强烈或更强烈

vocabulary.definition: n. 标准度量, 计量器；v.t. 精确计量, 估计；[计] 线规
vocabulary.context: In the normal course of events, we notice and gauge other people's feelings all the time.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在正常情况下，我们总是注意到并评估他人的感受

vocabulary.definition: adj. 间接的, 非直截了当的, 不坦率的；[医] 间接的
vocabulary.context: Or at other times, the emotion might express itself in other indirect ways.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 或者在其他时候，这种情绪可能会以其他间接的方式表达出来

vocabulary.definition: adv. 强烈地; 极度; 剧烈地
vocabulary.context: If the responses to our emotions are negative, we learn to behave differently by expressing our emotions less intensely; we attempt to convey our feelings in a different way, or we choose to manage our emotions privately.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果对我们情绪的反应是消极的，我们就会学会通过不那么强烈地表达我们的情绪来采取不同的行为；我们试图以不同的方式表达我们的感受，或者我们选择私下管理我们的情绪

vocabulary.definition: n. 环境, 背景, 布景, 镶嵌, 调整, 沉落, 一副餐具；[计] 设置
vocabulary.context: We also learn over time that we need to behave and express ourselves differently in different settings.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 随着时间的推移，我们还了解到，我们需要在不同的环境中以不同的方式表现和表达自己

vocabulary.definition: adv. 秘密地；私下地
vocabulary.context: If the responses to our emotions are negative, we learn to behave differently by expressing our emotions less intensely; we attempt to convey our feelings in a different way, or we choose to manage our emotions privately.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果对我们情绪的反应是消极的，我们就会学会通过不那么强烈地表达我们的情绪来采取不同的行为；我们试图以不同的方式表达我们的感受，或者我们选择私下管理我们的情绪

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不使用语言的, 非言语交际的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 说话的人只要注意到你所表现出的非语言暗示，就会感到自己受到了尊重、倾听，并得到了你的支持

vocabulary.definition: n. 鼠, 卑鄙的人, 破坏者, 变节者；v.i. 捕鼠, 变节；v.t. 弄蓬松
vocabulary.context: You might feel bad about going behind a friend's back to talk about their private struggles, and you might worry that you'll ruin a friendship by "ratting them out." Try to remember that if your heart tells you that your friend needs help, this is not the time to keep secrets.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你可能会因为在朋友背后谈论他们的私人挣扎而感到难过，并且你可能会担心"出卖他们"会破坏友谊。请记住，如果您的内心告诉您您的朋友需要帮助，那么现在不是保守秘密的时候

vocabulary.definition: n. 侧线, 次要地位；v.t. 转入侧轨, 转变话题, 拖延处理
vocabulary.context: In a world full of distractions, it can be easy to get sidetracked and lose focus on the person or people in front of us.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在一个充满干扰的世界中，我们很容易分心并失去对我们面前的人的关注

vocabulary.definition: adj. 深切注意的, 留神的, 留心的
vocabulary.context: Being mindful of how well you listen to others will be an important consideration throughout your life.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 注意倾听他人的意见将是你一生中的一个重要考虑因素

vocabulary.definition: adv. 口头地, 非书面地
vocabulary.context: Actively listening and paying attention to others when communicating (verbally and non-verbally) helps us learn more about others and our environment.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在沟通（口头和非口头）时积极倾听并关注他人有助于我们更多地了解他人和我们的环境

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 吐露, 委托；v.i. 信赖
vocabulary.context: As a teen or young adult, you're likely to confide in a good friend to talk about your troubles.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 作为青少年或年轻人，您可能会向好朋友吐露心声，倾诉您的烦恼

vocabulary.definition: adj. 易怒的, 急躁的；[医] 应激性的, 过敏的
vocabulary.context: Maybe they are taking more risks than usual, seem irritable or have developed a negative outlook on life.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 也许他们比平时承担了更多的风险，看起来很烦躁，或者对生活产生了消极的看法

vocabulary.definition: n. 观点, 景色, 前途, 了望；[经] 展望
vocabulary.context: Maybe they are taking more risks than usual, seem irritable or have developed a negative outlook on life.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 也许他们比平时承担了更多的风险，看起来很烦躁，或者对生活产生了消极的看法

vocabulary.definition: n. 发作, 突发；[医] 发作, 阵发

vocabulary.definition: n. 巷道, 通路

vocabulary.definition: n. 密告者, 控告者, 通知者；[法] 控告人, 通知者, 告密者

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 告密者.

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 拉拉佩特是一位老洗衣妇，她看着邻居的死者和垂死者，然后，当她把顾客缝进那块他们再也不会出来的亚麻布里后，她就拿起熨斗把活人的亚麻布熨平

vocabulary.definition: n. 陶器, 瓦器；[化] 土器
vocabulary.context: "There's a Google Home, candles from brands, everything in the kitchen is gifted, there's a big Range cooker, pink and gold crockery, cupboards with healthy food and protein powders.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "有一个 Google Home，来自品牌的蜡烛，厨房里的一切都是精美的，有一个大炉灶，粉色和金色的陶器，橱柜里有健康食品和蛋白粉

vocabulary.definition: n. 男服
vocabulary.context: While regularly seen dressed in on-trend menswear, Bunker is actually on a modest freelance income of about £30,000, with most stemming from social media, blog posts and guest talks.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 虽然人们经常穿着流行男装，但邦克实际上拥有约 30,000 英镑的自由职业收入，大部分收入来自社交媒体、博客文章和嘉宾演讲

vocabulary.definition: n. 个别指导, 论文, 学习指南, 指导手册；adj. 个别指导的, 家庭教师的, 辅导的；[计] 教程
vocabulary.context: For every one of my blog tutorials, there have been weeks of back-and-forth emails, research, planning and crafting."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我的每一篇博客教程都经过数周的来回电子邮件、研究、规划和制作。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 睡衣裤, 宽松裤
vocabulary.context: In his pyjamas in bed - he's fighting a cold - at the home he shares with his parents in Leicester, Bunker says his set-up is worlds apart from the pensive street-style glossy shots of him kitted out in designers Paul Smith, Grenson and Joseph on his Instagram page, which has amassed 17,500 followers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 邦克穿着睡衣躺在床上--他正在与感冒作斗争--在他与父母位于莱斯特的家中，邦克说，他的布置与他在 Instagram 页面上穿着设计师 Paul Smith、Grenson 和 Joseph 的忧郁街头风格光鲜亮丽的照片截然不同，该页面已吸引了 17,500 名粉丝

vocabulary.definition: n. 市郊, 郊外
vocabulary.context: Another image from his portfolio shows him in industrial environs, sporting a minimalist brown trench coat as he looks directly at the camera.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的作品集中的另一张照片显示他在工业环境中，穿着极简主义的棕色风衣，直视镜头

vocabulary.definition: n. 炊事用具, 炉灶, 锅, 炊具, 烹饪用水果, 窜改者, 伪造者；[化] 蒸锅
vocabulary.context: "There's a Google Home, candles from brands, everything in the kitchen is gifted, there's a big Range cooker, pink and gold crockery, cupboards with healthy food and protein powders.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "有一个 Google Home，来自品牌的蜡烛，厨房里的一切都是精美的，有一个大炉灶，粉色和金色的陶器，橱柜里有健康食品和蛋白粉

vocabulary.definition: adj. 强制的, 强迫的；[医] 强迫性的
vocabulary.context: "We're seeing a rising awareness of how social media use and influencer culture affects mental health, from Fomo (Fear of Missing Out), to driving compulsive, addictive consumption, to feelings of isolation.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我们看到人们越来越意识到社交媒体的使用和影响者文化如何影响心理健康，从 Fomo（害怕错过）到驱动强迫性、成瘾性消费，再到孤立感

vocabulary.definition: adv. 沉思地, 焦虑地
vocabulary.context: Standing amid the reeds and staring pensively into the distance, Jordan Bunker looks every part the moody model, dressed head to toe in black - in a direct contrast with the setting.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 乔丹·邦克 (Jordan Bunker) 站在芦苇丛中，若有所思地凝视着远方，从头到脚都穿着黑色，与周围的环境形成鲜明对比，他看起来浑身都是喜怒无常的模特

vocabulary.definition: n. 皮包, 公文包, 部长职务, 有价证券财产目录, 艺术代表作选辑；[法] 公文包, 文件夹, 阁员职务
vocabulary.context: Another image from his portfolio shows him in industrial environs, sporting a minimalist brown trench coat as he looks directly at the camera.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的作品集中的另一张照片显示他在工业环境中，穿着极简主义的棕色风衣，直视镜头

vocabulary.definition: adv. 可忽视地
vocabulary.context: And girls were negligibly less physically violent to each other than boys were.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 女孩之间的身体暴力程度比男孩少，可以忽略不计

vocabulary.definition: adv. 记在页边, 有旁注, 边缘, 边沿地区, 边际, 限界, 勉强够格, 无关紧要, 少量
vocabulary.context: Boys spread gossip only marginally less often than girls did.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 男孩传播八卦的频率仅略低于女孩

vocabulary.definition: adj. 社会的, 社会学的
vocabulary.context: "Seemingly normal well-adjusted kids can be aggressive," says Faris, whose results are published in the new issue of the American Sociological Review.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "看似正常、适应良好的孩子可能具有攻击性，"法里斯说，他的研究结果发表在新一期的《美国社会学评论》上

vocabulary.definition: adj. 沉默寡言的, 不苟言笑的, 缄默的
vocabulary.context: (Break out the Edmund Burke.) "The majority of kids who witness this, either give it tacit approval or outright encouragement," says Faris.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: （打破埃德蒙·伯克。）"大多数目睹这一点的孩子要么默许，要么直接鼓励，"法里斯说

vocabulary.definition: adj. 社会经济学的
vocabulary.context: "Those demographic and socioeconomic factors don't seem to matter as much as where the kids are in the school hierarchy."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "这些人口和社会经济因素似乎并不像孩子们在学校等级中的位置那么重要。"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 人口统计的；[法] 人口统计的, 人口学的
vocabulary.context: "Those demographic and socioeconomic factors don't seem to matter as much as where the kids are in the school hierarchy."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "这些人口和社会经济因素似乎并不像孩子们在学校等级中的位置那么重要。"

vocabulary.definition: adv. 推测上, 大概
vocabulary.context: If a girl knew a lot of boys, or a boy knew a lot of girls at a school where there wasn't much intermingling of the sexes, those kids' status would go up, presumably because they provided a bridge to contact with potential dates.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果一个女孩认识很多男孩，或者一个男孩在一所没有太多性别混合的学校认识很多女孩，那么这些孩子的地位就会上升，大概是因为他们提供了与潜在约会对象联系的桥梁

vocabulary.definition: adv. 冷嘲地, 挖苦地, 讽刺地, 令人啼笑皆非地
vocabulary.context: Ironically, that's pointless; hostile behavior did not cause rises in status.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 讽刺的是，这是毫无意义的；敌对行为并没有导致地位的提高

vocabulary.definition: adj. 相反的, 矛盾的, 对立的；n. 相反, 对立面；adv. 相反地
vocabulary.context: Contrary to accepted ruffian-scholarship, the more popular a middle- or high-school kid becomes, the more central to the social network of the school, the more aggressive the behavior he or she engages in.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 与公认的流氓奖学金相反，中学生或高中生越受欢迎，在学校的社交网络中越重要，他或她的行为就越具有攻击性

vocabulary.definition: n. 冰川学家
vocabulary.context: About five years ago, Jason Box, a glaciologist from Ohio State University flew 31 giant rolls of white plastic to a glacier in Greenland.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大约五年前，俄亥俄州立大学的冰川学家 Jason Box 将 31 卷巨大的白色塑料空运到格陵兰岛的一座冰川

vocabulary.definition: n. （英）古气候学家 (paleoclimatology的变形)
vocabulary.context: She's a paleoclimatologist.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她是一位古气候学家

vocabulary.definition: adv. 用手
vocabulary.context: "Just the mention of us controlling the climate, not blindly poking at it as we are now, but manually steering it, sent a small shiver down my back," Craig writes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 克雷格写道："只要提到我们控制气候，不是像现在这样盲目地操纵它，而是手动操纵它，我的背就感到一阵轻微的颤抖。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 选择者, 选举人
vocabulary.context: Her focus is climate change, and in a book I am reading, she says someday soon we won't be climate victims, we will be climate choosers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她关注的焦点是气候变化，在我正在读的一本书中，她说很快有一天我们将不再成为气候受害者，我们将成为气候选择者

vocabulary.definition: v. 用滴定法测量
vocabulary.context: "Right now we are actively changing the climate in a very uncontrolled way, but I'm fairly certain that by the end of this century we'll have developed the technology to titrate the climate, to basically control the level of CO2 in the atmosphere.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "目前我们正在以一种非常不受控制的方式积极改变气候，但我相当确定，到本世纪末，我们将开发出滴定气候的技术，从根本上控制大气中二氧化碳的水平

vocabulary.definition: v. 颠倒, 倒放
vocabulary.context: Because I'm at home, wind raging outside, trees bending, leaves flying, a hurricane descending, subways suspended, my day upended, I can't stop thinking: "What is Maureen Raymo thinking?"
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 因为我在家，外面狂风肆虐，树木弯曲，树叶飞扬，飓风降临，地铁暂停，我的一天被颠覆了，我无法停止思考："莫林·雷莫在想什么？"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 显赫的, 杰出的, 有名的
vocabulary.context: More and more eminent scientists agree with her, that if the human race survives, the engineers will get smarter, the tools will get better, and one day we will control the climate.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 越来越多的杰出科学家同意她的观点，如果人类生存下来，工程师会变得更聪明，工具会变得更好，有一天我们将控制气候

vocabulary.definition: adv. 轻率地, 盲目地
vocabulary.context: "Just the mention of us controlling the climate, not blindly poking at it as we are now, but manually steering it, sent a small shiver down my back," Craig writes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 克雷格写道："只要提到我们控制气候，不是像现在这样盲目地操纵它，而是手动操纵它，我的背就感到一阵轻微的颤抖。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 获得成功的人
vocabulary.context: Michele Norris talks to Wes Moore the achiever - and now author of The Other Wes Moore - about his journey of discovery and friendship.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 米歇尔·诺里斯与成就者韦斯·摩尔（现为《另一个韦斯·摩尔》的作者）谈论他的发现和友谊之旅

vocabulary.definition: n. 拉回, 障碍, 阻扰
vocabulary.context: ...fired up and excited about life and excited to do things differently and realized just how strong that calling and how strong that pullback into the streets was, to the point that it eventually broke him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...对生活感到兴奋和兴奋，并兴奋地以不同的方式做事，并意识到这种召唤是多么强烈，而回到街头的感觉是多么强烈，以至于最终让他崩溃了

vocabulary.definition: n. 分枝, 分叉, 枝状物, 支脉, 支流, 衍生物；[医] 分支, 支状分布
vocabulary.context: So if you can do something to help people understand the ramifications of their decisions and do something to help people understand the neighborhoods in which these decisions are being made, then I think you should do it.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 因此，如果你可以做一些事情来帮助人们了解他们的决定的后果，并做一些事情来帮助人们了解做出这些决定的社区，那么我认为你应该这样做

vocabulary.definition: v. 拙笨地修补, 糟蹋；n. 拙笨的修补, 难看的补缀
vocabulary.context: Just after that Wes Moore learned he'd won a Rhodes Scholarship in late 2000, he also learned about another Wes Moore, who would soon be sentenced to life in prison for his role in a botched jewelry store robbery that resulted in the death of an off-duty police officer.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 就在韦斯·摩尔 (Wes Moore) 于 2000 年底得知自己获得罗德奖学金后，他还了解到了另一个韦斯·摩尔 (Wes Moore)，他很快因参与一次拙劣的珠宝店抢劫案而被判处终身监禁，该抢劫案导致一名下班警察死亡

vocabulary.definition: adj. 贪吃的, 狼吞虎咽的, 贪婪的
vocabulary.context: NORRIS : When you talk about the grip of the street, you often think of this sort of voracious force that grabs young men and women, but in his case, it was almost like he drifted into drugs, both using drugs and selling them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 诺里斯：当你谈到街头的控制力时，你经常会想到这种抓住年轻男女的贪婪力量，但就他而言，这几乎就像他陷入了毒品之中，既吸毒又贩卖毒品

vocabulary.definition: n. 英国货币, 标准纯银；adj. 英国货币的, 标准纯银的, 含标准成分的
vocabulary.context: You have a sterling resume.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你有一份出色的简历

vocabulary.definition: adj. 改正的, 修正的, 矫正的
vocabulary.context: I was actually a bit surprised when a month later, I get a note from Jessup Correctional Institution from Wes Moore.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一个月后，我收到韦斯·摩尔从杰赛普惩教所寄来的一张纸条，这让我实际上有点惊讶

vocabulary.definition: n. 命运, 运气；v.t. 注定
vocabulary.context: It's called The Other Wes Moore: One Name, Two Fates .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这本书的名字叫《另一个韦斯·摩尔：一个名字，两种命运》

vocabulary.definition: adj. 萌芽的, 初期的, 未成熟；[医] 胚胎的
vocabulary.context: Scientists say they have, for the first time, cloned human embryos capable of producing embryonic stem cells.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 科学家表示，他们首次克隆了能够产生胚胎干细胞的人类胚胎

vocabulary.definition: v. （使某物）无性繁殖( clone的过去式和过去分词 )
vocabulary.context: Scientists say they have, for the first time, cloned human embryos capable of producing embryonic stem cells.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 科学家表示，他们首次克隆了能够产生胚胎干细胞的人类胚胎

vocabulary.definition: n. 生物伦理学家
vocabulary.context: Daniel Sulmasy, a professor of medicine and a bioethicist at the University of Chicago.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Daniel Sulmasy，芝加哥大学医学教授兼生物伦理学家

vocabulary.definition: n. 妙语, 遁辞, 讽刺；v. 说讽刺话, 嘲弄
vocabulary.context: "The Starbucks experiment, I guess," quipped Daley.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我猜是星巴克的实验，"戴利打趣道

vocabulary.definition: adj. 针的, 尖刺的, 尖刺状突起的, 脊骨的；[医] 棘折; 脊柱的
vocabulary.context: That ability means, in theory, that they could be used eventually to treat all sorts of illnesses, including diabetes, Alzheimer's, Parkinson's and spinal cord injuries.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 从理论上讲，这种能力意味着它们最终可以用于治疗各种疾病，包括糖尿病、阿尔茨海默氏症、帕金森氏症和脊髓损伤

vocabulary.definition: adj. 讨厌的, 不愉快的, 厌恶的, 不一致的, 矛盾的, 反对的；[法] 不一致的, 不相当的, 矛盾的
vocabulary.context: The experiments involve creating and then destroying human embryos for research purposes, which some find morally repugnant.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些实验涉及为了研究目的创造然后销毁人类胚胎，一些人认为这在道德上是令人反感的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 最佳的, 最理想的；[化] 最优的
vocabulary.context: That ingredient, plus other tweaks in the process, including using fresh eggs and determining the optimal stage of each egg's development, Mitalipov says.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 米塔利波夫说，该成分以及过程中的其他调整，包括使用新鲜鸡蛋和确定每个鸡蛋发育的最佳阶段

vocabulary.definition: n. 幽灵, 妖怪, 凶兆
vocabulary.context: "But it's going to, I think, raise the specter of controversy again."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "但我认为，这将再次引发争议。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 鸡尾酒, 开味品；adj. 鸡尾酒会的
vocabulary.context: "This little change in the cocktail was what really allowed the experiment to really ultimately succeed."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "鸡尾酒中的这一小变化才是真正让实验最终取得成功的原因。"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不可测量的,难以计算的,难以估量的,无法量化的
vocabulary.context: ...in his career Bernbach perceived that although research had its place in persuasion, there was something more-something completely unquantifiable: "The truth isn't the truth until people believe you and they can't believe you if they don't know what you're saying; and they can't know what you're saying if they don't listen to you; and they won't...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...在他的职业生涯中，伯恩巴赫认为，尽管研究在说服方面占有一席之地，但还有一些完全无法量化的东西："除非人们相信你，否则真相就不是真相，如果他们不知道你在说什么，他们就不会相信你；如果他们不听你的话，他们就不会知道你在说什么；而且他们不会......

vocabulary.definition: v.t. vi. 私有化
vocabulary.context: In another spot, DDB mocked Goldwater's statement about privatizing Social Security by showing a pair of hands ripping up a Social Security card.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在另一个地方，DDB 通过展示一双手撕毁社会保障卡来嘲笑戈德华特关于社会保障私有化的声明

vocabulary.definition: adv. 胃灼热地, 骤雨般地
vocabulary.context: "Advertising is fundamentally persuasion and persuasion happens to be not a science, but an art," he brashly told his then-employer, Grey Advertising.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "广告从根本上讲是说服，而说服恰好不是一门科学，而是一门艺术，"他傲慢地告诉他当时的雇主葛瑞广告公司

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 先买, 先取；v.i. 先发制人地叫牌
vocabulary.context: Instead, campaigns, including Goldwater's, preempted regular programming with dry, 30-minute speeches or campaign documentaries by candidates.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 相反，包括戈德华特在内的竞选活动都以候选人干巴巴的 30 分钟演讲或竞选纪录片取代了常规节目

vocabulary.definition: adj. 易吃饱的, 塞满的, 平凡的, 庸俗的, 步履艰难的
vocabulary.context: They didn't set out to revolutionize political advertising; what they wanted to do was to break the established rules of political ads-then dominated by stodgy 30-minute speeches mixed with shorter policy-focused spots-by injecting creativity and emotion.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们并不是要彻底改变政治广告；而是要彻底改变政治广告。他们想要做的是通过注入创造力和情感来打破政治广告的既定规则--当时的政治广告以乏味的 30 分钟演讲为主，混合着较短的以政策为中心的广告

vocabulary.definition: n. 折衷主义者；adj. 选择的, 折衷的
vocabulary.context: Daisy and the other ads were made by Doyle Dane Bernbach (DDB), an eclectic group of ad men at a medium-sized Madison Avenue firm with a stellar reputation for groundbreaking campaigns for Volkswagen and Avis.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Daisy 和其他广告是由 Doyle Dane Bernbach (DDB) 制作的，DDB 是麦迪逊大道一家中型公司的不拘一格的广告人员团队，因为大众汽车和安飞士提供开创性的广告活动而享有盛誉

vocabulary.definition: adv. 想象上地
vocabulary.context: And you won't be interesting unless you say things freshly, originally, imaginatively."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 除非你说的话新鲜、原创、富有想象力，否则你不会有趣。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 休假, 放假, 暂时解雇；v.t. 准假, (暂时)解雇
vocabulary.context: Bush's dark, fear-inducing "Revolving Door" spot in 1988 that exploited the controversy over a prison furlough program of his Democratic opponent, Michael Dukakis.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 布什 1988 年拍摄的黑暗、令人恐惧的"旋转门"广告利用了他的民主党对手迈克尔·杜卡基斯 (Michael Dukakis) 的监狱休假计划引发的争议

vocabulary.definition: n. 神经症患者；adj. 神经质的, 神经症的
vocabulary.context: And there were two dozen other ads from LBJ's camp-humorous, informative, dark, and neurotic.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 还有两打来自林登·约翰逊阵营的其他广告--幽默、信息丰富、黑暗、神经质

vocabulary.definition: adv. 恶兆地, 不吉利地; 预示地
vocabulary.context: DDB mocked Goldwater's vote against the nuclear test ban treaty with a spot showing nothing but a girl licking an ice cream cone as a female announcer spoke ominously about the fallout from atmospheric nuclear testing and how it might enter the food supply.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: DDB 嘲笑了戈德华特对禁止核试验条约的投票，广告中除了一个女孩舔着蛋卷冰淇淋外什么也没有，而一位女播音员则不祥地谈论了大气层核试验的后果以及它可能如何进入食品供应

vocabulary.definition: n. 影响神经系统的化学物质
vocabulary.context: But despite their physiological benefits, these neurochemical changes can affect our brain, and impair our mental functioning.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但是，尽管这些神经化学变化有生理上的好处，但它们会影响我们的大脑，并损害我们的心理功能

vocabulary.definition: adv. 仁慈地
vocabulary.context: It was nine days before two British divers, John Volanthen and Richard Stanton, located the group - mercifully alive and apparently in good physical and mental health.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 九天后，两名英国潜水员约翰·沃兰森 (John Volanthen) 和理查德·斯坦顿 (Richard Stanton) 找到了这群人--幸运的是，他们还活着，而且显然身心健康

vocabulary.definition: n. 倒叙, 火舌回闪；[机] 回闪
vocabulary.context: To this day some of the Chilean miners report struggling to hold down jobs and some experience harrowing flashbacks to their time spent underground.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 直到今天，一些智利矿工报告说，他们在努力保住工作，有些人还经历了痛苦的回忆，回忆起他们在地下度过的时光

vocabulary.definition: adv. 认知地
vocabulary.context: The Thai footballers seem to have managed to keep themselves hydrated, and although they were clearly hungry when they were found, they appeared cognitively intact, looking alert and asking appropriate questions.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 泰国足球运动员似乎设法保持水分充足，尽管他们被发现时显然很饿，但他们的认知能力似乎完好无损，看起来很警觉，并提出了适当的问题

vocabulary.definition: n. 足球员, 足球选手
vocabulary.context: When 12 young footballers and their coach entered the Tham Luang Nang Non cave in Thailand, it was supposed to be a fun outing after football practice.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当12名年轻足球运动员和他们的教练进入泰国的Tham Luang Nang Non洞穴时，这本应该是足球训练后的一次有趣的郊游

vocabulary.definition: adj. 外面的, 熄灭的, 结束的；adv. 在外, 熄灭, 出现；prep. 出自, 离去, 向
vocabulary.context: When 12 young footballers and their coach entered the Tham Luang Nang Non cave in Thailand, it was supposed to be a fun outing after football practice.

vocabulary.definition: adj. 悲观的, 厌世的, 悲观主义的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 悲观思维会增加焦虑和无助感，这会阻止人们尝试主动改善自己的处境

vocabulary.definition: adj. 适当的, 足够的；[法] 胜任的, 适当的, 充分的
vocabulary.context: Everyone knows that the human body has basic physical requirement: an adequate supply of food, water and warmth.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大家都知道，人体有基本的生理需求：充足的食物、水和温暖

vocabulary.definition: adv. 无节制地, 过度地；adj. 无节制的, 过度的
vocabulary.context: If they were spying on me, as I supposed, they must, while waiting for the success of the joke they had been preparing for me, have been laughing immoderately at my terror.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果他们如我所料，在监视我，那么他们一定在等待他们为我准备的笑话成功时，一直在无节制地嘲笑我的恐惧

vocabulary.definition: n. (男用)衬衫式长睡衣

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但我立即遭到一阵殴打，这让我直接从湿透的床单上跳起来，穿着睡衣冲进走廊，发现门开着

vocabulary.definition: adj. 王子的, 威严的, 王候般的, 豪华的, 奢侈的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当我到达时，他们给了我隆重的接待，这立刻引起了我的怀疑

vocabulary.definition: n. 城堡

vocabulary.definition: n. 白鼬, 雪貂, 侦探；v.t. 用雪貂打猎, 搜出, 驱出；v.i. 搜索

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我对自己说："小心，老雪貂！

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使聋；v.i. 变聋
vocabulary.context: And a dreadful noise, as if a sideboard laden with plates and dishes had fallen down, almost deafened me.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一阵可怕的噪音，仿佛装满盘子和盘子的餐具柜掉落下来，几乎让我耳聋

vocabulary.definition: n. 绞死, 绞杀, 悬挂；[法] 绞刑, 绞死
vocabulary.context: I cast a glance round the walls, the furniture, the ceiling, the hangings, the floor.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我环顾四周的墙壁、家具、天花板、帷幔、地板

vocabulary.definition: n. 键孔, 栓孔, 锁眼；adj. 显示内情的
vocabulary.context: I had no doubt they were looking through the keyhole.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我毫不怀疑他们正在从钥匙孔里看

vocabulary.definition: n. 贴身男仆；v.t. 伺候
vocabulary.context: The noise brought my friends hurrying into my apartment, and we found, sprawling over my improvised bed, the dismayed valet, who, while bringing me my morning cup of tea, had tripped over this obstacle in the middle of the floor and fallen on his stomach, spilling my breakfast over my face in spite of himself.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 噪音让我的朋友们匆忙走进我的公寓，我们发现那个沮丧的男仆趴在我临时搭建的床上，他在给我送早茶时，被地板中间的障碍物绊倒，摔倒在地上，不由自主地把我的早餐洒在了我的脸上

vocabulary.definition: adv. 确实地, 无疑地, 确信地

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我肯定是这个笑话的受害者

vocabulary.definition: n. 陷害, 包围；[法] 陷害, 计谋
vocabulary.context: What else kept up morale in the face of doom but the assurance that Multivac would always predict and circumvent any Denebian move, and would always direct and prevent the circumvention of our moves?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 除了保证 Multivac 始终预测和规避任何 Denebian 行动，并且始终指导和防止规避我们的行动之外，还有什么能够在末日面前保持士气呢？

vocabulary.definition: n. 不可靠, 不可信赖；不安全
vocabulary.context: You said nothing to us about unreliability."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你没有对我们说过不可靠的事情。"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 旧式的, 过时的, 不流行的

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 预先消化, 简化

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 您对 Multivac 必须使用的数据了解多少？由地球上、月球上、火星上、甚至土卫六上的一百台辅助计算机预先简化而成

vocabulary.definition: adj. 固态物理学的, 固态的；[电] 固态
vocabulary.context: Besides, do you think I could trust the solid-state components coming out of Cryogenics in the last years?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 此外，你认为我可以相信过去几年 Cryogenics 生产的固态组件吗？

vocabulary.definition: n. <法>幕间休息, 幕间休息的插演节目
vocabulary.context: In this short interlude that the three had instinctively sought out in the one peaceful corner of a metropolis gone mad; in this entr'acte between the dangers of war and the difficulties of peace; when, for one moment, they might all find surcease; he was conscious only of his weight of guilt.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在这段短暂的插曲中，三人本能地在一个疯狂的大都市的一个安静的角落里寻找；在战争的危险与和平的困难之间的交汇处；那时，有那么一刻，他们都可以找到解脱；他只意识到自己的罪孽深重

vocabulary.definition: n. 子公司, 附件, 辅助者；adj. 辅助的, 次要的, 津贴的
vocabulary.context: What do you know of the data Multivac had to use; predigested from a hundred subsidiary computers here on Earth, on the Moon, on Mars, even on Titan.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 您对 Multivac 必须使用的数据了解多少？由地球上、月球上、火星上、甚至土卫六上的一百台辅助计算机预先简化而成

vocabulary.definition: adj. 沉着的, 泰然自若的, 镇静的
vocabulary.context: "Thanks to Multivac," said Swift, with a quiet glance at the imperturbable Jablonsky, who through all the war had been Chief Interpreter of Science's oracle.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "感谢 Multivac，"斯威夫特说道，同时静静地看了一眼镇定自若的雅布隆斯基，他在整个战争期间一直是科学神谕的首席解释者

vocabulary.definition: n. 停止；v. 中止, 停止

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在这段短暂的插曲中，三人本能地在一个疯狂的大都市的一个安静的角落里寻找；在战争的危险与和平的困难之间的交汇处；那时，有那么一刻，他们都可以找到解脱；他只意识到自己的罪孽深重

vocabulary.definition: n. 反例证

vocabulary.context: ...throughout history and acknowledging that part of the human experience and the particular experience of native people as victims of genocide in many places, I think we can arrive at a deeper understanding that will make us all not only more knowledgeable, but able to lead a better life and hopefully make this country a lot better place.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...纵观历史，并承认这部分人类经历以及许多地方原住民作为种族灭绝受害者的特殊经历，我认为我们可以达成更深入的理解，这将使我们所有人不仅更有知识，而且能够过上更好的生活，并希望使这个国家变得更加美好

vocabulary.context: All the rest of that glorious night, as the moon went westering down the sky, the two slept on the rose-red, honey-brown sand, until, without any dawn, the sun suddenly rose above a heliotrope horizon.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在那个光辉灿烂的夜晚的其余时间里，当月亮从天空西下时，两人睡在玫瑰红、蜜棕色的沙子上，直到没有任何黎明，太阳突然从天芥菜地平线上升起

vocabulary.definition: n. 恶意, 邪恶, 恶性肿瘤；[医] 恶性

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们用一种深不可测的墨色盯着那艘船，眼神里充满了任何地球上的生物都无法比拟或忍受的恶毒

vocabulary.definition: n. 西风

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在那个光辉灿烂的夜晚的其余时间里，当月亮从天空西下时，两人睡在玫瑰红、蜜棕色的沙子上，直到没有任何黎明，太阳突然从天芥菜地平线上升起

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他快速地把手伸到摇曳的树叶下面，当他的手指合上其波纹状的表面时，他意识到他终于找到了皇家温特尔陷阱的完美样本，这是最稀有、最美丽的贝壳之一

vocabulary.definition: n. 笨蛋

vocabulary.context: And the wine, he went on, wine from Samos, Santorini, and Crete, retsina and mavrodaphne, a taste almost as old as water...and then the fragrant melons, the pastries, yellow diples and golden loukoumades, the honey custard galaktoboureko.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他继续说道，还有来自萨摩斯岛、圣托里尼岛和克里特岛的葡萄酒、retsina 和 mavrodaphne，一种几乎和水一样古老的味道......然后是芳香的甜瓜、糕点、黄色的酒泡和金色的 loukoumades、蜂蜜蛋奶冻 galaktoboureko

vocabulary.definition: n. 涂刷器, 橡胶滚轴；v.t. 用涂刷器涂刷, 用橡胶滚轴压

vocabulary.context: But I have never been able to recapture the halcyon flavor of those figs he gave me on that day so long ago, although I have bought figs many times.

vocabulary.definition: adj. 强壮的, 结实的, 多腱的
vocabulary.context: For that reason I led a raid on the small, shabby grocery of old Barba Nikos, a short, sinewy Greek who walked with a slight limp and sported a flaring, handlebar mustache.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 出于这个原因，我对老巴尔巴·尼科斯（Barba Nikos）那家小而破旧的杂货店进行了一次突袭，他是一个身材矮小、肌肉发达的希腊人，走路时有点跛，留着八字胡

vocabulary.definition: n. 松香味希腊葡萄酒
vocabulary.context: And the wine, he went on, wine from Samos, Santorini, and Crete, retsina and mavrodaphne, a taste almost as old as water...and then the fragrant melons, the pastries, yellow diples and golden loukoumades, the honey custard galaktoboureko.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他继续说道，还有来自萨摩斯岛、圣托里尼岛和克里特岛的葡萄酒、retsina 和 mavrodaphne，一种几乎和水一样古老的味道......然后是芳香的甜瓜、糕点、黄色的酒泡和金色的 loukoumades、蜂蜜蛋奶冻 galaktoboureko

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有害的, 恶意的
vocabulary.context: Then he opened one eye to mark me with a baleful intensity.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后他睁开一只眼睛，用一种恶毒的目光注视着我

vocabulary.definition: n. 丁香；cleave的过去式
vocabulary.context: On the holidays in our house, my wife and sons and I sit down to a dinner of steaming, buttered pilaf like my mother used to make and lemon-egg avgolemono and roast lamb richly seasoned with cloves of garlic.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 假期里，我和妻子、儿子会在家里坐下来吃一顿热气腾腾的黄油抓饭，就像我母亲以前做的那样，还有柠檬鸡蛋 avgolemono 和烤羊肉，并用蒜瓣调味

vocabulary.definition: adv. 唐突地, 粗率地
vocabulary.context: It's time for you to leave, he motioned brusquely toward the door.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你该离开了，他粗鲁地向门口示意

vocabulary.definition: n. 凤尾鱼；鳀鱼
vocabulary.context: Then comes celery, cucumbers, tomatoes sliced lengthwise, green peppers, origanon, green olives, feta, avocado, and anchovies.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后是芹菜、黄瓜、纵向切片的西红柿、青椒、牛至、绿橄榄、羊乳酪、鳄梨和凤尾鱼

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不能渗透的, 不能通过的；[医] 不[渗]透性
vocabulary.context: When the mixture was cool, I cut it into lumps, and making a hole in one side of each lump, I inserted a large dose of strychnine and cyanide, contained in a capsule that was impermeable by any odor; finally I sealed the holes up with pieces of the cheese itself.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当混合物冷却后，我将其切成块，并在每个块的一侧打一个孔，放入大剂量的士的宁和氰化物，将其装在一个不透任何气味的胶囊中；最后我用奶酪本身的碎片封住了洞

vocabulary.definition: n. 马肉, 马
vocabulary.context: An old bull or cow they disdained, and though they occasionally took a young calf or colt, it was quite clear that veal or horseflesh was not their favorite diet.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们鄙视一头老公牛或母牛，尽管他们偶尔会带走一头小牛或小马驹，但很明显，小牛肉或马肉不是他们最喜欢的食物

vocabulary.definition: adj. 难取悦的, 挑剔的, 苛求的
vocabulary.context: The old idea that a wolf was constantly in a starving state, and therefore ready to eat anything, was as far as possible from the truth in this case, for these freebooters were always sleek and well-conditioned, and were in fact most fastidious about what they ate.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 认为狼经常处于饥饿状态，因此准备吃任何东西的旧观念，在这种情况下与事实相去甚远，因为这些强盗总是光滑且条件良好，而且实际上对他们吃的东西最挑剔

vocabulary.definition: n. 【神】变成狼的人；大而残忍的狼；[网络] 狼人
vocabulary.context: Each believed he could destroy this noted wolf, the first by means of a newly devised poison, which was to be laid out in an entirely new manner; the other a French Canadian, by poison assisted with certain spells and charms, for he firmly believed that Lobo was a veritable 'loup-garou,' and could not be killed by ordinary means.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每个人都相信他可以消灭这只著名的狼，首先是通过一种新设计的毒药，这种毒药将以全新的方式布置；另一个是法裔加拿大人，在某些咒语和咒语的辅助下下毒，因为他坚信洛博是名副其实的"卢普加鲁"，无法用普通手段杀死

vocabulary.definition: adj. 根深蒂固的
vocabulary.context: He had never really deserted her, but knowing that he could not save her, his deep-rooted dread of firearms had been too much for him when he saw us approaching.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他从来没有真正抛弃过她，但知道自己无法拯救她，当他看到我们走近时，他对枪支根深蒂固的恐惧让他无法承受

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不灰心丧气的, 情窦未开的, 赤诚的
vocabulary.context: A lion shorn of his strength, an eagle robbed of his freedom, or a dove bereft of his mate, all die, it is said, of a broken heart; and who will aver that this grim bandit could bear the three-fold brunt, heart-whole?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 据说，一头被剥夺了力量的狮子，一只被剥夺了自由的鹰，或者一只失去了伴侣的鸽子，都会因心碎而死；谁能保证这个冷酷的强盗能够全心全意地承受三重冲击？

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不幸的, 坏运气的
vocabulary.context: Old Lobo, the weir-wolf, knew as well as the shepherds that the goats were the moral force of the flock, so hastily running over the backs of the densely packed sheep, he fell on these leaders, slew them all in a few minutes, and soon had the luckless sheep stampeding in a thousand different directions.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 老洛博，堰狼，和牧羊人一样知道山羊是羊群的道德力量，所以他急忙从密密麻麻的羊背上跑过去，扑向这些首领，几分钟之内就把它们全部杀死，很快，那些倒霉的羊就向一千个不同的方向奔跑

vocabulary.definition: adj. 四重的, 四倍的, 四垒的；adv. 四倍, 四重
vocabulary.context: All in vain, each trap was a dead drag of over three hundred pounds, and in their relentless fourfold grasp, with great steel jaws on every foot, and the heavy logs and chains all entangled together, he was absolutely powerless.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一切都是徒劳，每个陷阱都是三百多磅的死拖，在他们无情的四重抓握中，每只脚上都有巨大的钢爪，沉重的木头和铁链纠缠在一起，他完全无能为力

vocabulary.definition: n. 破坏者, 劫掠者, 蹂躏者
vocabulary.context: But cunningly compounded poisons, charms, and incantations were all of no avail against this grizzly devastator.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但巧妙配制的毒药、咒语和咒语对这个灰熊毁灭者来说却毫无作用

vocabulary.definition: n. 死肉, 腐肉；adj. 腐肉的, 似腐肉的, 吃腐肉的
vocabulary.context: "Grand old outlaw, hero of a thousand lawless raids, in a few minutes you will be but a great load of carrion.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "伟大的老亡命之徒，一千次不法袭击的英雄，几分钟之内你就会变成一堆腐肉

vocabulary.context: Benna is a genre of Antiguan and Barbudan calypso-like music, characterized by scandalous gossip.

vocabulary.context: ...is how to behave in the presence of men who don't know you very well, and this way they won't recognize immediately the s- I have warned you against becoming; be sure to wash every day, even if it is with your own spit; don't squat down to play marbles - you are not a boy, you know; don't pick people's flowers - you might catch something;...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...就是在不太了解你的男人面前如何表现，这样他们就不会立即认出我警告过你不要成为的人；一定要每天清洗，哪怕是用自己的口水；不要蹲下来玩弹珠--你知道，你不是男孩；不要摘别人的花--你可能会抓到一些东西；......

vocabulary.definition: adj. 聚成球形的, 砾岩性的；n. 集成物, 混合体, 砾岩；v. (使)凝聚成团
vocabulary.context: Auschwitz III, also called Buna or Monowitz, was established in October 1942 to house prisoners assigned to forced labor at rubber works owned by the German conglomerate I.G.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 奥斯威辛三号集中营，也称为布纳或莫诺维茨，成立于 1942 年 10 月，用于收容被分配到德国企业集团 I.G. 拥有的橡胶工厂进行强迫劳动的囚犯

vocabulary.definition: v. 刺青, 文身( tattoo的过去式和过去分词 ); 连续有节奏地敲击; 作连续有节奏的敲击
vocabulary.context: Some were tattooed with identification numbers on their left arms.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有些人的左臂上纹有身份号码

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 脱去...的衣服, 剥去；v.i. 脱衣服
vocabulary.context: Each had three components: a disrobing area, a large gas chamber, and crematorium ovens.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每个都由三个部分组成：脱衣区、大型毒气室和火葬炉

vocabulary.definition: n. 军备, 军队, 武器；[机] 武器
vocabulary.context: Inmates were forced to work in coal mines and in armaments industries.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 囚犯被迫在煤矿和军火工业中工作

vocabulary.definition: n. 烤箱, 灶, 子宫；[化] 烘箱
vocabulary.context: Each had three components: a disrobing area, a large gas chamber, and crematorium ovens.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每个都由三个部分组成：脱衣区、大型毒气室和火葬炉

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不适当的, 不胜任的, 不健康的；v.t. 使不相宜, 使不合格
vocabulary.context: The SS staff determined the majority to be unfit for forced labor and sent them immediately to the gas chambers, which were disguised as shower installations.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 党卫军工作人员确定大多数人不适合强迫劳动，并立即将他们送往毒气室，毒气室伪装成淋浴装置

vocabulary.definition: adj. 独裁的, 独裁主义的
vocabulary.context: Regime(noun)a type of government, especially an authoritarian one 2.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 政权（名词）一种政府，尤其是专制政府 2.

vocabulary.definition: n. 识别, 身份证明, 认同；[化] 鉴定; 鉴别; 鉴别法; 认证
vocabulary.context: Some were tattooed with identification numbers on their left arms.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有些人的左臂上纹有身份号码

vocabulary.definition: n. 政权, 当权期间, 政体, 社会制度, 体制, 情态；[医] 制度, 生活制度
vocabulary.context: The Auschwitz concentration camp complex was the largest one established by the Nazi regime.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 奥斯威辛集中营是纳粹政权建立的最大的集中营

vocabulary.definition: adv. 诱人地；迷人地
vocabulary.context: It remains our hope that these, too, will be blessed with sufficient reason to realize that history will not be denied and that the new society cannot be created by reproducing the repugnant past, however refined or enticingly repackaged.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们仍然希望，这些人也能有足够的理由认识到历史不会被否认，新社会不能通过复制令人厌恶的过去来创建，无论多么精致或诱人地重新包装

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 重新包装
vocabulary.context: It remains our hope that these, too, will be blessed with sufficient reason to realize that history will not be denied and that the new society cannot be created by reproducing the repugnant past, however refined or enticingly repackaged.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们仍然希望，这些人也能有足够的理由认识到历史不会被否认，新社会不能通过复制令人厌恶的过去来创建，无论多么精致或诱人地重新包装

vocabulary.definition: n. 两分, 分裂, 二分法；[医] 二分(二分之一); 二叉, 二歧
vocabulary.context: We speak here of the challenge of the dichotomies of war and peace, violence and non-violence, racism and human dignity, oppression and repression and liberty and human rights, poverty and freedom from want.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们在这里谈论战争与和平、暴力与非暴力、种族主义与人类尊严、压迫与镇压、自由与人权、贫困与免于匮乏的二分法的挑战

vocabulary.definition: n. 暗语, 暗号, 口令, 口号, 行话, 术语, 习俗, 习惯, 陈词滥调, 过时的信仰
vocabulary.context: But there are still some within our country who wrongly believe they can make a contribution to the cause of justice and peace by clinging to the shibboleths that have been proved to spell nothing but disaster.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但我国境内仍有一些人错误地认为，坚持那些已被证明只会带来灾难的陈词滥调，就能为正义与和平事业做出贡献

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使卸去负荷, 使安心, 吐露心事消除思想负担
vocabulary.context: This must be a world of democracy and respect for human rights, a world freed from the horrors of poverty, hunger, deprivation and ignorance, relieved of the threat and the scourge of civil wars and external aggression and unburdened of the great tragedy of millions forced to become refugees.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这必须是一个民主和尊重人权的世界，一个没有贫穷、饥饿、匮乏和无知的恐怖的世界，一个没有内战和外来侵略的威胁和祸害的世界，一个没有数百万人被迫沦为难民的巨大悲剧的世界

vocabulary.definition: n. 人本主义, 人文主义, 人道主义；[法] 人道主义, 人文主义, 人本主义
vocabulary.context: Let it never be said by future generations that indifference, cynicism or selfishness made us fail to live up to the ideals of humanism which the Nobel Peace Prize encapsulates.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 让子孙后代永远不要说，冷漠、愤世嫉俗或自私使我们未能实现诺贝尔和平奖所体现的人道主义理想

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 装入胶囊, 封进内部, 压缩；v.i. 做成胶囊
vocabulary.context: Let it never be said by future generations that indifference, cynicism or selfishness made us fail to live up to the ideals of humanism which the Nobel Peace Prize encapsulates.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 让子孙后代永远不要说，冷漠、愤世嫉俗或自私使我们未能实现诺贝尔和平奖所体现的人道主义理想

vocabulary.definition: n. 贫穷, 穷困
vocabulary.context: We stand here today as nothing more than a representative of the millions of our people who dared to rise up against a social system whose very essence is war, violence, racism, oppression, repression and the impoverishment of an entire people.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们今天站在这里，只不过是我们数百万人民的代表，他们敢于反抗一个社会制度，而这个社会制度的本质是战争、暴力、种族主义、压迫、镇压和全体人民的贫困

vocabulary.definition: n. 调戏, 干扰, 妨碍；[法] 干扰, 调戏, 作弄
vocabulary.context: The children must, at last, play in the open veld, no longer tortured by the pangs of hunger or ravaged by disease or threatened with the scourge of ignorance, molestation and abuse, and no longer required to engage in deeds whose gravity exceeds the demands of their tender years.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 孩子们终于可以在开阔的草原上玩耍，不再受到饥饿的折磨，不再受到疾病的蹂躏，也不再受到无知、骚扰和虐待的威胁，不再被要求从事那些严重程度超过他们幼年要求的事情

vocabulary.definition: n. 显赫, 名家, 高处；[医] 隆起, 隆凸
vocabulary.context: Moved by that appeal and inspired by the eminence you have thrust upon us, we undertake that we too will do what we can to contribute to the renewal of our world so that none should, in future, be described as the "wretched of the earth".
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 受到这一呼吁的感动，并受到你们赋予我们的崇高地位的鼓舞，我们承诺，我们也将尽我们所能，为我们世界的更新做出贡献，以便将来没有人被称为"地球上的不幸者"

vocabulary.definition: adv. 无畏地, 大胆地
vocabulary.context: She fearlessly denounced the white bus driver who had kicked her off a city bus from the witness stand.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她无所畏惧地谴责了将她从证人席上踢下城市公交车的白人公交车司机

vocabulary.definition: n. 直线
vocabulary.context: "When King arrived in Montgomery during the 1965 march from Selma, he beelined to Gilmore's kitchen for pork chops."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "当金在 1965 年游行期间从塞尔玛抵达蒙哥马利时，他直奔吉尔摩的厨房买猪排。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 轨迹；地点, 所在地
vocabulary.context: "In the process, her home kitchen became a locus for change," writes Edge, the director of the Southern Foodways Alliance, which is based out of the University of Mississippi and documents the intersection of food and culture in the South.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "在这个过程中，她的家庭厨房成为了变革的场所，"南方美食联盟的主任埃奇写道，该联盟总部位于密西西比大学，记录了南方饮食与文化的交汇

vocabulary.definition: n. 贱民(印度的最低阶级), 被放逐者
vocabulary.context: But "in the white world she became a pariah." Gilmore lost her job as a cook at the National Lunch Company - though Edge says it's not clear whether she was fired or resigned "knowing her testimony would lead to her dismissal."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但"在白人世界里她成了贱民"。吉尔摩失去了国家午餐公司厨师的工作，不过埃奇表示，目前还不清楚她是被解雇还是"因为她的证词会导致她被解雇"而辞职

vocabulary.definition: n. 炖, 烦恼, 热浴, 妓院, 鱼塘；v.i. 炖, 焖, 忧虑；v.t. 炖, 焖, 使焦虑
vocabulary.context: Gilmore organized black women to sell pound cakes and sweet potato pies, fried fish and stewed greens, pork chops and rice at beauty salons, cab stands and churches.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 吉尔摩组织黑人妇女在美容院、出租车站和教堂出售磅蛋糕和红薯馅饼、炸鱼和炖菜、猪排和米饭

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 逐出, 赶出, 驱逐；[法] 逐出, 驱逐, 没收
vocabulary.context: "She offered these women, many of whose grandmothers were born into slavery, a way to contribute to the cause that would not raise suspicions of white employers who might fire them from their jobs, or white landowners who might evict them from the houses they rented," Edge says.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "她为这些妇女（其中许多祖母出生于奴隶制）提供了一种为这一事业做出贡献的方式，这种方式不会引起白人雇主的怀疑，因为他们可能会解雇她们，也不会引起白人土地所有者的怀疑，因为她们可能会将她们从租来的房子里驱逐出去，"埃奇说

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 起诉, 控告, 指控；[法] 控告, 揭发, 对...起诉
vocabulary.context: In February 1956, a Montgomery County grand jury indicted King and dozens of other boycott leaders for unlawful conspiracy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1956年2月，蒙哥马利县大陪审团以非法阴谋罪起诉金和其他数十名抵制活动领导人

vocabulary.definition: n. 同谋, 阴谋, 阴谋集团；[法] 阴谋, 通谋, 共谋
vocabulary.context: In February 1956, a Montgomery County grand jury indicted King and dozens of other boycott leaders for unlawful conspiracy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1956年2月，蒙哥马利县大陪审团以非法阴谋罪起诉金和其他数十名抵制活动领导人

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 告发, 抨击, 谴责；[法] 谴责, 斥责, 告发
vocabulary.context: She fearlessly denounced the white bus driver who had kicked her off a city bus from the witness stand.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她无所畏惧地谴责了将她从证人席上踢下城市公交车的白人公交车司机

vocabulary.definition: n. 离心机；v.t. 使受离心作用, 用离心机分离
vocabulary.context: He could tell their ages and their sizes by the sound of their numerous feet over the summer grass and on the lined pavement, and over the asphalt street, and picking through the cluttered bricks to where his car hung half into the night sky, still spinning its wheels with a senseless centrifuge.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他可以通过他们无数的脚踩在夏日草地上、踩在人行道上、踩在柏油路上、穿过杂乱的砖块的声音来判断他们的年龄和体型，他的汽车半悬在夜空中，车轮仍然在毫无意义的离心机上旋转

vocabulary.definition: adv. 酒醉地, 常喝醉地
vocabulary.context: He fell out upon the pavement drunkenly and lay, ear to the asphalt, listening to them coming.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他醉醺醺地倒在人行道上，侧耳倾听着他们走过来的声音

vocabulary.definition: adj. 机器制的, 固定型式的, 千篇一律的；[机] 机械制作的
vocabulary.context: They were far worse than this machine-made thing that happened to him now.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们比现在发生在他身上的这件机器制造的事情要糟糕得多

vocabulary.definition: n. 出租马车车夫; 出租汽车司机
vocabulary.context: The cabbie looked back.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 出租车司机回头看了一眼

vocabulary.definition: adj. 很难的, 很大的
vocabulary.context: This is one helluva town to drive in.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是一座非常适合驾车前往的小镇

vocabulary.definition: n. 冲动, 冲击, 原动力, 推动；[医] 冲动, 癖
vocabulary.context: Curiously distant, Spallner looked upon the scene as an explosion in reverse, the fragments of the detonation sucked back to the point of impulsion.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 奇怪的是，斯帕尔纳在遥远的地方将现场视为一场反向爆炸，爆炸的碎片被吸回了冲击点

vocabulary.definition: n. 电动（汽）车
vocabulary.context: "Clippings of motor-car crackups, and photos.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "汽车事故的剪报和照片

vocabulary.definition: n. 输弹机, 死板的人；adj. 笔直的, 生硬的
vocabulary.context: They straightened him out into a ramrod of agony.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们把他拉直，让他陷入极度痛苦之中

vocabulary.definition: adj. 奶油色的, 淡黄色的, 米色的
vocabulary.context: A truck and a cream-colored Cadillac.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一辆卡车和一辆米色凯迪拉克

vocabulary.definition: adj. 肉体的, 肉欲的；[医] 肉的, 肉欲的
vocabulary.context: "These people-mightn't they be thrill-hunters, perverted sensationalists with a carnal lust for blood and morbidity?"
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "这些人--难道他们不是寻求刺激的人，是对血腥和病态有着肉欲欲望的变态煽情主义者吗？"

vocabulary.definition: n. 洗衣女工
vocabulary.context: This time, Bogan wouldn't let him out of her sight; she joined the regiment as a laundress, earning a wage and rations from the army.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这一次，博根不会让他离开她的视线；她加入军团担任洗衣女工，从军队赚取工资和口粮

vocabulary.definition: adv. 薄地; 细地; 空洞无物地; 无关紧要地
vocabulary.context: Kentucky stayed pro-slavery and pro-Union during the Civil War, the latter somewhat tenuously.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 肯塔基州在内战期间仍然支持奴隶制和支持联邦，但后者有些脆弱

vocabulary.definition: n. 奴役人者, 征服者
vocabulary.context: Edward Whitehurst had been "self-hired" for some time, meaning his enslaver let him lease himself to others, an arrangement that left Whitehurst with a portion of the rental fee.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 爱德华·怀特赫斯特已经"自雇"了一段时间，这意味着他的奴隶主让他将自己出租给其他人，这种安排让怀特赫斯特获得了一部分租金

vocabulary.definition: n. 逃亡者, 逃避者；[法] 脱逃者
vocabulary.context: But then the fort got a new commander, who wasn't interested in paying or feeding them and didn't mind returning escapees to their enslavers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但后来堡垒有了一位新指挥官，他对支付或喂养他们不感兴趣，也不介意将逃亡者送回他们的奴隶手中

vocabulary.definition: n. 支持奴隶制度
vocabulary.context: White observers could make sure he wasn't straying from their proslavery version of Christianity, where enslavement was sanctioned by God, and submission to a "master" would bring contentment.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 白人观察家可以确保他没有偏离他们的支持奴隶制的基督教版本，在基督教中，奴役是受到上帝认可的，服从"主人"会带来满足

vocabulary.definition: n. 桎梏, 束缚物；v.t. 加枷锁, 束缚
vocabulary.context: When President Abraham Lincoln issued the Emancipation Proclamation, the clouds did not part, the sun did not shine beams of freedom, and the shackles of slavery locked for nearly 250 years did not magically fall away.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当亚伯拉罕·林肯总统发布《解放奴隶宣言》时，乌云并未散去，阳光并未普照自由的光芒，锁定了近250年的奴隶制枷锁也并未神奇地消失

vocabulary.definition: adj. 反复无常的, 多变的, 任性的
vocabulary.context: But while they no longer had enslavers, they were still vulnerable to the capricious whims of Union officials.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 虽然他们不再有奴隶主，但他们仍然容易受到联邦官员反复无常的影响

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 释放, 解放
vocabulary.context: Many ran across Union lines and emancipated themselves, flooding into hastily constructed "contraband" camps.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 许多人越过联邦防线并解放自己，涌入仓促建造的"走私"营地

vocabulary.definition: n. 男管家, 司膳总管
vocabulary.context: Benjamin Butler, made an unprecedented order: Since Virginians claimed to be citizens of another country, Americans were under no obligation to abide by the Fugitive Slave Act and return runaways.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 本杰明·巴特勒颁布了一项史无前例的命令：由于弗吉尼亚人声称自己是另一个国家的公民，美国人没有义务遵守《逃亡奴隶法》并遣返逃亡者

vocabulary.definition: adj. 趋集于一点的, 会聚性的, 收敛的；[医] 会聚的, 集合的
vocabulary.context: Our convergent territories meet
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们的融合领土相遇

vocabulary.definition: adj. 波动的, 起伏的；v.i. 波动, 起伏, 呈波浪形；v.t. 使起伏, 使波动
vocabulary.context: In weightless, undulating flight
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在失重、起伏的飞行中

vocabulary.definition: n. 光亮度, (颜色的)浅淡, 轻率, 轻佻, 轻浮, 轻盈, 轻松, 轻巧, 精巧, 优美；[计] 亮度
vocabulary.context: The butterfly seeks safety in lightness
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 蝴蝶在轻盈中寻求安全

vocabulary.definition: n. 十字路口, 交叉路口, 聚会的中心地点, (喻)需作抉择的重要关头, 紧要关头
vocabulary.context: But at a crossroads where mottled light
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但在十字路口，斑驳的光芒

vocabulary.definition: adj. 性急的, 仓促的, 无礼的, 傲慢的；n. 胃灼热, 骤雨, 碎石堆
vocabulary.context: From trees falls on a brash new highway
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 从树上掉到一条崭新的高速公路上

vocabulary.definition: n. 硅；[化] 硅Si
vocabulary.context: Upon my hard silicon shield.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在我的硬硅盾上

vocabulary.definition: n. 盾, 防卫物, 保护者, 屏蔽；v.t. 保护, 遮蔽, 屏蔽, 庇护, 挡开, 避开；v.i. 起保护作用
vocabulary.context: Upon my hard silicon shield.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在我的硬硅盾上

vocabulary.definition: n. 牺牲, 供奉, 祭品；v.t. 牺牲, 祭祀, 贱卖；v.i. 献祭
vocabulary.context: Itself in bright yellow sacrifice
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 本身是亮黄色的祭品

vocabulary.definition: n. 猛烈, 暴力, 暴虐, 暴行；[法] 暴行, 暴力, 暴乱
vocabulary.context: Speed is violence
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 速度就是暴力

vocabulary.definition: n. 兴奋, 陶醉, 陶醉感；[医] 精神愉快, 欣快
vocabulary.context: a euphoria of flowers so we might
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 鲜花的欣快感，所以我们可能

vocabulary.definition: n. [动]袋狼
vocabulary.context: the golden toad, the thylacine and all variations
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 金蟾蜍、袋狼和所有变种

vocabulary.definition: n. 苯；[化] 苯
vocabulary.context: but benzene, mercury, the stomachs
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但苯、汞、胃

vocabulary.definition: n. 鱼叉；v.t. 用鱼叉叉, 用鱼叉捕获
vocabulary.context: of whale harpooned or hacked into extinction.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 鲸鱼被鱼叉刺伤或砍死而灭绝

vocabulary.definition: n. 勺子, 长柄勺；v.t. 以勺舀取, 以勺掬, 不分对象予以赠送
vocabulary.context: of scorpion outlines and upside-down ladles.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 蝎子轮廓和倒置的勺子

vocabulary.definition: n. 蝎子, 心黑的人, 蝎尾鞭；[医] 蝎
vocabulary.context: of scorpion outlines and upside-down ladles.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 蝎子轮廓和倒置的勺子

vocabulary.definition: n. 硫, 硫磺；v.t. 用硫磺处理
vocabulary.context: I'm saying, it wasn't all lead paint and sulfur dioxide.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我是说，并不全是含铅油漆和二氧化硫

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 注视, 沉思, 盘算；v.i. 冥思苦想
vocabulary.context: contemplate the great mysteries and finally ask,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 思考伟大的奥秘，最后问，

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有能力的, 能的, 能干的
vocabulary.context: You probably doubt that we were capable of joy,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你可能怀疑我们是否有能力快乐，

vocabulary.definition: n. 苦恼, 折磨, 苦恼的事由
vocabulary.context: An imperial affliction
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 帝国的苦难

vocabulary.definition: n. 意义, 含义, 目的, 意图；adj. 意味深长的
vocabulary.context: Where the Meanings, are -
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 其含义是 -

vocabulary.definition: n. 大教堂
vocabulary.context: Of Cathedral Tunes -
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大教堂曲调 -

vocabulary.definition: n. 歌曲, 主旋律, 心情, 声调, 和谐, 一致, 语调, 程度；v.t. 为...调音, 调整, 调谐, 使一致；v.i. 协调, 调谐
vocabulary.context: Of Cathedral Tunes -
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大教堂曲调 -

vocabulary.definition: adj. 天上的, 神圣的, 天国似的
vocabulary.context: Heavenly Hurt, it gives us -
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 天伤，它给我们--

vocabulary.definition: adj. 帝王的, 宗主国的, 至尊的, 壮丽的；n. 特等品
vocabulary.context: An imperial affliction
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 帝国的苦难

vocabulary.definition: adj. 内在的, 国内的；[医] 内的, 内部的
vocabulary.context: But internal difference,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但是内部差异，

vocabulary.definition: n. 不同, 差异；[计] 差分
vocabulary.context: But internal difference,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但是内部差异，

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 教, 讲授, 教导, 教育；v.i. 教书, 教学, 可以教
vocabulary.context: None may teach it - Any -
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 没有人可以教它 - 任何 -

vocabulary.definition: adj. 漫无目的的；无目标的；无计划的
vocabulary.context: But he felt the steady pressure of the wind, moving between his face and the blank wall, snatch up his cries as he uttered them, and he knew they must sound directionless and distant.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但他感觉到风的稳定压力，在他的脸和空白的墙壁之间移动，在他发出声音时抢走了他的哭声，他知道它们听起来一定是没有方向和遥远的

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不恰当地, 不合适地; 不相关地
vocabulary.context: It occurred to him irrelevantly that his death on the sidewalk below would be an eternal mystery; the window closed - why, how, and from where could he have fallen?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他突然想到，他在下面人行道上的死亡将是一个永恒的谜；窗户关着--他为什么、怎么、从哪里掉下来的？

vocabulary.definition: adj. 电影的
vocabulary.context: Eyes squeezed shut, he watched scenes in his mind like scraps of motion-picture film - he could not stop them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他紧紧闭上眼睛，脑海中的场景就像电影胶片的片段一样--他无法阻止它们

vocabulary.definition: n. 纸板火柴
vocabulary.context: He didn't dare let go of the casing with both hands but, with the twist of paper in his teeth, he opened the matchbook with his free hand; then he bent one of the matches in two without tearing it from the folder, its red tipped end now touching the striking surface.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他双手不敢放开盒子，只是用牙齿咬住纸，用空着的那只手打开了火柴盒；然后他把一根火柴弯成了两半，但没有把它从文件夹上撕下来，它的红色尖端现在接触到了撞击的表面

vocabulary.definition: adv. bloodless的变形
vocabulary.context: His elbow protruding over Lexington Avenue far below, the fingers of his other hand pressed down bloodlessly tight against the narrow stripping, he waited, feeling the sick tenseness and terrible excitement building.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的肘部伸到列克星敦大道上远远低于下面的地方，另一只手的手指毫无血色地紧紧地压在狭窄的地带上，他等待着，感到病态的紧张和可怕的兴奋正在积聚

vocabulary.definition: n. 熟练；灵巧；敏捷
vocabulary.context: The strength was gone from his legs; his shivering hands - numb, cold, and desperately rigid - had lost all deftness; his easy ability to move and balance was gone.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的双腿失去了力量；他颤抖的双手--麻木、冰冷、极其僵硬--已经失去了所有的灵巧。他轻松移动和平衡的能力消失了

vocabulary.definition: n. 小圈, 小的环, 环形饰物；[医] 小环
vocabulary.context: He got up, shoving his hands into the back pockets of his gray wash slacks, stepped to the living-room window beside the desk, and stood breathing on the glass, watching the expanding circlet of mist, staring down through the autumn night at Lexington Avenue, eleven stories below.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他站起身来，把手插进灰色水洗休闲裤的后袋里，走到书桌旁边的起居室窗户前，站在玻璃上呼吸，看着不断扩大的雾气，透过秋夜凝视着十一层楼下的列克星敦大道

vocabulary.definition: n. 前门
vocabulary.context: He walked to the front-door closet to help her with her coat.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他走到前门衣柜前帮她拿外套

vocabulary.definition: n. 夹大衣
vocabulary.context: There he got out his topcoat and hat and, without waiting to put them on, opened the front door and stepped out, to go find his wife.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在那里，他拿出大衣和帽子，没等穿上，就打开前门走了出去，去找他的妻子

vocabulary.definition: n. 一种书桌, 两用沙发
vocabulary.context: Dropping his palms to the sill, he stared into his living room - at the red-brown davenport across the room, and a magazine he had left there; at the pictures on the walls and the gray rug; the entrance to the hallway; and at his papers, typewriter, and desk, not two feet from his nose.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他把手掌放在窗台上，凝视着客厅--房间对面的红棕色长沙发，还有一本他留在那儿的杂志；看着墙上的画和灰色的地毯；走廊的入口；他的文件、打字机和书桌距离他的鼻子不到两英尺

vocabulary.definition: adj. 极著名的；十分熟悉的
vocabulary.context: It only sometimes intersects with better-known tales of how white women campaigned for their political rights.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它只是有时与白人妇女如何争取政治权利的更为人所知的故事相交叉

vocabulary.definition: adj. 虚弱的( feeble的最高级 ); 无效的; 缺乏决心的; 无力的
vocabulary.context: Watkins Harper was in the end a political visionary: "We are all bound up in one great bundle of humanity, and society cannot trample on the weakest and feeblest of its members without receiving the curse of its own soul." She demanded that black women be included as part of "one great privileged nation." This was the purpose of the ballot.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 沃特金斯·哈珀最终是一位政治远见者："我们都被束缚在一个伟大的人类之中，社会不能践踏其成员中最弱小和最软弱的人，而不会受到自己灵魂的诅咒。"她要求将黑人妇女纳入"一个伟大的特权国家"的一部分。这就是投票的目的

vocabulary.definition: adv. 继续存在; 前进; 不间断地
vocabulary.context: Now, she and other black women activists were joining forces to tackle national problems under the motto "lifting as we climb." It was the "woman's era," though not because black women were adopting a single issue or focus in their on-going campaign for rights.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 现在，她和其他黑人女性活动家正在联手解决国家问题，座右铭是"在我们攀登时举起重担"。这是"女性时代"，尽管这并不是因为黑人女性在持续的权利运动中只关注单一问题或焦点

vocabulary.definition: n. 底切, 牛腰部下侧嫩肉, 下口, 下旋削球；v.t. 廉价出售, 底切, 雕出, 下旋削球；v.i. 切除底部
vocabulary.context: The rift divided long-standing allies and undercut the possibility for the sort of coalition of which Watkins Harper spoke.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这种裂痕使长期盟友分裂，并削弱了沃特金斯·哈珀所说的那种联盟的可能性

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 从事选举活动；n. 从事选举活动的人
vocabulary.context: What is certain is how through their clubs and their churches, black women then became party activists: rallying, marching, vetting candidates, electioneering, voting and even running for local office.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 可以肯定的是，黑人女性如何通过她们的俱乐部和教堂成为政党积极分子：集会、游行、审查候选人、竞选、投票，甚至竞选地方公职

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 贯穿, 横穿；v.i. 交错, 相交
vocabulary.context: It only sometimes intersects with better-known tales of how white women campaigned for their political rights.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它只是有时与白人妇女如何争取政治权利的更为人所知的故事相交叉

vocabulary.definition: n. 牧师
vocabulary.context: In 1895, she was among the leaders at the founding of the National Conference of Colored Women, serving as chaplain.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1895年，她是全国有色妇女会议成立的领导人之一，并担任牧师

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不疲倦的, 不懈的, 不屈不挠的
vocabulary.context: churchwomen, insisting at the conclusion of the Declaration of Sentiments: "that the speedy success of our cause depends upon the zealous and untiring efforts of both men and women, for the overthrow of the monopoly of the pulpit...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 女教士们在《情感宣言》的结论中坚称："我们事业的迅速成功取决于男女双方的热心和不懈努力，以推翻讲坛的垄断......
