vocabulary.context: As in a season of autumn.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如同秋天的季节

vocabulary.definition: n. 军人, 士兵, 兵蚁；v.i. 从军, 尽职, 偷懒, 磨洋工
vocabulary.context: The soldier falls.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 士兵倒下了

vocabulary.definition: n. 统治地位, 统治权；[法] 统治权, 统治地位及职权
vocabulary.context: Usually this is a physical reward, anything ranging from treasure, a prince or princess, to even the rulership of a kingdom.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 通常这是物质奖励，范围从宝藏、王子或公主，甚至是一个王国的统治权

vocabulary.definition: n. 引人入胜的著作
vocabulary.context: It's a page-turner; there are obstacles at every stage and crucial choices that characters have to make in order to overcome these obstacles.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是一本引人入胜的书；每个阶段都会遇到障碍，为了克服这些障碍，角色必须做出关键的选择

vocabulary.definition: n. 书店
vocabulary.context: There are so many for us to choose from - in libraries, in bookshops, and on our screens - and each story seems new and exciting.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有太多的故事可供我们选择--在图书馆、书店和我们的屏幕上--而且每个故事似乎都是新的和令人兴奋的

vocabulary.definition: n. 文体学家, 时装设计师
vocabulary.context: Cinna, her stylist and only friend in the Capitol, encourages Katniss and helps her win over the audience in her interviews.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 西纳是她的造型师，也是她在国会大厦唯一的朋友，她鼓励凯特尼斯，并帮助她在采访中赢得观众的支持

vocabulary.definition: adv. 通俗地, 平易地, 通过民众
vocabulary.context: Today, this story structure is popularly known as "The Hero's Journey." Stories that use this structure loosely follow a similar series of general events, otherwise known as plot points.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如今，这个故事结构被俗称为"英雄之旅"。使用这种结构的故事松散地遵循一系列类似的一般事件，也称为情节点

vocabulary.definition: n. 不安全, 不安全感；[医] 不安全感, 无保障
vocabulary.context: According to Campbell's formula, midway through the story, the hero will face their hardest test yet, a test that will make them confront their greatest fear or insecurity.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 根据坎贝尔的公式，在故事进行到一半时，英雄将面临迄今为止最艰难的考验，这个考验将使他们面对最大的恐惧或不安全感

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使贫穷, 耗尽...的力气
vocabulary.context: Her "Ordinary World" is in District 12, an impoverished region in the fictional country of Panem where she lives with her mother and little sister, Prim.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她的《平凡的世界》位于虚构国家施惠国的第 12 区，她与母亲和妹妹普里姆住在那里

vocabulary.definition: n. 不满
vocabulary.context: The story may or may not have a happy ending, but a lot of the tension or discontent they felt has now been resolved because of what they accomplished on their journey.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这个故事可能有也可能没有幸福的结局，但由于他们在旅途中所取得的成就，他们感受到的许多紧张或不满现在已经得到解决

vocabulary.definition: adj. 自动的；[医] 自体动作的, 随意运动的
vocabulary.context: To test this hypothesis, he designed an experiment which made use of the autokinetic effect.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为了检验这个假设，他设计了一个利用自动运动效应的实验

vocabulary.definition: n. 成为主观, 内在化
vocabulary.context: The third type of conformity, internalization, is when a person has actually absorbed a group's belief system and sees it as truly their own, both publicly and privately.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第三种类型的从众，即内化，是指一个人实际上吸收了一个群体的信仰体系，并将其视为真正属于自己的信仰体系，无论是公开的还是私下的

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 脱离, 偏离；v.t. 使偏离；adj. 脱离常规的；n. 脱离常规的人
vocabulary.context: The need to be accepted and the fear of punishment for deviating from group norms can, in many cases, impel people to adopt negative attitudes or behaviors.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在许多情况下，被接受的需要和对偏离群体规范而受到惩罚的恐惧可能会促使人们采取消极的态度或行为

vocabulary.definition: n. 露宿者；[化] 异常值
vocabulary.context: Few people desire to be an "outlier" whose opinion differs widely from what is typical in the group.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 很少有人愿意成为一个"局外人"，其观点与群体中的典型观点有很大不同

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不动的, 静止的, 不变的, 固定的, 停留的；[计] 定常, 定态, 固定的
vocabulary.context: When a person is placed in a dark room that contains only a single small, stationary pinpoint of light, these eye movements produce an unusual effect: they make the point of light appear to move.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当一个人被放置在一个只包含一个小而静止的光点的暗室中时，这些眼球运动会产生一种不寻常的效果：它们使光点看起来在移动

vocabulary.definition: n. 含蓄, 内涵
vocabulary.context: Although the word often has a negative connotation, conformity is not necessarily a bad thing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 虽然这个词常常带有负面含义，但从众并不一定是坏事

vocabulary.definition: n. 个性, 个人, 特征
vocabulary.context: Sherif concluded that this experiment demonstrated the way a norm develops in society, and how people tend to give up their individuality in order to conform to that norm.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 谢里夫得出的结论是，这个实验展示了社会规范的发展方式，以及人们如何为了遵守该规范而倾向于放弃自己的个性

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 推动, 激励, 驱使, 迫使
vocabulary.context: The need to be accepted and the fear of punishment for deviating from group norms can, in many cases, impel people to adopt negative attitudes or behaviors.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在许多情况下，被接受的需要和对偏离群体规范而受到惩罚的恐惧可能会促使人们采取消极的态度或行为

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 与群体不同会带来被社会排斥的风险，这是许多人深深的恐惧

vocabulary.context: The road leading to the village is lined with cow dung pies drying in the sun, a serene if jarring scene that lends a 19th-century feel.

vocabulary.definition: adv. 坚持地, 强求地

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 库珀坚持不懈地努力确保她的学生拥有以学术为重点的课程，使其能够与最好的白人私立学校相媲美

vocabulary.contextTranslation: （她的法语论文是关于海地叛乱后对奴隶制的态度。）

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 给...穿衣, 盖上, 赋予

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 华盛顿一直意识到奴隶制最近才结束，因此希望将注意力集中在另外 90% 的人身上，他们需要工作来养家糊口

vocabulary.definition: adv. 雄伟地；壮丽地；上等地；庄重地

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 源源不断的优秀学生从这所学校涌出，这很大程度上归功于一位教育家的远见卓识

vocabulary.context: But if it had to perish twice,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但如果它必须灭亡两次，

vocabulary.context: From what I've tasted of desire

vocabulary.definition: n. 纯粹主义者

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 种族纯粹主义者担心这些新血液最终汇集的遗传结果

vocabulary.definition: n. 被包围的领土；[医] 被包围物
vocabulary.context: Once the trend was established, letters from America from friends and family beckoned new immigrants to ethnic enclaves such as Chinatown, Greektown, or Little Italy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一旦这种趋势形成，来自美国的朋友和家人的来信就会吸引新移民来到唐人街、希腊城或小意大利等少数民族聚居地

vocabulary.definition: n. 无政府主义者；[法] 无政府主义者
vocabulary.context: Criminals, contract workers, the mentally ill, anarchists, and alcoholics were among groups to be gradually barred from entry by Congress.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 罪犯、合同工、精神病患者、无政府主义者和酗酒者等群体逐渐被国会禁止入境

vocabulary.definition: n. 拼缝物, 拼凑物
vocabulary.context: This led to an urban ethnic patchwork, with little integration.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这导致了城市民族的杂乱无章，几乎没有融合

vocabulary.definition: n. 平民, 大众, 人口
vocabulary.context: But during the New Immigration boom, although those groups would continue to come, even greater ethnic diversity would grace America's populace.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但在新移民热潮期间，尽管这些群体会继续涌入，但更大的种族多样性将使美国民众受益

vocabulary.definition: adj. 荒芜的, 疲惫的
vocabulary.context: Most of the newcomers lived in run-down and overcrowded apartment buildings, called tenements, until they could save enough money for an upward move.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大多数新移民住在破旧和拥挤的公寓楼里，称为公寓，直到他们攒够了钱向上搬迁

vocabulary.definition: adj. 穷困的, 缺乏的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 镀金的, 有钱的, 装饰的；gild的过去式和过去分词

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在镀金时代乘船到达的后来的群体几乎没有这些特征

vocabulary.definition: n. 精神分裂症；[医] 精神分裂症

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 克拉克：法官一口气说他患有精神分裂症，犯罪时他患有精神病且有妄想症，但他知道自己在做什么

vocabulary.definition: adj. 精神病的；n. 精神病患者
vocabulary.context: Defense and prosecution psychiatrists agree that Eric was a paranoid schizophrenic, that he was psychotic and suffering from delusions immediately before and after the crime.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 辩方和控方精神病学家一致认为埃里克是一名偏执型精神分裂症患者，他在犯罪前后立即患有精神病并患有妄想症

vocabulary.definition: adj. (似)患妄想狂的, (似)患偏执狂的；n. 患妄想狂的人
vocabulary.context: Defense and prosecution psychiatrists agree that Eric was a paranoid schizophrenic, that he was psychotic and suffering from delusions immediately before and after the crime.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 辩方和控方精神病学家一致认为埃里克是一名偏执型精神分裂症患者，他在犯罪前后立即患有精神病并患有妄想症

vocabulary.definition: conj. 尽管, 虽然

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 戈达德：法官仍然相信有一些迹象，尽管可能很小，他知道自己做错了事

vocabulary.context: He'd been on the force for four years, was the father of one child with another on the way, and was known as a caring policeman who chopped firewood for the handicapped.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他已经入伍四年了，是一个孩子的父亲，另一个孩子即将出生，并被称为一位为残疾人砍柴的爱心警察

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 根据最高法院的裁决方式，美国一些最严格的法律可能会面临危险

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但他近三年没有受审，因为他被判定无能力受审

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 亚利桑那州一名男子杀害了一名警察，他的父母希望他们的儿子被判有罪，但他精神错乱

vocabulary.context: But this is all my starving sight decries -

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 六月下旬的一个下雨周末，大约 200 名其他难民及其家人，加上一些在营地工作的陆军预备役军人和志愿者，聚集在那里，举行 40 周年纪念聚会

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对于其他人来说，它带来了结束，或者让他们焕然一新，回到了过去的生活。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 自治

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 早些时候通过的应急管理法将弗林特饮用水的来源和方式的决定权交给了财务经理，这隐含着这样一个假设：黑人占多数的城市和社区没有能力自治

vocabulary.definition: adj. 脱色的, 污染的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 自从 2014 年弗林特居民开始对自家水龙头流出的水变色、有异味表示担忧以来，该市和州在与城市居民的沟通方面做得很差劲，有时否认存在问题，并与家长、社区发生争执......

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使振作, 激励；v.i. 振作

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 令人振奋的是，人们关心并开始围绕"最低生活质量是一项基本权利"的理念

vocabulary.definition: n. 肥皂泡；v.t. 涂以肥皂泡

vocabulary.contextTranslation: （在家里，我在浴室的水槽上放了一杯过滤水。）当我洗澡时，水很软，我的肥皂很快就起泡沫了

vocabulary.definition: adv. 贪食地, 贪婪地

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第二天早上，我从她厨房的水槽里倒了一杯水，狼吞虎咽地喝了起来

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无能力的, 不能的；[机] 不能行的, 耐不住的
vocabulary.context: The emergency management laws passed earlier, which put decisions about where and how to source Flint's drinking water in the hands of a financial manager, carried the implicit assumption that majority-black cities and neighborhoods were incapable of self-governance.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 早些时候通过的应急管理法将弗林特饮用水的来源和方式的决定权交给了财务经理，这隐含着这样一个假设：黑人占多数的城市和社区没有能力自治

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当我们审视不同时期的阅读乐趣时，iGen 的阅读量明显低于前几代人

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 从 20 世纪 70 年代末到 2000 年代中期，看电影同样受欢迎，这表明百视达视频和录像机并没有阻止看电影

vocabulary.definition: n. 一群；步兵大队；支持者；共同特点的一群人

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，这并不能告诉我们当人们花在数字媒体上的时间不断增加时，整个群体会发生什么

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 那么我们是否应该从 iGen 手中夺取智能手机并用纸质书代替呢？

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 与几十年前的青少年相比，他们与书籍和电影等传统媒体的互动方式有着根本的不同

vocabulary.definition: adj. 过度的, 过多的, 极端的；[法] 过度的, 过分的, 额外的
vocabulary.context: Data connecting excessive digital media time to mental health issues suggests a limit of two hours a day of free time spent with screens, a restriction that will also allow time for other activities - like going to the movies with friends or reading.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 将过多的数字媒体时间与心理健康问题联系起来的数据表明，每天花在屏幕上的空闲时间限制为两个小时，这一限制也将允许有时间进行其他活动，例如与朋友一起去看电影或阅读

vocabulary.definition: adj. 人类中心说的；[医] 人类中心的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对于一种以控制需求和人类明显命运的深刻人类中心思想为中心的文化来说，这一概念的吸引力是显而易见的

It responded to the dehumanizing impact of mass industry, the rationalization of nature and the increasing emphasis on human reason, with a defense of an emotional,...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 十九世纪上半叶蓬勃发展的浪漫主义运动是对十八世纪"启蒙运动"功利主义的反应。它回应了大众工业的非人性影响、自然的合理化和对人类理性的日益重视，并捍卫了情感、......

vocabulary.definition: adj. 精神病的, 精神变态的；n. 精神变态者, 精神病患者
vocabulary.context: The logic verges on the psychopathic: We have now wrecked this planet beyond the point of no return; there are too many people here, our political systems are unable to contain our technological or economic ambitions, and individual greed and desire is running out of control.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这个逻辑近乎精神病态：我们现在已经把这个星球毁坏到了无法挽回的地步；这里的人太多了，我们的政治制度无法遏制我们的技术或经济野心，个人的贪婪和欲望正在失控

vocabulary.definition: n. 乌托邦思想, 空想的社会改良方案

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 还有更多的技术乌托邦主义可以添加到这个列表中：例如，新环保主义者正在进行的利用生物技术来重建灭绝物种的运动

vocabulary.definition: adj. 反对资本主义的；n. 反对资本主义的人

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这本质上是基督教对堕落的叙述，为反资本主义时代而重新设计，并且具有同样的原始吸引力

vocabulary.definition: adj. (先进)技术工业的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 也许，技术工业社会因其自身坚不可摧的感觉而大肆宣传，到处都碰壁，并且没有智力或精神装备来处理由此产生的混乱

vocabulary.definition: adj. 未工业化的, 工业化前的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 例如，有人将农村社区和低技术文化理想化，却不了解前工业化生活的严酷和恐怖

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 虽然它在今天也许是通过华兹华斯的诗歌或德国风景画家的艺术而闻名，但在当时，它同样与激进的政治以及对唯物主义和科学主义教条的攻击深深地交织在一起

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为什么犹太人民，当我们发现残酷的程度和仇恨的后果时，为什么我们没有被一种非同寻常的、无法平息的愤怒所占据--凶手的愤怒？对那些启发凶手的人感到愤怒；对冷漠的人--那些知道但保持沉默的人感到愤怒吗？

vocabulary.definition: n. 项链, 皮围巾

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她迅速解开项链；很快，看也不看，就把它放进去

vocabulary.definition: adj. (像)长笛声的, 柔和而清澈的
vocabulary.context: Now there came a little "flutey" bit - very pretty!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 现在出现了一点"笛声"--非常漂亮！

vocabulary.definition: adj. 华美的, 快乐的
vocabulary.context: And the band sounded louder and gayer.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 乐队听起来更响亮、更快乐

vocabulary.definition: adv. 快乐地；华美地
vocabulary.context: And the band changed again and played more quickly, more gayly than ever, and the old couple on Miss Brill's seat got up and marched away, and such a funny old man with long whiskers hobbled along in time to the music and was nearly knocked over by four girls walking abreast.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 乐队又换了，演奏得比以前更快、更欢快，布里尔小姐座位上的那对老夫妇站起来大步走开，这样一个滑稽的留着长胡子的老人随着音乐一瘸一拐地走着，差点被四个并排走的女孩撞倒

vocabulary.definition: n. 手杖
vocabulary.context: Only two people shared her "special" seat: a fine old man in a velvet coat, his hands clasped over a huge carved walking-stick, and a big old woman, sitting upright, with a roll of knitting on her embroidered apron.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 只有两个人坐在她的"特殊"座位上：一位身着天鹅绒大衣、双手握着一根巨大的雕花手杖的帅气老人，和一位身材高大的老妇人，端正地坐着，绣花围裙上系着一卷毛衣

vocabulary.definition: n. 忘我；无私
vocabulary.context: Remember, however, that pure altruism involves true selflessness.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，请记住，纯粹的利他主义意味着真正的无私

vocabulary.definition: adj. 亲社会的,忠实(或拘泥)于既定社会道德准则的
vocabulary.context: Prosocial Behavior and Altruism
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 亲社会行为和利他主义

vocabulary.definition: n. 改进, 改善, (不动产)增值；[法] 改良, 改善, 地产增值
vocabulary.context: What is it that inspires these individuals to give their time, energy, and money for the betterment of others, even when they receive nothing tangible in return?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 是什么激励这些人付出时间、精力和金钱来改善他人，即使他们没有得到任何有形的回报？

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 回报, 互换, 交换, 报答, 使往复运动；v.i. 往复运动, 回报, 互换, 酬答
vocabulary.context: For example, if your friend loaned you money for lunch a few weeks ago, you'll probably feel compelled to reciprocate when he asks if you if he can borrow $100.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 例如，如果你的朋友几周前借给你午餐钱，当他问你是否可以借 100 美元时，你可能会觉得有必要回报

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使负义务, 强使, 使感激, 施恩惠于；adj. 有责任的, 必须的
vocabulary.context: Altruism is the unselfish concern for other people; doing things simply out of a desire to help, not because you feel obligated to out of duty, loyalty, or religious reasons.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 利他主义是对他人无私的关心；做事只是出于帮助的愿望，而不是因为出于责任、忠诚或宗教原因而感到有义务

vocabulary.definition: n. 给予者, 赠予人
vocabulary.context: Prosocial behavior refers to any action that benefits other people, no matter what the motive or how the giver benefits from the action.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 亲社会行为是指任何有益于他人的行为，无论动机是什么或给予者如何从该行为中受益

vocabulary.definition: adv. 暑热地, 激烈地, 热心地
vocabulary.context: The underlying reasons behind altruism, as well as the question of whether there is truly such a thing as "pure" altruism, are two issues hotly contested by social psychologists.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 利他主义背后的根本原因，以及是否真的存在"纯粹"利他主义的问题，是社会心理学家激烈争论的两个问题

vocabulary.definition: n. 继续, 续集, 补编；[医] 连续
vocabulary.context: The theory suggests that altruism towards close relatives occurs in order to ensure the continuation of shared genes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 该理论表明，对近亲的利他主义是为了确保共享基因的延续

vocabulary.definition: adv. 简洁地, 精练地
vocabulary.context: "Nope," Renee said tersely. She was still mad but didn't want to talk about it. She'd rather make the last hour of their trip from Detroit to Baltimore pleasant. Instead of casting a plastic smile at Rashaun, she focused intently on the darkness, guiding their blue Ford with plates that said "MTRCTY" quietly down I-80.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "不，"蕾妮简洁地说。她仍然很生气，但不想谈论这件事。她宁愿让他们从底特律到巴尔的摩的旅程的最后一个小时变得愉快。她没有对拉肖恩露出假装的微笑，而是全神贯注地看着黑暗，引导着他们的蓝色福特汽车静静地沿着 80 号州际公路行驶，车牌上写着"MTRCTY"

vocabulary.definition: n. 无礼, 傲慢, 活泼, 雅致
vocabulary.context: By the time he is twenty, he is sure to graduate." When questioned as to his attainments, the lad replies without any of that pertness and forwardness which too often characterizes Western youth, but as he has been taught to do, in a bashful and modest manner, and in a way to win at once the good opinion of the stranger.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 到他二十岁的时候，他肯定会毕业。"当被问及他的成就时，这个小伙子的回答没有任何西方年轻人常见的那种正直和率直，而是像他被教导的那样，以一种害羞和谦虚的方式，以一种立即赢得陌生人好感的方式

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对于一些人来说，这意味着"漂绿"，这是一种公关宣传形式，给人一种环境责任的印象

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 人们很容易忘记 1970 年最初的地球日取得了令人瞠目结舌的成功

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 例如，石油巨头 BP（英国石油公司）将自己重塑为 Beyond Petroleum

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 免费手提袋！）他们说，这鼓励了表面上的"更换灯泡"心态，这种心态注重个人责任，而忽视大污染者或动员政治变革

vocabulary.definition: n. 词汇, 词典, 辞典；[计] 辞典

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在聚集在那里的人群面前，她不会屈服；于是，她固执而骄傲地抿紧苍白的嘴唇，领着女神来到一台巨大的织布机前，把自己放在另一台织布机前

vocabulary.definition: n. 欺骗, 欺诈, 诡计；[法] 诡计, 奸计, 诈骗
vocabulary.context: Thus as Athena stepped back a pace to watch Arachne finishing her work, she saw that the maiden had taken for her design a pattern of scenes which showed evil or unworthy actions of the gods, how they had deceived fair maidens, resorted to trickery, and appeared on earth from time to time in the form of poor and humble people.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 因此，当雅典娜退后一步，看着阿拉克涅完成她的工作时，她看到少女为她设计了一个场景模式，展示了众神的邪恶或不值得的行为，他们如何欺骗美丽的少女，诉诸诡计，并时不时地以贫穷和卑微的人的形式出现在地球上

vocabulary.definition: adj. 出身名门的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她的任务是将羊毛纺成细软的线，然后在小屋内的高架织布机上织成布

vocabulary.definition: n. 套索, 束缚, 陷阱；v.t. 用套索捉
vocabulary.context: "I will not live under this insult," she cried, and seizing a rope from the wall, she made a noose and would have hanged herself.

vocabulary.definition: adv. 惊人地；极好地；精彩地
vocabulary.context: All spiders descend from Arachne, and as the Greeks watched them spinning their thread wonderfully fine, they remembered the contest with Athena and thought that it was not right for even the best of men to claim equality with the gods.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 所有的蜘蛛都来自阿拉克涅，当希腊人看着它们纺出的线非常精细时，他们想起了与雅典娜的竞赛，并认为即使是最优秀的人也不能声称与众神平等

Then the Lord relented and did not bring on His people the disaster He had threatened.

vocabulary.contextTranslation: - 在电报员周围堆积的砖块和灰泥堆中，这个故事讲述了降临在旧金山的可怕灾难；一场灾难正在发生，其严重性和规模使得最近的维苏威火山喷发显得微不足道

vocabulary.definition: n. 评价人, 鉴定人, 估价人；[经] 估价者, 鉴定
vocabulary.context: The appraisers' building stands on Washington street, though fire was all around it, and a short distance up the building known as the Washington block withstood the fire under the same conditions.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 估价师的大楼矗立在华盛顿街上，尽管它的周围都着火了，而且不远的地方，被称为华盛顿街区的大楼在相同的条件下也经受住了火灾

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 撤营, 逃走, 逃亡；[法] 撤退, 逃走, 逃亡
vocabulary.context: The Chinese and Japanese population, for the most part, have decamped.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 中国人和日本人大部分已经撤离

vocabulary.definition: v. 给予帮助( succor的过去式和过去分词 )
vocabulary.context: Those who have not reached homes of relatives or friends will be succored well.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 那些没有到达亲友家的人将得到很好的救助

vocabulary.definition: n. 陈尸所；[医] 停尸室
vocabulary.context: At the morgue twenty-five bodies have been received, and the authorities have pressed the Mechanics pavilion and the basement of the Hall of Justice into service as an emergency hospital.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 太平间已收到 25 具尸体，当局已将机械馆和司法厅的地下室改造成紧急医院

vocabulary.definition: n. 劈, 砍, 砍痕, 出租车, 干咳, 晒架, 鹤嘴锄；v.t. 劈, 砍, 出租, 用旧；v.i. 劈, 砍, 干咳, 驾驶出租车；adj. 出租的
vocabulary.context: Three minutes after the awful earthquake the town was a mass of torn streets and the city filled with automobiles and hacks.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 可怕的地震发生三分钟后，这座城镇就变成了一片破烂的街道，城市里充满了汽车和黑客

vocabulary.definition: n. 海塘；防波堤
vocabulary.context: There were several engines and hose wagons lost, along the two sections of the seawall when the fire swept from North Beach.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当大火从北海滩席卷而来时，沿着海堤的两段，有几台发动机和软管车丢失

vocabulary.definition: v. 闲荡, 虚度, 徘徊
vocabulary.context: The few that loiter in the vicinity of their homes are fed in the square, but the majority stampeded to Oakland and huddled into the heathen quarter of that city.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 少数在自家附近闲逛的人在广场上吃饭，但大多数人都涌向奥克兰，挤进该市的异教徒聚居区

vocabulary.definition: n. 楼阁, 亭子, 大帐篷, 观众席；v.t. 置...于亭中, 搭帐篷, 笼罩
vocabulary.context: At the morgue twenty-five bodies have been received, and the authorities have pressed the Mechanics pavilion and the basement of the Hall of Justice into service as an emergency hospital.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 太平间已收到 25 具尸体，当局已将机械馆和司法厅的地下室改造成紧急医院

vocabulary.definition: n. 大火灾, 大火, 冲突；[化] 暴燃; 快速燃烧
vocabulary.context: Conflagration That Has Raged Three Days Is at Last at an End.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 连续三天的大火终于结束了

vocabulary.definition: adv. 吝啬地, 小气地
vocabulary.context: I could cheerfully hope, that those of another age and generation may not feel the effects of those oppressive measures that have been so illiberally dealt out to us; and that peace and happiness may be their reward.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我可以愉快地希望，另一个时代和一代人可能不会感受到那些对我们如此不自由的压迫措施的影响；和平与幸福可能是他们的回报

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 尊敬, 崇敬, 崇拜
vocabulary.context: Here is the land of our progenitors, and here are their bones; they left them as a sacred deposit, and we have been compelled to venerate its trust; it is dear to us, yet we cannot stay, my people are dear to me, with them I must go.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这里是我们祖先的土地，这里是他们的骸骨；他们把它们作为神圣的存款留下来，我们不得不尊重它的信任；它对我们来说很珍贵，但我们不能留下来，我的人民对我来说很珍贵，我必须和他们一起走

vocabulary.definition: n. 炽热, 热诚, 热情, 热烈
vocabulary.context: As east of the Mississippi we have been friends, so west we will cherish the same feelings with additional fervour; and although we may be removed to the desert, still we shall look with fond regard, upon those who have promised us their protection.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 作为密西西比河以东的我们一直是朋友，所以在西边我们将更加热情地珍惜同样的感情；尽管我们可能会被转移到沙漠，但我们仍然会怀着深切的敬意看待那些承诺保护我们的人

vocabulary.definition: n. 不胜任, 不够格, 不合格, 不适合, 无能力, 不熟练, 无资格；[医] 机能不全, 闭锁不全, 关闭不全
vocabulary.context: It is with considerable diffidence that I attempt to address the American people, knowing and feeling sensibly my incompetency; and believing that your highly and well improved minds would not be well entertained by the address of a Choctaw.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我怀着相当大的自信试图向美国人民发表讲话，因为我知道并清楚地感觉到自己的无能。并且相信，乔克托人的演讲不会很好地娱乐你高度发达的头脑

vocabulary.definition: n. 祖先, 先辈, 原本；[医] 祖先, 祖代
vocabulary.context: Here is the land of our progenitors, and here are their bones; they left them as a sacred deposit, and we have been compelled to venerate its trust; it is dear to us, yet we cannot stay, my people are dear to me, with them I must go.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这里是我们祖先的土地，这里是他们的骸骨；他们把它们作为神圣的存款留下来，我们不得不尊重它的信任；它对我们来说很珍贵，但我们不能留下来，我的人民对我来说很珍贵，我必须和他们一起走

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无友人的, 不被当朋友对待的
vocabulary.context: Could I stay and forget them and leave them to struggle alone, unaided, unfriended, and forgotten by our great father?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我可以留下来忘记他们，让他们独自挣扎，无人帮助，没有朋友，被我们伟大的父亲遗忘吗？

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 开动, 驱使, 激励
vocabulary.context: But having determined to emigrate west of the Mississippi river this fall, I have thought proper in bidding you farewell to make a few remarks expressive of my views, and the feelings that actuate me on the subject of our removal.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但是，由于决定今年秋天移民到密西西比河以西，我认为在与您告别时，我想发表一些言论来表达我的观点，以及促使我搬迁的感受

vocabulary.definition: adj. base的变形
vocabulary.context: Amid the gloom and horrors of the present separation, we are cheered with a hope that ere long we shall reach our destined land, and that nothing short of the basest acts of treachery will ever be able to wrest it from us, and that we may live free.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在目前分离的阴郁和恐怖中，我们充满希望，不久我们将到达我们注定的土地，除了最卑鄙的背叛行为之外，没有任何东西能够从我们手中夺走它，我们可以自由地生活

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 暗指, 提及
vocabulary.context: We know that in order to protect the rights and secure the liberties of the people, no government approximates so nearly to perfection as the one to which we have alluded.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们知道，为了保护人民的权利和自由，没有哪个政府比我们所提到的政府更接近完美

vocabulary.definition: n. 无自信, 畏缩, 羞怯
vocabulary.context: It is with considerable diffidence that I attempt to address the American people, knowing and feeling sensibly my incompetency; and believing that your highly and well improved minds would not be well entertained by the address of a Choctaw.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我怀着相当大的自信试图向美国人民发表讲话，因为我知道并清楚地感觉到自己的无能。并且相信，乔克托人的演讲不会很好地娱乐你高度发达的头脑

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不怀好意的, 抱恶意的, 坏心肠的
vocabulary.context: He was not an ill-disposed young man, unless to be rather cold hearted and rather selfish is to be ill-disposed: but he was, in general, well respected; for he conducted himself with propriety in the discharge of his ordinary duties.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他并不是一个脾气不好的年轻人，除非冷酷无情、相当自私就是脾气不好：但总的来说，他很受人尊敬；因为他在履行日常职责时表现得体

vocabulary.definition: n. 轻率, 不小心, 鲁莽的行为
vocabulary.context: Dashwood which must generally have led to imprudence.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Dashwood 这通常会导致轻率

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不得体的, 不合礼节的
vocabulary.context: It gave to his intentions whatever of decision was wanting before; and he finally resolved, that it would be absolutely unnecessary, if not highly indecorous, to do more for the widow and children of his father, than such kind of neighbourly acts as his own wife pointed out.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它满足了他之前想要做出的任何决定；他最终决定，除了他自己的妻子所指出的这种睦邻行为之外，绝对没有必要为他父亲的遗孀和孩子们做更多的事情，即使不是非常不体面

vocabulary.definition: adj. 很有好感的, 心地善良的, 布置得当的
vocabulary.context: Margaret, the other sister, was a good-humored, well-disposed girl; but as she had already imbibed a good deal of Marianne's romance, without having much of her sense, she did not, at 13, bid fair to equal her sisters at a more advanced period of life.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 另一个妹妹玛格丽特是一个脾气很好、脾气很好的女孩；但由于她已经吸收了玛丽安的大量浪漫色彩，但她并没有太多的理智，所以在13岁的时候，她并没有公平地与她晚年的姐妹们相媲美

vocabulary.definition: pron. whoever的宾格
vocabulary.context: Dashwood's situation, with only common feelings, must have been highly unpleasing; - but in HER mind there was a sense of honor so keen, a generosity so romantic, that any offence of the kind, by whomsoever given or received, was to her a source of immovable disgust.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 达什伍德的处境，仅凭一般的感觉，一定是非常不愉快的； --但在她的心里，有一种如此强烈的荣誉感，一种如此浪漫的慷慨，任何这种冒犯，无论是由谁给予或接受的，对她来说都是一种不可动摇的厌恶之源

vocabulary.definition: n. 顾问, 辅导员, 律师
vocabulary.context: Elinor, this eldest daughter, whose advice was so effectual, possessed a strength of understanding, and coolness of judgment, which qualified her, though only nineteen, to be the counsellor of her mother, and enabled her frequently to counteract, to the advantage of them all, that eagerness of mind in Mrs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 埃莉诺，这个大女儿，她的建议非常有效，她具有很强的理解力和冷静的判断力，这使她虽然只有十九岁，却有资格成为她母亲的顾问，并使她能够经常抵制艾莉诺夫人的急切心态，这对他们所有人都有好处

vocabulary.definition: n. 关节, 接合, 连贯, 发音, 表达；[计] 清晰度
vocabulary.context: ...on the affections of his uncle, by such attractions as are by no means unusual in children of two or three years old; an imperfect articulation, an earnest desire of having his own way, many cunning tricks, and a great deal of noise, as to outweigh all the value of all the attention which, for years, he had received from his niece and her...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...对他叔叔的感情，受到这样的吸引力，这在两三岁的孩子中绝非罕见；不完美的表达、一意孤行的热切愿望、许多狡猾的伎俩和大量的噪音，这些都超过了多年来他从他的侄女和她那里得到的所有关注的全部价值......

vocabulary.definition: n. 年金, 年金保险, 年金领受权；[医] 年金, 年俸
vocabulary.context: I have known a great deal of the trouble of annuities; for my mother was clogged with the payment of three to old superannuated servants by my father's will, and it is amazing how disagreeable she found it.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我对年金的麻烦了如指掌。因为根据我父亲的遗嘱，我的母亲被三笔退休的老仆人的工资所困扰，令人惊讶的是她对此感到多么不舒服

vocabulary.definition: adj. 邻人似的, 友好的, 睦邻的
vocabulary.context: It gave to his intentions whatever of decision was wanting before; and he finally resolved, that it would be absolutely unnecessary, if not highly indecorous, to do more for the widow and children of his father, than such kind of neighbourly acts as his own wife pointed out.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它满足了他之前想要做出的任何决定；他最终决定，除了他自己的妻子所指出的这种睦邻行为之外，绝对没有必要为他父亲的遗孀和孩子们做更多的事情，即使不是非常不体面

vocabulary.definition: n. 无教养, 不雅
vocabulary.context: No one could dispute her right to come; the house was her husband's from the moment of his father's decease; but the indelicacy of her conduct was so much the greater, and to a woman in Mrs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 没有人可以质疑她来的权利；从她丈夫父亲去世的那一刻起，这栋房子就属于她丈夫了；但她的行为更加不雅，对于一个女人来说，夫人

vocabulary.definition: n. 先天论者, 乡土主义者, 本土主义者
vocabulary.context: Many Klan members were elected to local, state, and national political offices, where they enforced their white supremacist, nativist viewpoints.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 许多三K党成员被选入地方、州和国家政治职位，在那里他们推行白人至上主义和本土主义观点

vocabulary.definition: adj. 锥形的
vocabulary.context: The Second Klan still wore gowns, this time white robes with masks and tall, cone-shaped hats - clothing inspired by the depiction of the Klan in Griffiths' film.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第二个三K党仍然穿着长袍，这次是戴着面具和高高的锥形帽子的白色长袍--服装的灵感来自于格里菲斯电影中对三K党的描述

vocabulary.definition: n. 至上主义者
vocabulary.context: The KKK was not the only white supremacist group that appeared during Reconstruction, but it was one of the most influential and long-lasting.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 三K党并不是重建期间出现的唯一白人至上主义团体，但它是最有影响力和最持久的团体之一

vocabulary.definition: n. 观点
vocabulary.context: Many Klan members were elected to local, state, and national political offices, where they enforced their white supremacist, nativist viewpoints.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 许多三K党成员被选入地方、州和国家政治职位，在那里他们推行白人至上主义和本土主义观点

vocabulary.definition: n. 至高无上, 霸权地位, 优势, 至上；[法] 至高权力, 无上权力, 霸权
vocabulary.context: The Second Klan kept the overall vision of white American supremacy, but it also added a religious angle.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第二个三K党保留了美国白人至上的总体愿景，但也增加了宗教角度

vocabulary.definition: n. 描写, 叙述
vocabulary.context: The Second Klan still wore gowns, this time white robes with masks and tall, cone-shaped hats - clothing inspired by the depiction of the Klan in Griffiths' film.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第二个三K党仍然穿着长袍，这次是戴着面具和高高的锥形帽子的白色长袍--服装的灵感来自于格里菲斯电影中对三K党的描述

vocabulary.definition: n. 禁令, 禁止
vocabulary.context: They pushed for legal prohibition of alcohol and opposed any non-Protestant immigration from foreign countries.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们推动立法禁止饮酒，并反对任何来自外国的非新教徒移民

vocabulary.definition: n. 扩充, 开展, 膨胀；[计] 扩展
vocabulary.context: When the Civil Rights Movement swept across the nation in the 1950s and 1960s, white members of the Klan opposed the expansion of rights for African Americans.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当民权运动在20世纪50年代和1960年代席卷全国时，三K党的白人成员反对扩大非裔美国人的权利

vocabulary.definition: n. 电讯, 远距离通讯, 无线电通讯；[计] 远程通信, 电信
vocabulary.context: A computer network system is a telecommunications network that allows different computers to connect and share data.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 计算机网络系统是允许不同计算机连接并共享数据的电信网络

vocabulary.definition: n. 多媒体；[计] 多媒体
vocabulary.context: HTML also allows the computer to 'read' images, video, audio, and software components and to display those properly as multimedia on the page.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: HTML 还允许计算机"读取"图像、视频、音频和软件组件，并将它们作为多媒体正确显示在页面上

vocabulary.definition: n. 开本, 版式, 形式, 格式；v.t. 格式化；[计] 格式; DOS外部命令:对磁盘进行格式化
vocabulary.context: Instead, they're written and formatted in Hypertext Markup Language (HTML), which allows the computer to read the text and display it properly.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 相反，它们是用超文本标记语言（HTML）编写和格式化的，它允许计算机读取文本并正确显示它

vocabulary.definition: adj. 线的, 直线的, 线状的；[计] 线性
vocabulary.context: The route the packets take does not have to be linear or straight, and data can be sent to multiple computers and multiple locations at once.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 数据包所采取的路线不必是线性或笔直的，数据可以同时发送到多台计算机和多个位置

vocabulary.definition: adj. 音频的, 声音的；[电] 声频
vocabulary.context: HTML also allows the computer to 'read' images, video, audio, and software components and to display those properly as multimedia on the page.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: HTML 还允许计算机"读取"图像、视频、音频和软件组件，并将它们作为多媒体正确显示在页面上

vocabulary.definition: n. 合作, 勾结；[法] 通敌卖国者, 奸细
vocabulary.context: Bite-sized collaboration is the nature of computer science.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 小型协作是计算机科学的本质

vocabulary.definition: n. 脊椎, 志气, 骨干, 支柱；[计] 主干网, 主干网点
vocabulary.context: The Internet is the backbone of the 21st century and will likely remain an important part of our social, political, and cultural lives.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 互联网是 21 世纪的支柱，很可能仍然是我们社会、政治和文化生活的重要组成部分

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 围绕, 完成, 包括, 包含, 环绕, 包围
vocabulary.context: Data shared by different computers over the Internet encompasses all sorts of things - from the last thing you typed in a Facebook chat window to the programs that run Google's search engine.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不同计算机通过互联网共享的数据涵盖了各种各样的内容 - 从您在 Facebook 聊天窗口中输入的最后内容到运行 Google 搜索引擎的程序

vocabulary.definition: n. 家常服
vocabulary.context: their housecoats
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们的家居服

vocabulary.definition: n. 纸杯蛋糕( cupcake的复数形式 ); （经常用于称呼语中）指有魅力的女人; 指软弱和女性化的男人或男孩
vocabulary.context: their cupcakes
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们的纸杯蛋糕

vocabulary.definition: n. 点, 圆点, 小数点, 小东西, 嫁妆；v.t. 作小点记号, 加小点于；v.i. 打上点；[计] 点

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 点缀最微小的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 点缀最微小的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们的院子

vocabulary.definition: n. 平面, 扁平物, 机翼, 飞机, 水准, 地位；adj. 平的, 平面的；v.t. 将...刨平, 刨平, 掠过水面；v.i. 翱翔, 乘飞机旅行, 刨掉
vocabulary.context: or the time my plane
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 或者我的飞机时间

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 遗失, 损失, 丢失, 使失去, 错过, 浪费, 迷失, 使迷路, 输去, 使沉溺于；v.i. 受损失, 失败

vocabulary.context: In India, both autonomous and arranged marriages are fairly common, so the researchers compared and contrasted their results.

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当然，有些婚姻是不正常的，甚至是虐待性的，但根据研究，包办婚姻的人普遍生活更幸福，离婚率也更低

vocabulary.definition: n. 配偶

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在美国等移民人口中，父母为孩子安排未来的配偶，以确保孩子与自己的种族结婚

vocabulary.definition: adv. 预先
vocabulary.context: In either case, the marriage does not depend on any feelings of love between the couple beforehand; instead, their love for each other is expected to grow throughout the marriage.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 无论哪种情况，婚姻都不取决于夫妻之间事先的任何爱情感情；相反，他们对彼此的爱有望在整个婚姻过程中不断增长

vocabulary.context: Marriages can also be political actions, whether they further the family's position in politics, establish political alliances for the future, or smooth over some past conflicts.

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，汤姆林的演讲失败了：他遭到了嘘声，在研讨会结束时，与会者以 43 比 1 的投票结果投票禁止"儿童橄榄球"，汤姆林是唯一的坚持者，这表明医学界认为这项运动是危险的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 该法律的新限制，包括赛季中每周进行两次完全接触练习和休赛期中每周进行零次的限制，以及坚持要求教练拥有抢断和阻挡认证以及每年重新认证头盔，似乎符合修补足球以使其安全的历史模式......

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这项研究有两名参与者，他们通过抽签随机决定谁扮演老师的角色，谁扮演学习者的角色

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不相容的, 不能并存的, 矛盾的；[化] 不协调
vocabulary.context: Moreover, even when the destructive effects of their work became patently clear, and they were asked to carry out actions incompatible with fundamental standards of morality, relatively few people have the resources needed to resist authority.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 此外，即使他们的工作的破坏性影响变得显而易见，并且他们被要求采取不符合基本道德标准的行动，相对而言，很少有人拥有反抗权威所需的资源

vocabulary.definition: n. 适当；适合
vocabulary.context: What Bernays' writings furnish is not a principle or tradition by which to evaluate the appropriateness of propaganda, but simply a means for shaping public opinion for any purpose whatsoever, whether beneficial to human beings or not.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 伯奈斯的著作提供的并不是评估宣传是否适当的原则或传统，而只是一种为任何目的（无论是否对人类有益）塑造公众舆论的手段

vocabulary.definition: adj. 贬损的, 轻蔑的；n. 轻蔑语, 贬义词
vocabulary.context: Yet propaganda had acquired a somewhat pejorative connotation (which would be further magnified during World War II), so Bernays promoted the term "public relations."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，宣传已经获得了某种贬义的含义（这种含义在第二次世界大战期间被进一步放大），因此伯奈斯推广了"公共关系"一词

vocabulary.definition: adj. 瘦的, 苗条的, 微小的, 稀少的, 微薄的；v.i. 变苗条；v.t. 使苗条
vocabulary.context: In the 1930s, he promoted cigarettes as both soothing to the throat and slimming to the waistline.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 20世纪30年代，他宣传香烟既能舒缓喉咙又能减肥腰围

vocabulary.definition: n. 腰围；[医] 腰围
vocabulary.context: In the 1930s, he promoted cigarettes as both soothing to the throat and slimming to the waistline.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 20世纪30年代，他宣传香烟既能舒缓喉咙又能减肥腰围

vocabulary.definition: n. 剥削者；[经] 剥削者
vocabulary.context: This observation led Supreme Court Justice Felix Frankfurter to warn President Franklin Roosevelt against allowing Bernays to play a leadership role in World War II, describing him and his colleagues as "professional poisoners of the public mind, exploiters of foolishness, fanaticism, and self-interest."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这一观察导致最高法院法官费利克斯·法兰克福特警告富兰克林·罗斯福总统不要允许伯奈斯在第二次世界大战中发挥领导作用，称他和他的同事是"公众思想的专业毒害者，愚蠢、狂热和自利的利用者"

vocabulary.definition: n. 暗机关；v.t. 耍花招改变, 使暗机关
vocabulary.context: Often referred to as "the father of public relations," Bernays in 1928 published his seminal work, Propaganda, in which he argued that public relations is not a gimmick but a necessity:
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 伯奈斯经常被称为"公共关系之父"，他于 1928 年出版了他的开创性著作《宣传》，其中他认为公共关系不是一个噱头，而是一个必需品：

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 重考, 再检查, 再审查；[经] 再检查, 再调查

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他去世20年了，这为重新审视他的遗产提供了一个合适的机会

vocabulary.definition: n. 优势, 支配地位
vocabulary.context: While no single person can claim exclusive credit for the ascendancy of advertising in American life, no one deserves credit more than a man most of us have never heard of: Edward Bernays.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 虽然没有一个人可以将广告在美国生活中的优势归功于一个人，但没有人比我们大多数人从未听说过的一个人更值得赞扬：爱德华·伯奈斯

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 保护, 支援, 赞助, 庇护, 惠顾
vocabulary.context: Without a moral compass, however, such a transformation promotes a patronizing and ultimately cynical view of human nature and human possibilities, one as likely to destroy lives as to build them up.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，如果没有道德指南针，这种转变就会助长对人性和人类可能性的一种居高临下且最终愤世嫉俗的观点，这种观点既可能摧毁生命，也可能建设生命

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 逝去, 过去；n. 逝去, 过去

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我想警告地方政府领导人、电动骑行公司和人行道使用者注意电动滑板车危害健康的三种方式

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们位于加州大学圣地亚哥分校的研究小组表明，人行道和街道交叉口的设计越好，行人的安全和舒适度越高，各个年龄段的人就越多步行出行

vocabulary.definition: n. 不幸, 厄运, 致命性, 死亡者, 厄运, 天命

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 州长公路安全协会报告称，从 2007 年到 2016 年，行人死亡人数增加了 27%，而与此同时，所有其他交通死亡人数下降了 14%

vocabulary.definition: n. 最前部, 最前线

vocabulary.definition: n. 痴呆；[医] 痴呆

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有充分证据表明，体力活动不足是全球最大的健康威胁之一，是肥胖、糖尿病、心脏病、癌症、痴呆症等流行病的主要原因

vocabulary.context: Though not a direct translation, Maman-Nainaine is an equivalent term for "godmother." The character in this story is noted as Babette's godmother, so the name Maman-Nainaine is based more on her age than on her biological relationship with Babette.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 虽然不是直接翻译，但 Maman-Nainaine 是"教母"的等效术语。这个故事中的角色被认为是巴贝特的教母，所以 Maman-Nainaine 这个名字更多是基于她的年龄，而不是她与巴贝特的血缘关系

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无耳的, 听觉不佳的, 无穗的
vocabulary.context: I shall never forget field after field of corn stunted, earless and stripped of leaves, for what the sun left the grasshoppers took.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我永远不会忘记一片又一片的玉米田，它们发育不良，没有穗，叶子被剥光，因为太阳留下的东西被蚱蜢夺走了

vocabulary.definition: v. (使)人口减少
vocabulary.context: Yet I would not have you think for a single minute that there is permanent disaster in these drought regions, or that the picture I saw meant depopulating these areas.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，我不会让你认为这些干旱地区存在永久性灾难，或者我看到的图片意味着这些地区的人口减少

vocabulary.definition: n. 收获者, 收割机
vocabulary.context: The very existence of the men and women working in the clothing factories of New York, making clothes worn by farmers and their families; of the workers in the steel mills in Pittsburgh, in the automobile factories of Detroit, and in the harvester factories of Illinois, depend upon the farmers' ability to purchase the commodities they produce.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在纽约服装工厂工作的男男女女的存在，为农民及其家人制作衣服；匹兹堡的钢铁厂、底特律的汽车工厂和伊利诺伊州的收割机工厂的工人的收入取决于农民购买他们生产的商品的能力

vocabulary.definition: n. 牧牛人, 养牛人
vocabulary.context: I saw cattlemen who because of lack of grass or lack of winter feed have been compelled to sell all but their breeding stock and will need help to carry even these through the coming winter.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我看到牧牛人由于缺乏草或冬季饲料而被迫出售除种畜以外的所有牲畜，并且甚至需要帮助来携带这些牲畜度过即将到来的冬季

vocabulary.definition: n. 万能药, 灵丹妙药；[医] 万应药
vocabulary.context: I want to make it clear that no simple panacea can be applied to the drought problem in the whole of the drought area.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我想澄清的是，没有任何简单的灵丹妙药可以解决整个干旱地区的干旱问题

vocabulary.definition: n. 牧场主, 牧场工人, 饲养员, 仓库管理员；[经] 仓库管理员
vocabulary.context: No cracked earth, no blistering sun, no burning wind, no grasshoppers, are a permanent match for the indomitable American farmers and stockmen and their wives and children who have carried on through desperate days, and inspire us with their self-reliance, their tenacity and their courage.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 没有龟裂的大地，没有烈日炎炎，没有烈日炎炎，没有蚱蜢，与不屈不挠的美国农牧民和他们的妻儿一起度过了绝望的日子，他们是永远的对手，他们的自力更生、坚韧和勇气激励着我们

vocabulary.context: Beginning in 1934, when we also had serious drought conditions, the state and Federal governments cooperated in planning a large number of projects - many of them directly aimed at the alleviation of future drought conditions.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 从1934年开始，当时我们也遇到了严重的干旱，州政府和联邦政府合作规划了大量项目--其中许多项目直接旨在缓解未来的干旱状况

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 民事纠纷通常通过"compurgation"解决，这种方法要求案件各方带上几位朋友，或"compurgators"，以获得口头支持；拥有最多压缩器的一方赢得了这场官司

vocabulary.context: However, Henry II also utilized inquisitions and ordeals and the hue and cry remained the foremost system of justice.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，亨利二世也利用了审讯和严刑拷打，呼喊声仍然是最重要的司法制度

vocabulary.definition: n. 忧郁, 喜怒无常, 不快
vocabulary.context: "Having an adolescent at home, with all the drama and the ups and downs, particularly the moodiness - and social media was just coming into the picture - guided us in terms of what we wanted to look for, what we wanted to better understand in the wild to bring back to our homes," Natterson-Horowitz said.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 纳特森-霍洛维茨说："家里有一个青少年，伴随着所有的戏剧性和起起落落，尤其是喜怒无常--社交媒体才刚刚出现--引导我们了解我们想要寻找什么，我们想要在野外更好地了解什么，然后带回我们的家。"

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不适当地；不够好地

vocabulary.context: We now recognize that, in separating children from their families, we undermined the ability of many to adequately parent their own children and sowed the seeds for generations to follow, and we apologize for having done this.

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不名誉地

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 事实上，正如臭名昭著的说法，有些人试图"杀死孩子中的印第安人"。今天，我们认识到这种同化政策是错误的，造成了极大的危害，在我国没有立足之地

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 政府认识到，缺乏道歉一直是治愈与和解的障碍

vocabulary.definition: n. 安装启用, 实行, 履行；[计] 实施; 实现
vocabulary.context: In moving towards healing, reconciliation and resolution of the sad legacy of Indian residential schools, implementation of the Indian Residential Schools Settlement Agreement began on September 19, 2007.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为了治愈、和解并解决印度寄宿学校的悲惨遗产，《印度寄宿学校和解协议》于 2007 年 9 月 19 日开始实施

vocabulary.definition: adv. 足够地, 适当地
vocabulary.context: We now recognize that, in separating children from their families, we undermined the ability of many to adequately parent their own children and sowed the seeds for generations to follow, and we apologize for having done this.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们现在认识到，在将儿童与家人分离的过程中，我们削弱了许多人充分养育自己孩子的能力，并为后代播下了种子，我们为这样做而道歉

vocabulary.definition: adv. 真诚地
vocabulary.context: The Government of Canada sincerely apologizes and asks the forgiveness of the Aboriginal peoples of this country for failing them so profoundly.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 加拿大政府真诚地道歉，并请求该国原住民的原谅，因为他们对他们造成了如此严重的失望

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 到绝顶, 达于极点, 达到高潮；v.t. 使到绝顶, 使达到高潮
vocabulary.context: Years of work by survivors, communities, and Aboriginal organizations culminated in an agreement that gives us a new beginning and an opportunity to move forward together in partnership.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 幸存者、社区和原住民组织多年的努力最终达成了一项协议，为我们提供了一个新的开始和一个共同前进的机会

vocabulary.definition: adv. 非正式地；不拘礼节地
vocabulary.context: School officials say the Hagerstown cattle program - informally known as "Where's the Beef?" - is expected to save at least $2,000 in annual cafeteria costs and expand vocational training.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 学校官员称黑格斯敦养牛计划 - 非正式地称为"牛肉在哪里？" - 预计每年可节省至少 2,000 美元的食堂费用并扩大职业培训

vocabulary.definition: n. 测深锤, 铅坠；v.i. 垂直落下
vocabulary.context: What if the price of beef plummets?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 牛肉价格暴跌怎么办？

vocabulary.definition: n. （中等、专科学校或大学的）二年级学生( sophomore的复数形式 )
vocabulary.context: The district is still looking to hire a new teacher to run the cattle course, which will be open to sophomores, juniors and seniors.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 该学区仍在寻找一位新老师来开设养牛课程，该课程将向二年级、三年级和四年级学生开放

vocabulary.definition: n. 素食者, 食草动物；adj. 素食的
vocabulary.context: Students in Hagerstown shrug when asked if the class might produce more vegetarians than potential ranchers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当被问及班级是否可能培养出比潜在牧场主更多的素食者时，黑格斯敦的学生耸耸肩

vocabulary.definition: n. 小馅饼
vocabulary.context: Then, when the animals are fat enough, they will be fed back to their caretakers - as beef patties on lunchroom trays.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后，当动物足够胖时，它们将被喂回给它们的饲养员--作为午餐室托盘上的牛肉饼

vocabulary.definition: adj. 职业的；[法] 职业上的, 天职的
vocabulary.context: School officials say the Hagerstown cattle program - informally known as "Where's the Beef?" - is expected to save at least $2,000 in annual cafeteria costs and expand vocational training.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 学校官员称黑格斯敦养牛计划 - 非正式地称为"牛肉在哪里？" - 预计每年可节省至少 2,000 美元的食堂费用并扩大职业培训

vocabulary.definition: n. 便餐厅
vocabulary.context: Then, when the animals are fat enough, they will be fed back to their caretakers - as beef patties on lunchroom trays.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后，当动物足够胖时，它们将被喂回给它们的饲养员--作为午餐室托盘上的牛肉饼

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 消耗, 消费, 消灭；v.i. 耗尽, 毁灭
vocabulary.context: "We'll have more meat than we'll be able to consume," said Mark Childs, the principal at Hagerstown Junior-Senior High School, which will sell its extra beef.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 黑格斯敦初高中校长马克·蔡尔兹 (Mark Childs) 表示，"我们的肉将超出我们的消费能力"，该学校将出售多余的牛肉

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不仁慈地；残酷地
vocabulary.context: However two of the wretches were drowned, but they got the other, and afterwards flogged him unmercifully for thus attempting to prefer death to slavery.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，其中两个不幸的人被淹死了，但他们抓住了另一个，然后无情地鞭打了他，因为他试图宁死不为奴

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无远见的, 浪费的
vocabulary.context: This produced copious perspirations, so that the air soon became unfit for respiration, from a variety of loathsome smells, and brought on a sickness among the slaves, of which many died, thus falling victims to the improvident avarice, as I may call it, of their purchasers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这会产生大量的汗水，因此空气很快就因各种令人厌恶的气味而变得不适合呼吸，并在奴隶中带来了疾病，许多人因此死亡，从而成为他们的购买者的无远见的贪婪的受害者，我可以称之为

vocabulary.definition: n. 绞盘, 辘轳；v.t. 用绞盘吊起
vocabulary.context: I now wished for the last friend, death, to relieve me; but soon, to my grief, two of the white men offered me eatables; and, on my refusing to eat, one of them held me fast by the hands, and laid me across I think the windlass, and tied my feet, while the other flogged me severely.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我现在希望最后一个朋友，死亡，来解救我；但很快，令我悲伤的是，两个白人给了我食物。当我拒绝吃饭时，其中一个人紧紧抓住我的手，把我放在绞车上，绑住我的脚，另一个人则狠狠地鞭打我

vocabulary.definition: n. loathsome的变形
vocabulary.context: I was not long suffered to indulge my grief; I was soon put down under the decks, and there I received such a salutation in my nostrils as I had never experienced in my life: so that, with the loathsomeness of the stench, and crying together, I became so sick and low that I was not able to eat, nor had I the least desire to taste any thing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我没多久就沉浸在悲伤之中；很快我就被放到了甲板下，鼻孔里传来了我一生中从未经历过的欢迎声：因此，伴随着令人作呕的恶臭和一起哭泣，我变得如此恶心和低落，以至于我无法进食，也不想品尝任何东西

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可以吃的；n. 食物
vocabulary.context: I now wished for the last friend, death, to relieve me; but soon, to my grief, two of the white men offered me eatables; and, on my refusing to eat, one of them held me fast by the hands, and laid me across I think the windlass, and tied my feet, while the other flogged me severely.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我现在希望最后一个朋友，死亡，来解救我；但很快，令我悲伤的是，两个白人给了我食物。当我拒绝吃饭时，其中一个人紧紧抓住我的手，把我放在绞车上，绑住我的脚，另一个人则狠狠地鞭打我

vocabulary.definition: adj. 瘟疫的, 有害的, 传播疾病的, 讨厌的, 恼人的；[医] 疫病的
vocabulary.context: The stench of the hold while we were on the coast was so intolerably loathsome, that it was dangerous to remain there for any time, and some of us had been permitted to stay on the deck for the fresh air; but now that the whole ship's cargo were confined together, it became absolutely pestilential.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当我们在海岸上时，货舱的恶臭令人难以忍受，任何时候呆在那里都是危险的，我们中的一些人被允许留在甲板上呼吸新鲜空气；但现在整艘船的货物都被限制在一起，这绝对是一场瘟疫

vocabulary.definition: adv. 到难耐的程度, 无法忍受
vocabulary.context: The stench of the hold while we were on the coast was so intolerably loathsome, that it was dangerous to remain there for any time, and some of us had been permitted to stay on the deck for the fresh air; but now that the whole ship's cargo were confined together, it became absolutely pestilential.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当我们在海岸上时，货舱的恶臭令人难以忍受，任何时候呆在那里都是危险的，我们中的一些人被允许留在甲板上呼吸新鲜空气；但现在整艘船的货物都被限制在一起，这绝对是一场瘟疫

vocabulary.definition: n. 沮丧, 粪便；[医] 排泄物, 粪便, 排粪, 沮丧
vocabulary.context: When I looked round the ship too and saw a large furnace or copper boiling, and a multitude of black people of every description chained together, every one of their countenances expressing dejection and sorrow, I no longer doubted of my fate; and, quite overpowered with horror and anguish, I fell motionless on the deck and fainted.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当我也环顾船身，看到一座大炉子或铜锅在沸腾，一大群形形色色的黑人被锁在一起，每个人的脸上都流露出沮丧和悲伤时，我不再怀疑自己的命运；我被恐惧和痛苦压垮了，一动不动地倒在甲板上，晕了过去

vocabulary.definition: adj. 被咒的, 注定完蛋的, 讨厌的
vocabulary.context: In this manner we continued to undergo more hardships than I can now relate, hardships which are inseparable from this accursed trade.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 就这样，我们继续经历了比我现在所能描述的更多的困难，这些困难与这种可恶的贸易密不可分

vocabulary.definition: adj. 忍耐不住的, 不合理的
vocabulary.context: This wretched situation was again aggravated by the galling of the chains, now become insupportable; and the filth of the necessary tubs, into which the children often fell, and were almost suffocated.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 锁链的磨损再次加剧了这种悲惨的情况，现在变得难以忍受。必要的浴盆也很脏，孩子们经常掉进浴盆里，几乎窒息而死

vocabulary.definition: n. 拼, 拼字, 拼法；[计] 拼写检查
vocabulary.context: Some southern African Americans struggled with literacy after emancipation, and so names took on new spellings.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一些南部非洲裔美国人在解放后读写能力方面遇到困难，因此名字采用了新的拼写

vocabulary.definition: n. 残渣, 剩余, 余数；[化] 残基; 残渣; 残液; 釜液
vocabulary.context: It is in these innocent moments that the troubling history of this country becomes real and the residue reveals itself as still present.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 正是在这些无辜的时刻，这个国家令人不安的历史才变得真实，而残余的痕迹仍然存在

vocabulary.definition: v. 探究, 查考；n. 坑, 穴
vocabulary.context: I felt the weariness of being pushed into an emotional space and frustrated from having to contemplate whether to delve deeper into a topic I didn't expect during idle small talk.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我感到被推入情感空间的疲倦，以及在闲聊中不得不考虑是否更深入地研究一个我没有预料到的话题而感到沮丧

vocabulary.definition: num. 第十三, 十三分之一
vocabulary.context: I also didn't bother to talk about how even after the Thirteenth Amendment brought enslaved people a form of freedom, some chose the plantation name as their last name in order to reveal where they were from.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我也懒得谈论即使在第十三修正案给被奴役的人们带来某种形式的自由之后，有些人仍然选择种植园名称作为他们的姓氏，以表明他们来自哪里

vocabulary.definition: adj. 眼花的, 头晕的；v. (使)眼花, (使)眩晕
vocabulary.context: "I know some Norwoods and some Wakefields from western North Carolina," she piped up, almost instantly, with a giddy excitement.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我知道北卡罗来纳州西部的一些诺伍德和一些韦克菲尔德，"她几乎立刻就兴奋地说道

vocabulary.definition: n. 对抗；对质；面对
vocabulary.context: It's these unexpected confrontations with history that trigger what writer and social commentator James Baldwin called the "constant state of rage."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 正是这些与历史的意外对抗引发了作家和社会评论家詹姆斯·鲍德温所说的"持续的愤怒状态"

vocabulary.definition: n. 行李；[经] 行李
vocabulary.context: Yet this is the moment when the baggage of race and what it means to be African American comes creeping into the most fleeting of encounters.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，正是在这个时刻，种族的包袱和作为非裔美国人的意义悄然渗透到最短暂的遭遇中

vocabulary.definition: adj. 人种的, 种族的；[医] 人种的
vocabulary.context: She didn't have to say it, but I knew she was trying to better understand my heritage and ethnic background.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她不必说出来，但我知道她正在努力更好地了解我的传统和种族背景

vocabulary.definition: n. 无用的人, 废物, 无价值的人；[经] 没有用处的
vocabulary.context: You good-for-nothing!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你这个废物！

vocabulary.definition: n. 副总督, 副州长
vocabulary.context: Petersburg with the view of obtaining some position corresponding to his rank, if possible that of vice-governor of a province; but he was prepared to be content with that of a bailiff in some department or other.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 圣彼得堡，希望获得与他的级别相对应的职位，如果可能的话，获得一个省的副省长；但他准备满足于某个部门或其他部门的法警的工作

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使不愿, 使不欲
vocabulary.context: He was, moreover, not disinclined to marry, but only such a lady who could bring with her a dowry of two hundred thousand roubles.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 而且，他并不是不愿意结婚，只是不愿意娶这样一个能带来二十万卢布嫁妆的女士

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不合时机的, 不巧的
vocabulary.context: It might be expected, therefore, that the committee-man's visit would be quite inopportune.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 因此，可以预料，委员会成员的访问将是相当不合时宜的

vocabulary.definition: adv. 亲切地
vocabulary.context: A certain speculator with a grave, whiskered face, who sold cakes at a theatre door, had some strong wooden benches made which he placed before the window of the stores, and obligingly invited the public to stand on them and look in, at the modest charge of twenty-four kopecks.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一个面容严肃、留着胡须的投机商在剧院门口卖糕点，他让人做了一些坚固的木凳，放在商店的橱窗前，并殷勤地邀请公众站在上面观看，收费为二十四戈比

vocabulary.definition: n. 平版印刷品, 石版画；v.t. 以平版印刷
vocabulary.context: ...through the crowd, but to his great indignation he saw nothing in the store window but an ordinary flannel waistcoat and a coloured lithograph representing a young girl darning a stocking, while an elegant youth in a waistcoat with large lappels watched her from behind a tree.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...穿过人群，但令他非常愤慨的是，他在商店橱窗里看到的只是一件普通的法兰绒背心和一幅彩色版画，描绘了一个正在补袜子的年轻女孩，而一个穿着大翻领背心的优雅青年在树后看着她

vocabulary.definition: adj. 近视的, 目光短浅的, 缺乏想像力的
vocabulary.context: I am shortsighted, you know, and as you stand before me I cannot distinguish your nose, your beard, or anything else.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你知道，我是近视眼，当你站在我面前时，我无法辨别你的鼻子、胡子或其他任何东西

vocabulary.definition: n. 零售商, 工匠；[经] 商人, 店主, 零售商
vocabulary.context: Like every honest Russian tradesman, Ivan Jakovlevitch was a terrible drunkard, and although he shaved other people's faces every day, his own was always unshaved.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 像每一个诚实的俄罗斯商人一样，伊万·雅科夫列维奇是个可怕的酒鬼，尽管他每天都给别人刮胡子，但他自己的脸却总是不刮

vocabulary.definition: adj. 直射的, 断然的；adv. 直射地, 断然地
vocabulary.context: And when the lady one day told him point-blank that she wished him to marry her daughter, he gently drew back, declaring that he was still too young, and that he had to serve five years more before he would be forty-two.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有一天，当那位女士直截了当地告诉他，她希望他娶她的女儿时，他轻轻地退了一步，宣称自己还太年轻，必须再服役五年才能满四十二岁

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无赖的, 恶棍的, 不诚实的；adv. 无赖地
vocabulary.context: But just as he was about to order the coachman to drive to the police-station, the idea occurred to him that this rascally scoundrel who, at their first meeting, had behaved so disloyally towards him, might, profiting by the delay, quit the city secretly; and then all his searching would be in vain, or might last over a whole month.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但正当他正要命令车夫开车去警察局时，他突然想到，这个第一次见面就对他如此不忠的无赖恶棍，可能会趁拖延时间偷偷离开这座城市；那么他所有的寻找都将是徒劳的，或者可能会持续一个多月

vocabulary.definition: adj. 脑筋好的, 聪明的
vocabulary.context: Bev had leaned against him in the porch swing, comforted by his disbelief, while he told her about a column he read when they were in college, by that brainy woman who answered people's letters.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 贝夫在门廊的秋千上靠在他身上，对他的怀疑感到安慰，而他告诉她他在大学时读过的一篇专栏文章，作者是一位给人们回信的聪明女人

vocabulary.definition: adj. 完全断绝麻醉药的
vocabulary.context: Benjamin had been scrambling around in the front yard, kicking dried-out pinecones around like footballs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 本杰明一直在前院爬来爬去，像踢足球一样踢干的松果

vocabulary.definition: v. 喷( spritz的过去式和过去分词 )
vocabulary.context: Ezze regarded her irritably as Bev spritzed a paper towel with Windex, then wiped up the mud the cane had left behind.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 埃兹恼怒地看着她，贝夫在纸巾上喷了 Windex，然后擦掉了手杖留下的泥土

vocabulary.definition: v.i. high-step的变形
vocabulary.context: She high-stepped around her cane as another rivulet ran through the yellowed grass on the shoulder of the road.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当另一条小溪流过路肩泛黄的草丛时，她高高地绕着拐杖

vocabulary.definition: n. 连裤袜
vocabulary.context: The Aparicios had left laundry on the line when they moved out - in a hurry, like everybody these past few weeks - and almost all of it was scattered around the neighborhood now, T-shirts and pantyhose and thermal underwear caught up in bare tree branches, soaked and plastered in gutters.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 阿帕里西奥斯夫妇搬出去时，把要洗的衣服留在晾衣绳上--就像过去几周大家一样，很匆忙--现在几乎所有的衣服都散落在附近，T恤、连裤袜和保暖内衣挂在光秃秃的树枝上，被浸湿并粘在排水沟里

vocabulary.definition: adj. 略带紫色的
vocabulary.context: She didn't hear at first; she'd noticed, bent over there, a cluster of webbed, purplish veins just below her thigh, beside her knee.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她一开始没听见；她弯下腰，注意到大腿下方、膝盖旁边有一簇带蹼的紫色静脉

vocabulary.definition: adj. 高水位的；满潮的；裤子特别短的
vocabulary.context: When they couldn't see the high-water mark, somebody would motor out in a rubber boat and spray a new line of paint on the wall.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当他们看不到高水位线时，有人会开着橡皮艇出去，在墙上喷上一道新的油漆

vocabulary.definition: adj. 芬芳的, 臭的, 有气味的
vocabulary.context: She was in the laundry room, bent over a basket of Benjamin's muddy trousers and grass-stained T-shirts and particularly odorous socks, when a rap sounded on the screen door.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她正在洗衣房里，弯腰看着一篮子本杰明沾满泥的裤子、沾满草的T恤和特别难闻的袜子，这时纱门上响起了敲击声

vocabulary.definition: n. 闹剧, 滑稽剧, 胡闹
vocabulary.context: It's all a farce, they argued.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们认为，这都是一场闹剧

vocabulary.definition: adv. 戏剧化地
vocabulary.context: Ezze groaned theatrically. "I'd give anything for a new one," she said. "But who's got money for that?"
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 埃兹戏剧性地呻吟着。 "我愿意付出任何代价换一个新的，"她说。 "但是谁有钱这么做呢？"

vocabulary.definition: n. 损形, 变丑, 畸形；[化] 变形; 形变
vocabulary.context: His group intends to continue studying the players, when possible, to see if any additional deformation occurs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的团队打算在可能的情况下继续研究球员，看看是否会发生任何额外的变形

vocabulary.context: His more than 40 books have won numerous awards, including the Prix Medicis for A Beggar in Jerusalem , the Prix Livre Inter for The Testament , and the Grand Prize for Literature from the City of Paris for The Fifth Son .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的40多本书荣获无数奖项，包括《耶路撒冷的乞丐》获得美第奇奖、《遗嘱》获得国际图书奖、《第五子》获得巴黎市文学大奖

vocabulary.definition: adj. 荣誉的, 无报酬的, 道义上的；[法] 名誉的, 荣誉的
vocabulary.context: He received more than 100 honorary degrees from institutions of higher learning.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他获得了100多个高等院校的荣誉学位

vocabulary.definition: adv. 国际性地, 在国际间
vocabulary.context: The Elie Wiesel Award recognizes internationally prominent individuals whose actions have advanced the Museum's vision of a world where people confront hatred, prevent genocide, and promote human dignity.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Elie Wiesel 奖旨在表彰国际知名人士，他们的行动推动了博物馆的愿景，即建设一个人们直面仇恨、防止种族灭绝和促进人类尊严的世界

vocabulary.definition: n. 传记, 实录, 追思录, 回忆录, 自传；[化] 研究报告
vocabulary.context: The first volume of Wiesel's memoirs, All Rivers Run to the Sea , was published in New York (Knopf) in December 1995.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 威塞尔回忆录第一卷《诸河奔海》于1995年12月在纽约（克诺普夫出版社）出版

vocabulary.definition: adv. 后来, 随后

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他随后写下了《La Nuit》（夜）

vocabulary.definition: n. 乞丐；v.t. 使贫穷, 使成乞丐
vocabulary.context: His more than 40 books have won numerous awards, including the Prix Medicis for A Beggar in Jerusalem , the Prix Livre Inter for The Testament , and the Grand Prize for Literature from the City of Paris for The Fifth Son .

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 获得诺贝尔和平奖三个月后，埃利·威塞尔和他的妻子玛丽昂成立了埃利·威塞尔人类基金会

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无委任令的, 未经任命的
vocabulary.context: Segregated units were formed with black enlisted men and typically commanded by white officers and black noncommissioned officers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 隔离部队由黑人士兵组成，通常由白人军官和黑人士官指挥

vocabulary.definition: adv. 留在记忆中地, 显著地, 明确地
vocabulary.context: The July 1863 assault on Fort Wagner, SC, in which the 54th Regiment of Massachusetts Volunteers lost two-thirds of their officers and half of their troops, was memorably dramatized in the film Glory .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1863 年 7 月对南卡罗来纳州瓦格纳堡的袭击，马萨诸塞州志愿军第 54 团损失了三分之二的军官和一半的士兵，这一事件在电影《荣耀》中得到了令人难忘的戏剧化呈现

vocabulary.definition: n. 没收, 充公；[法] 没收, 查抄, 徵用

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 结果，1862年7月17日，国会通过了《第二次没收和民兵法案》，释放了在南部邦联军队中拥有主人的奴隶

vocabulary.definition: v. (使)纠缠, (使)缠绕

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 解放和兵役问题从内战开始就交织在一起

vocabulary.definition: adj. 营养不良的
vocabulary.context: We cannot be content, no matter how high that general standard of living may be, if some fraction of our people - whether it be one-third or one-fifth or one-tenth - is ill-fed, ill-clothed, ill-housed, and insecure.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果我们的一部分人--无论是三分之一、五分之一或十分之一--吃不饱、穿不好、住得不好、没有安全感，那么无论总体生活水平有多高，我们都不能满足

vocabulary.context: We cannot be content, no matter how high that general standard of living may be, if some fraction of our people - whether it be one-third or one-fifth or one-tenth - is ill-fed, ill-clothed, ill-housed, and insecure.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果我们的一部分人--无论是三分之一、五分之一或十分之一--吃不饱、穿不好、住得不好、没有安全感，那么无论总体生活水平有多高，我们都不能满足

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不能让与的, 不能转售的, 不能夺取的, 不可分割的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这个共和国在某些不可剥夺的政治权利的保护下诞生并发展到现在的实力--其中包括言论自由、新闻自由、自由崇拜、陪审团审判、免遭无理搜查和扣押的权利

vocabulary.context: America's own rightful place in the world depends in large part upon how fully these and similar rights have been carried into practice for our citizens.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 美国自己在世界上的合法地位在很大程度上取决于我们的公民如何充分地落实这些权利和类似的权利

vocabulary.definition: n. 垄断, 专卖权, 独占事业；[经] 垄断, 专利品, 垄断(权)独占
vocabulary.context: The right of every businessman, large and small, to trade in an atmosphere of freedom from unfair competition and domination by monopolies at home or abroad;
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每个商人，无论大小，都有权在不受国内外不公平竞争和垄断统治的自由氛围中进行贸易；

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不充分的, 不适当的；[法] 不充分的, 不适当的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，随着我们国家的规模和地位不断增长，随着我们工业经济的扩张，这些政治权利被证明不足以确保我们在追求幸福方面的平等

vocabulary.definition: adj. 分裂的, 破坏(性)的；[计] 击穿的, 中断的
vocabulary.context: Supreme Court ruled by a 7-to-2 vote for Tinker, affirming the principle that schoolchildren do not "shed their constitutional rights to freedom of speech or expression at the schoolhouse gate." Students cannot be censored, the court said, unless their speech is disruptive.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 最高法院以 7 比 2 的投票结果支持了 Tinker，确认学童不得"在校舍门口放弃言论或表达自由的宪法权利"这一原则。法院表示，学生不能受到审查，除非他们的言论具有破坏性

vocabulary.definition: n. 抄本, 副本, 成绩单；[法] 法院文本, 官方记录, 记录的副本
vocabulary.context: After that prologue, the judges take their places on the bench, and using a condensed version of the official Supreme Court transcript, they play the roles of the justices who heard the case.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 序言结束后，法官们就座，并使用最高法院官方笔录的精简版，扮演审理该案的法官的角色

vocabulary.definition: adj. 激发感情的, 挑拨的, 刺激的；n. 刺激物, 挑拨物, 兴奋剂
vocabulary.context: "I think we'd have to look at how provocative the message actually was."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我认为我们必须看看这条信息实际上有多具有挑衅性。"

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 承认, 退让；v.i. 让步
vocabulary.context: Judge Srinivasan jumps in: "Counsel, I suppose that you would concede that if the armband started fistfights, a principal could prohibit students from wearing them."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 斯里尼瓦桑法官插话道："律师，我想您会承认，如果臂章引发打斗，校长可以禁止学生佩戴臂章。"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 体面的, 可表现的, 可提出的
vocabulary.context: And he was made presentable by a queer.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一个酷儿让他变得体面

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 陪审员转向怀特

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我经常想知道怀特主管，

vocabulary.context: Mayor Moscone and Supervisor Milk,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 莫斯康市长和米尔克主管，

vocabulary.definition: n. 皮革, 皮制品, 马镫的皮带；v.t. 覆以皮革, 鞭苔, 抽打；adj. 皮革的, 皮制的
vocabulary.context: Levi's and leather jackets holding hands
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 李维斯和皮夹克牵手

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 与丹·怀特（Dan White）同一天当选

vocabulary.definition: num. 十二, 十二个

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但那十二个人掌握着他的生命

vocabulary.definition: adv. 虚弱地；无能为力地；阳痿地
vocabulary.context: About eleven o'clock they were passing over the basin of Imenge, and the tribes scattered over the adjacent hills were impotently menacing the Victoria with their weapons.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大约十一点钟，他们正越过伊蒙格盆地，分散在邻近山上的部落正在用武器无力地威胁维多利亚号

vocabulary.definition: n. 倾斜, 下坡
vocabulary.context: The most abrupt declivity of these mountains confronts the Zanzibar coast, but the western slopes are merely inclined planes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些山脉最陡峭的斜坡面对桑给巴尔海岸，但西坡只是斜面

vocabulary.definition: n. 葫芦；[机] 葫芦
vocabulary.context: Various water-courses filter through, toward the east, and work their way onward to flow into the Kingani, in the midst of gigantic clumps of sycamore, tamarind, calabash, and palmyra trees.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 各种水道向东流过，并继续流入金加尼河，在巨大的梧桐树、罗望子树、葫芦和巴尔米拉树丛中

vocabulary.definition: n. 硫酸盐, 硫酸酯；v.i. 硫酸盐化
vocabulary.context: "That beats sulphate of quinine!" said the energetic Scot, with hearty emphasis and much satisfaction.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "这打败了硫酸奎宁！"这位精力充沛的苏格兰人语气由衷地强调，并非常满意地说道

vocabulary.definition: n. [植]扇叶树头榈（等于palmyra palm）
vocabulary.context: Various water-courses filter through, toward the east, and work their way onward to flow into the Kingani, in the midst of gigantic clumps of sycamore, tamarind, calabash, and palmyra trees.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 各种水道向东流过，并继续流入金加尼河，在巨大的梧桐树、罗望子树、葫芦和巴尔米拉树丛中

vocabulary.definition: n. 构造, 形态, 完整的配置；[化] 构象
vocabulary.context: The aeronauts took careful and complete note of the orographic conformation of the country.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 飞行员仔细而完整地记录了该国的地形构造

vocabulary.definition: n. 胆大无敌, 刚毅, 厚颜, 强壮
vocabulary.context: "I exaggerate nothing," continued Ferguson, "for, upon reading the narratives of such travellers as have had the hardihood to venture into these regions, your eyes would fill with tears."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我没有夸大其词，"弗格森继续说道，"因为，在读到那些勇敢地冒险进入这些地区的旅行者的叙述时，你的眼睛会充满泪水。"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 好笑的, 滑稽的, 逗趣的
vocabulary.context: "I move that we don't try it!" said Joe, in his droll way.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我建议我们不要尝试！"乔用他滑稽的方式说道

vocabulary.definition: adj. 极度的, 华丽的, 极好的
vocabulary.context: The vapors rolled over each other, and mingled together in confused masses of superb brilliance, as they reflected the rays of the sun.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当它们反射着太阳的光芒时，蒸气相互翻滚，并混合在一起，形成极其明亮的混乱物质

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无法忍受的, 不能忍耐的,不能持久的
vocabulary.context: During the daytime, a damp, penetrating, unendurable humidity!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 白天，湿气袭人，令人难以忍受！

vocabulary.definition: n. 提前, 提早, 早熟, 热心
vocabulary.context: I know already, by your forwardness, that you have deserved rewards and crowns; and we do assure you, on the word of a prince, they shall be duly paid you.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 通过你的勇敢，我已经知道你应得的奖励和王冠；我们向您保证，以王子的名义，他们将得到适当的报酬

vocabulary.definition: n. 背叛, 变节；[法] 背叛, 变节, 背信弃义
vocabulary.context: My loving people, we have been persuaded by some, that are careful of our safety, to take heed how we commit ourselves to armed multitudes, for fear of treachery; but I assure you, I do not desire to live to distrust my faithful and loving people.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我亲爱的人民，我们被一些关心我们安全的人说服，要注意我们如何将自己交给武装群众，以免遭到背叛；但我向你保证，我不想活着就不再信任我忠实而有爱心的人民

vocabulary.definition: n. 不名誉；v.t. 玷辱, 使蒙羞
vocabulary.context: England, too; and think foul scorn that Parma or Spain, or any prince of Europe, should dare to invade the borders of my realms: to which, rather than any dishonor should grow by me, I myself will take up arms; I myself will be your general, judge, and rewarder of every one of your virtues in the field.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 英格兰也是如此；认为帕尔马或西班牙，或任何欧洲王子竟敢侵犯我的领土边界，这是一种可憎的蔑视：我宁愿拿起武器，也不愿让我蒙受任何耻辱。我本人将成为你们的将军、法官，并奖励你们在战场上的每一项美德

vocabulary.definition: n. 英勇, 刚勇, 勇猛
vocabulary.context: In the mean my lieutenant general shall be in my stead, than whom never prince commanded a more noble and worthy subject; not doubting by your obedience to my general, by your concord in the camp, and by your valor in the field, we shall shortly have a famous victory over the enemies of my God, of my kingdom, and of my people.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 总而言之，我的中将将接替我的位置，没有哪个王子指挥过比他更高贵、更有价值的臣民。毫无疑问，凭借你们对我将军的服从，你们在营中的和谐，以及你们在战场上的英勇，我们很快就会对我的上帝、我的王国和我的人民的敌人取得一场著名的胜利

vocabulary.definition: n. 保卫, 保护措施, 防护设施；v.t. 保卫, 保护
vocabulary.context: Let tyrants fear; I have always so behaved myself that, under God, I have placed my chiefest strength and safeguard in the loyal hearts and good will of my subjects.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 让暴君畏惧；我一向如此行事，在上帝的领导下，我把我最大的力量和保障放在我臣民的忠诚的心和善意中

vocabulary.definition: n. 暴君；[法] 专制君主, 暴君, 压制他人者
vocabulary.context: Let tyrants fear; I have always so behaved myself that, under God, I have placed my chiefest strength and safeguard in the loyal hearts and good will of my subjects.

vocabulary.context: In the mean my lieutenant general shall be in my stead, than whom never prince commanded a more noble and worthy subject; not doubting by your obedience to my general, by your concord in the camp, and by your valor in the field, we shall shortly have a famous victory over the enemies of my God, of my kingdom, and of my people.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 总而言之，我的中将将接替我的位置，没有哪个王子指挥过比他更高贵、更有价值的臣民。毫无疑问，凭借你们对我将军的服从，你们在营中的和谐，以及你们在战场上的英勇，我们很快就会对我的上帝、我的王国和我的人民的敌人取得一场著名的胜利

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我亲爱的人民，我们被一些关心我们安全的人说服，要注意我们如何将自己交给武装群众，以免遭到背叛；但我向你保证，我不想活着就不再信任我忠实而有爱心的人民

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我亲爱的人民，我们被一些关心我们安全的人说服，要注意我们如何将自己交给武装群众，以免遭到背叛；但我向你保证，我不想活着就不再信任我忠实而有爱心的人民

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 雷蒙德一反常态地穿着空军制服

vocabulary.definition: n. 反抗, 不服从, 顽抗

vocabulary.context: In this economy?" Walter and Leslie Northrup were both instructors at a university - which sounded prestigious, but effectively meant that their employment was insecure and their fields of study prescribed by departmental demand.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在这种经济条件下？"沃尔特和莱斯利·诺斯拉普都是一所大学的讲师--这听起来很有声望，但实际上意味着他们的就业不稳定，而且他们的学习领域是由部门需求规定的

vocabulary.definition: adv. latitudinal（纬度的, 纬度方向的）的变形

vocabulary.definition: n. 具有超人力量的恶巫
vocabulary.context: Wirth had said that to observe discrimination, they needn't look so far as the former Confederacy, or some "boogeyman in The South." They could use their own city to see trouble.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 沃斯曾说过，要观察歧视现象，他们不必把目光投向前联邦，或某个"南方的妖怪"。他们可以利用自己的城市来找麻烦

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 特拉维斯--当他的父母夏季嬉戏回来时总是很挑剔--皱起了眉头

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 抚慰, 平息, 使和解, 怀柔
vocabulary.context: "That's true, honey," she leapt to say, in her most placating voice.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "确实如此，亲爱的，"她用她最安抚的声音说道

vocabulary.definition: n. 用以握持热锅的布垫子或厚布
vocabulary.context: That way, everyone gets what they want." She shook a potholder, determined.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这样，每个人都会得到他们想要的。"她坚定地摇晃着隔热垫

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 安顿下来, 安置, 使隐藏
vocabulary.context: The decision to forsake the public high school, where Netha was already comfortably ensconced, had also resulted in a lot of hushed, dramatic parent conversations.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 放弃公立高中的决定也导致了许多安静而戏剧性的家长对话，内莎已经舒适地安顿在公立高中

vocabulary.definition: n. 二儿子
