vocabulary.contextTranslation: "但是你还没有进入地下，是吗，Pop Pop？"老二、二女儿莱恩说

vocabulary.definition: adj. 病理学的, 由疾病引起的, (非正式)不合理的, 仅由想象引起的, 不理智的；[计] 错误的
vocabulary.context: They expected that only 4 percent would reach 300 volts, and that only a pathological fringe of about one in a thousand would administer the highest shock on the board.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们预计只有 4% 的电压会达到 300 伏，并且只有大约千分之一的病态边缘才会对板上产生最高的冲击

vocabulary.definition: n. 适当, 足够
vocabulary.context: They refer not to the "goodness" of the person per se but to the adequacy with which a subordinate fulfills his socially defined role.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们不是指人本身的"善良"，而是指下属履行其社会定义角色的充分性

vocabulary.definition: adv. 只有一种含意地, 清楚明白地
vocabulary.context: These predictions were unequivocally wrong.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些预测显然是错误的

vocabulary.definition: n. 拖把, 鬼脸；v.t. 用拖把洗擦, 擦, 拭；v.i. 做鬼脸；[计] 维护操作协议
vocabulary.context: Many obedient subjects then heaved sighs of relief, mopped their brows, rubbed their fingers over their eyes, or nervously fumbled cigarettes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 许多听话的受试者随后松了口气，擦擦眉毛，用手指擦眼睛，或者紧张地摸索着香烟

vocabulary.definition: adj. 放荡的, 风流的
vocabulary.context: About fifty-years-old and unemployed at the time of the experiment, he has a good-natured, if slightly dissolute, appearance, and he strikes people as a rather ordinary fellow.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 实验时他大约五十岁，失业，外表善良，但略显放荡，给人的印象是一个相当普通的人

vocabulary.definition: n. 枢轴, 支点, 旋转运动, 中枢, 关键人物；adj. 枢轴的, (如)在枢轴上转动的；v.i. 在枢轴上转动, 随着转移；v.t. 装枢轴于, 以...为中心旋转；[计] 程序员交互验证和编制工具, 数据透视表
vocabulary.context: After delivering the 180-volt shock, he pivots around in the chair and, shaking his head, addresses the experimenter in agitated tones:
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 施加 180 伏电击后，他在椅子上转了一圈，摇着头，用激动的语气对实验者说道：

vocabulary.definition: n. 不在犯罪现场, 托辞；v. 为...辩解
vocabulary.context: In asserting this defense, the individual is not introducing an alibi concocted for the moment but is reporting honestly on the psychological attitude induced by submission to authority.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在主张这一辩护时，个人并不是在介绍暂时炮制的不在场证据，而是诚实地报告了因屈服于权威而引发的心理态度

vocabulary.definition: n. 中肯；关联；相关性
vocabulary.context: A colleague of mine immediately dismissed these findings as having no relevance to "ordinary" people, asserting that Yale undergraduates are a highly aggressive, competitive bunch who step on each other's necks on the slightest provocation.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我的一位同事立即驳斥了这些发现，认为这些发现与"普通"人无关，并声称耶鲁大学的本科生是一群极具攻击性、竞争性的群体，只要受到最轻微的挑衅，他们就会互相掐脖子

vocabulary.definition: adv. 沉着, 自若
vocabulary.context: On several occasions when the learner complains, she turns to the experimenter coolly and inquires, "Shall I continue?" She promptly returns to her task when the experimenter asks her to do so.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有几次，当学习者抱怨时，她会冷静地转向实验者并询问："我要继续吗？"当实验者要求她这样做时，她会立即返回任务

vocabulary.definition: n. 互补性, 互为补充；[经] 互补性
vocabulary.context: What has happened to us - it is really rather major, it is so major that I think in some ways one returns to the greatest developments of the twentieth century, to the discovery of relativity, and to the whole development of atomic theory and its interpretation in terms of complementarity, for analogy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们身上发生的事情--这确实是相当重大的，它是如此重大，以至于我认为在某些方面人们可以回到二十世纪最伟大的发展，回到相对论的发现，回到原子理论的整个发展及其在互补性方面的解释，以进行类比

vocabulary.definition: adj. 没有实现的, 没能实现的; 未实现
vocabulary.context: Others had more political arguments and said, "Well, we know that atomic weapons are in principle possible, and it is not right that the threat of their unrealized possibility should hang over the world.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 其他人则有更多的政治论点，并说："好吧，我们知道原子武器原则上是可能的，而其未实现的可能性的威胁笼罩着世界，这是不对的

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 重新考虑；重新审议；v.i. 重新考虑
vocabulary.context: These things, as you know, forced us to re-consider the relations between science and common sense.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如您所知，这些事情迫使我们重新考虑科学与常识之间的关系

vocabulary.definition: n. 不适当, 不足之处, 不充分；[医] 机能不全, 闭锁不全, 关闭不全
vocabulary.context: They forced us to be prepared for the inadequacy of the ways in which human beings attempted to deal with reality, for that reality.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们迫使我们为人类试图处理现实的方式的不足做好准备

vocabulary.definition: n. 担心的人, 发愁的人
vocabulary.context: I should like to talk tonight - if some of you have long memories perhaps you will regard it as justified - as a fellow scientist, and at least as a fellow worrier about the fix we are in.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我想今晚谈谈--如果你们中的一些人记忆力很长，也许你们会认为这是合理的--作为一名科学家同行，至少作为一个对我们所处困境的担忧者

vocabulary.definition: n. 意外, 突然
vocabulary.context: The third is that the thing we made - partly because of the technical nature of the problem, partly because we worked hard, partly because we had good breaks - really arrived in the world with such a shattering reality and suddenness that there was no opportunity for the edges to be worn off.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第三，我们所做的事情--部分是因为问题的技术性质，部分是因为我们努力工作，部分是因为我们有很好的休息时间--真的以如此令人震惊的现实和突然性来到了这个世界，以至于没有机会磨掉边缘

vocabulary.definition: n. 征收, 课税, 强加, 欺骗；[经] 征税, 税, 税款
vocabulary.context: I think that the talk has been justified, and that the almost unanimous resistance of scientists to the imposition of control and secrecy is a justified position, but I think that the reason for it may lie a little deeper.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我认为这种说法是有道理的，科学家们几乎一致抵制施加控制和保密也是有道理的立场，但我认为其原因可能更深一些

vocabulary.definition: adj. 本质的, 原有的, 真正的；[医] 内部的, 内在的
vocabulary.context: It is not possible to be a scientist unless you believe that the knowledge of the world, and the power which this gives, is a thing which is of intrinsic value to humanity, and that you are using it to help in the spread of knowledge, and are willing to take the consequences.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 除非你相信世界的知识及其所赋予的力量对人类具有内在价值，并且你正在利用它来帮助传播知识，并愿意承担后果，否则不可能成为一名科学家

vocabulary.definition: n. 平时时期, 和平
vocabulary.context: I have a very high confidence that the fruits - the so-called peacetime applications - of atomic energy will have in them all that we think, and more.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我非常有信心，原子能的成果--所谓的和平时期的应用--将拥有我们所想象的一切，甚至更多

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使卷入, 牵连
vocabulary.context: By the time it ended four years later, it had embroiled 14 "Allies," including the U.S., Great Britain, France and Russia, and four "Central Powers"-primarily Austria-Hungary, Germany, and the Ottoman Empire.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 到四年后结束时，它已经卷入了包括美国、英国、法国和俄罗斯在内的 14 个"同盟国"和四个"同盟国"--主要是奥匈帝国、德国和奥斯曼帝国

vocabulary.definition: n. 注出, 流出, 流露
vocabulary.context: In Eastern Europe, these mobile food stores were often greeted with flowers, music, and an outpouring of gratitude.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在东欧，这些流动食品店经常受到鲜花、音乐和感激之情的欢迎

vocabulary.definition: n. 争斗者, 格斗者；[法] 战斗者, 参战者
vocabulary.context: Nine million combatants and seven million civilians died in the fighting, which ended with Allied victory.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 九百万战斗人员和七百万平民在战斗中丧生，最终盟军取得胜利

vocabulary.definition: n. 抢夺, 掠夺品, 战利品；v. 掠夺, 抢劫, 抢夺
vocabulary.context: An Iowa-born Quaker, Hoover set out to save European lives after the war started and Belgium, which was plundered by the German army, began suffering severe food shortages.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 胡佛是爱荷华州出生的贵格会教徒，战争爆发后，被德国军队掠夺的比利时开始遭受严重的粮食短缺，胡佛着手拯救欧洲人的生命

vocabulary.definition: n. 格言, 座右铭；[法] 格言, 准则, 原则
vocabulary.context: Maxim Gorky, a prominent Russian author, wrote to Hoover: "Your help will enter history as a unique, gigantic achievement, worthy of the greatest glory, which will long remain in the memory of millions of Russians whom you have saved from death."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 俄罗斯著名作家马克西姆·高尔基写信给胡佛："您的帮助将作为一项独特的、巨大的成就载入史册，值得最大的荣耀，这将永远留在您从死亡线上拯救出来的数百万俄罗斯人的记忆中。"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 发音清晰的, 口才好的；v.t. 明白地说, 以关节连接, 使成为系统的整体
vocabulary.context: President Woodrow Wilson, who articulated the Allies' war aims and helped negotiate the ultimate peace treaty.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 伍德罗·威尔逊总统，阐明了盟军的战争目标并帮助谈判达成了最终的和平条约

vocabulary.definition: n. 实体, 实存物, 存在；[计] 实体
vocabulary.context: government and a nearly matching grant from Britain, Hoover made the CRB an independent entity with its own flag, navy, factories, mills, and railroads that distributed over two million tons of food to 10 million war victims.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 胡佛在政府和英国几乎同等的拨款的支持下，使 CRB 成为一个独立的实体，拥有自己的旗帜、海军、工厂、磨坊和铁路，向 1000 万战争受害者分发了超过 200 万吨食品

vocabulary.definition: n. 一点, 诅咒, 丝毫；interj. 该死, 该死的；v.t. 诅咒, 罚...下地狱；v.i. 指责, 谴责, 骂...该死, 证明...有罪
vocabulary.context: He answered that he was ready to help, "but I'll be damned if I'll give up my American citizenship-not on your life!"
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他回答说他已经准备好提供帮助，"但是如果我放弃我的美国公民身份，那我就该死了--而不是你的生命！"

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 包括, 把...算入, 包住；[计] DOS内部命令:在CONFIG.SYS文件的一个配置块中包含另一配置块的内容
vocabulary.context: By the time it ended four years later, it had embroiled 14 "Allies," including the U.S., Great Britain, France and Russia, and four "Central Powers"-primarily Austria-Hungary, Germany, and the Ottoman Empire.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 到四年后结束时，它已经卷入了包括美国、英国、法国和俄罗斯在内的 14 个"同盟国"和四个"同盟国"--主要是奥匈帝国、德国和奥斯曼帝国

vocabulary.definition: n. 神职人员, 祭司职
vocabulary.context: Smith, a Catholic grade-school dropout and a witty and irresistible charmer who, von Drehle wrote, "mastered the circular, windy language of the bill-drafting priesthood," knew "as well as anyone in Albany (New York's State capital) whose bread was buttered where," and was notorious for his skill in putting this information to use.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 史密斯是一名天主教小学辍学者，也是一位机智且令人难以抗拒的魅力者，冯·德雷勒写道，他"掌握了起草法案的牧师们循环而多变的语言"，"和奥尔巴尼（纽约州首府）的任何人一样了解他们的面包在哪里涂黄油"，并因其运用这些信息的技巧而臭名昭著

vocabulary.definition: n. 手推车( pushcart的复数形式 )
vocabulary.context: But there were not enough ambulances and patrol wagons to do the job, so the neighborhood grocers, butchers and peddlers lent their trucks and pushcarts...."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但是没有足够的救护车和巡逻车来完成这项工作，所以附近的杂货店、屠夫和小贩借出了他们的卡车和手推车......"

vocabulary.definition: n. 仿男式女衬衫
vocabulary.context: in a Lower East Side clothing factory of the Triangle Shirtwaist Company.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 位于下东区 Triangle Shirtwaist Company 的一家服装工厂

vocabulary.definition: adv. 感人地, 动人地
vocabulary.context: The heart-rending tragedy was movingly described in Forverts , a Yiddish-language daily newspaper whose unnamed reporter apparently had been at the scene:
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 意第绪语日报《Forverts》动人地描述了这场令人心碎的悲剧，其未透露姓名的记者显然曾在现场：

vocabulary.definition: n. 切断, 切下, 路堑；[化] 切屑
vocabulary.context: Someone tossed a burning match or cigarette into a big pail of scrapped cuttings, and the highly flammable material burst into a furious fire.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有人将一根燃烧的火柴或香烟扔进一大桶废弃的碎屑中，高度易燃的材料突然燃起熊熊大火

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有多层的, 高楼的；n. 高楼, 大厦
vocabulary.context: The laws were designed to correct every deficiency revealed in the Lower East Side fire: for example, it required automatic sprinklers in high-rise buildings.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些法律旨在纠正下东区火灾中暴露出的每一个缺陷：例如，它要求在高层建筑中安装自动洒水装置

vocabulary.definition: n. 楼梯井
vocabulary.context: Second, many of the employees who did get out in the hallway still could not escape because the stairwells were on fire, and the poorly maintained elevators were either too slow or crashed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 其次，许多从走廊逃出来的员工仍然无法逃生，因为楼梯间着火了，而维护不善的电梯要么太慢，要么坠毁

vocabulary.definition: n. 自治的市镇, 区
vocabulary.context: They arrived with little more than the clothes on their backs, and they headed straight from the pier for the teeming Lower East Side borough of Manhattan, which was then known as the gate to the New World.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们抵达时除了背上的衣服外什么也没带，从码头直接前往拥挤的曼哈顿下东区，那里当时被称为新世界的大门

vocabulary.definition: n. 地狱, 地狱似的地方
vocabulary.context: It took less than 30 minutes for the inferno to devour the three top floors of a ten-story building filled with 500 garment workers, almost all of them recent immigrants.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不到 30 分钟，大火就吞噬了一座 10 层建筑的顶层三层，里面有 500 名制衣工人，几乎全是新移民

vocabulary.definition: n. 无敌, 绝对不败
vocabulary.context: Their firm unity based on ideology, will, morality, and obligation is a guarantee for the invincibility of the cause of socialism.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们在思想、意志、道德、义务上的坚定团结，是社会主义事业立于不败之地的保证

vocabulary.definition: adj. 诚心的, 有诚意的, 一心一意的
vocabulary.context: We must rally all people around the Party and the leader more firmly, thus incessantly consolidating the might of the single-hearted unity." Unity and reverence for authority are two of the strongest guiding principles for the WPK's actions.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们要更加牢固地团结在党和领袖周围，不断巩固一心一意的团结力量。"团结和敬畏权威是朝鲜劳动党行动的两个最强有力的指导原则

vocabulary.definition: n. (水、电、煤)断供, 储运损耗；[化] (蓄水池为了水膨胀)预留的容量; 排出量
vocabulary.context: Most North Koreans regularly experience food shortages and power outages.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大多数朝鲜人经常经历粮食短缺和停电

vocabulary.definition: n. 祖国
vocabulary.context: One North Korean refugee explains: "You learn maths, science, biography, music, art and more but the most important subject is the life story of the Kim family." Students memorize speeches by the Kims, repeat short mantras about the Kims and "the motherland," and sing songs about their Great Leader.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一名朝鲜难民解释道："你学习数学、科学、传记、音乐、艺术等等，但最重要的科目是金氏家族的生活故事。"学生们背诵金氏家族的演讲，重复有关金氏家族和"祖国"的简短咒语，并唱关于他们伟大领袖的歌曲

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不断地, 不停地; 接连不断; 连绵不断; 不已
vocabulary.context: We must rally all people around the Party and the leader more firmly, thus incessantly consolidating the might of the single-hearted unity." Unity and reverence for authority are two of the strongest guiding principles for the WPK's actions.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们要更加牢固地团结在党和领袖周围，不断巩固一心一意的团结力量。"团结和敬畏权威是朝鲜劳动党行动的两个最强有力的指导原则

vocabulary.definition: n. 再教育；[法] 再教育, 重新教育
vocabulary.context: If you are caught and brought back to North Korea, you and your whole family will face "reeducation" and time in the labor camps, where about 40% of people die from malnutrition.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果你被抓并带回朝鲜，你和你的全家将面临"再教育"并被关进劳改营，那里大约有40%的人死于营养不良

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不正常的；n. 不正常的人(或物)

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 法院不仅起诉罪犯，还起诉政治越轨者，但往往没有经过公正的审判

vocabulary.definition: n. 背叛者, 叛离者；[法] 变节分子, 背叛者, 开小差者
vocabulary.context: Most refugees first flee to China, where some North Koreans are permitted to go for short-term business trips, but the Chinese police often work with North Korea to capture defectors.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大多数难民首先逃往中国，一些朝鲜人被允许去中国进行短期商务旅行，但中国警方经常与朝鲜合作抓捕叛逃者

vocabulary.definition: n. 瞻养费, 生活费；[经] 赡养费, 维持费

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 年底，艾姆斯与第一任妻子离婚，作为和解协议的一部分，艾姆斯同意向她支付 46,000 美元的赡养费

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 来自国外的大肆渲染的威胁"，以证明"镇压......

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这个国家的经济和社会正义运动......"他补充道："我讨厌听起来像老派斯大林主义者之类的，但是......"

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使平凡, 使琐碎

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我的意思并不是要理解为解雇我卖掉的人并轻视他们

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 政府机密，包括至少十名曾为中央情报局从事间谍活动的俄罗斯高官的姓名

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 艾姆斯虽然是一名中等雇员和一个酒鬼，但他在中央情报局工作了 31 年

vocabulary.context: Finally, Ames suggested that the spies he betrayed ran similar risks of being discovered as he had run, and therefore their fate was nothing to feel guilty about: "That is a callous thing to say, but there is a certain amount of truth to that...These two guys in the K.G.B.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 最后，艾姆斯表示，他背叛的间谍也面临着与他逃跑时类似的被发现风险，因此他们的命运没有什么值得感到内疚的："这话虽然冷酷无情，但也有一定的道理......克格勃的这两个家伙

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 艾姆斯的以下回答强调了他背叛的原因 - 并且对艾姆斯来说，是他背叛的理由：

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不能调换的, 不能代替的；[法] 不能恢复原状的, 不能替代的, 无法弥补的
vocabulary.context: (There have been some really interesting studies done showing the human brain processes information more thoroughly when it's written by hand as opposed to typed.) When I take notes from antique books and magazines I use a pencil to avoid dribbling ink on irreplaceable antique volumes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: （有一些非常有趣的研究表明，与打字相比，手写信息时，人脑处理信息的能力更彻底。）当我从古董书籍和杂志上做笔记时，我用铅笔来避免墨水滴在不可替代的古董书籍上

vocabulary.context: The slow drip of melting ice is one of the constant, quiet sounds of our home, and every morning I empty the meltwater from the driptray.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 冰融化的缓慢滴落声是我们家里持续而安静的声音之一，每天早上我都会倒掉滴水盘中的融水

vocabulary.definition: n. 非小说类文学作品

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我写了几本关于维多利亚时代以及我们与它的关系的叙事非小说类书籍

vocabulary.definition: n. 火室, 燃烧室；[化] 燃烧室
vocabulary.context: Tending the stove - cleaning its firebox, sifting the ashes, laying new fires, and keeping the fire going - has become another element of my daily routine.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 照顾炉子--清洁火箱、筛灰、生新火、让火继续燃烧--已经成为我日常生活的另一部分

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在厨房与我们的冰箱相对的角落里坐落着它的补充品：我们的燃木 Charm Crawford 炉子，这是一件经过精心修复的 1901 年古董

vocabulary.definition: adj. 易腐坏的, 会枯萎的, 易毁灭的, 不经久的；n. 易腐坏的东西

vocabulary.definition: n. 珍珠母

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我每天都写日记，用的是我用第一本书预付款的一部分买的古董珍珠母钢笔

vocabulary.definition: adj. 普通的( common的最高级 ); 通俗的; [数学]公共的; 公有的
vocabulary.context: ...of truth reflected from these objects that we are enabled to...pierce the...fiction with which the perspective of years surrounds the commonest objects of those remote times." - Beard, Dan C.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...从这些物体中反映出来的真相是，我们能够...刺穿...虚构的事物，通过岁月的视角围绕那些遥远时代最常见的物体。" - Beard, Dan C.

vocabulary.definition: adj. 家常的, 平凡的, 朴实无华的
vocabulary.context: ...utensils, and antique furniture, have appealed to me with peculiar force, telling facts and relating incidents to me in such a plain, homely but graphic manner of the every-day life of our ancestors, that I look upon them more as text-books than as curiosities; for it is only by the light of truth reflected from these objects that we are...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ......器皿和古董家具以一种特殊的力量吸引着我，它们以一种简单、朴素但生动的方式向我讲述了我们祖先日常生活的事实和事件，以至于我将它们视为教科书而不是好奇心；因为只有通过从这些物体反射的真理之光，我们才是......

vocabulary.definition: adv. 严谨, 一丝不苟, 用心, 准确, 多顾虑, 小心翼翼, 审慎, 诚实, 真心实意
vocabulary.context: Even the clothes we wear every day are scrupulously patterned after Victorian antiques and nineteenth-century fashion plates.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 甚至我们每天穿的衣服都是精心按照维多利亚时代的古董和十九世纪的时装盘制作的

vocabulary.definition: n. 频带宽度, 通带宽度；[计] 带宽, 频宽
vocabulary.context: Most of the schools do not have enough computers or internet bandwidth to meet national standards.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大多数学校没有足够的计算机或互联网带宽来满足国家标准

vocabulary.definition: n. （北美印第安人的）议事会; 会议；聚会；商谈
vocabulary.context: Perhaps the most common cultural event on reservations across the country is the pow-wow.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 也许全国保留地最常见的文化活动是"pow-wow"

vocabulary.definition: n. <美>棍子球（孩子们在街巷内玩的一种类似棒球的）游戏
vocabulary.context: For example, on Cherokee reservations in Georgia and Missouri, communities come together to perform traditional stomp dances and play an ancient game called stickball.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 例如，在佐治亚州和密苏里州的切罗基族保留地，社区聚集在一起表演传统的跺脚舞，并玩一种叫做棍球的古老游戏

vocabulary.definition: n. 沉浸, 专心, 陷入；[医] 浸, 浸渍
vocabulary.context: Some tribes have programs that allow young students to experience daily language immersion with elders who learned the original language growing up.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一些部落制定了一些计划，允许年轻学生与在成长过程中学习母语的长辈一起体验日常语言沉浸

vocabulary.definition: adj. 记录的, 记录用的；n. 录音
vocabulary.context: Since some of the languages have been lost completely, historians have been able to piece them back together using early recordings of folk tales and legends.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由于一些语言已经完全消失，历史学家已经能够利用早期的民间故事和传说记录将它们拼凑起来

vocabulary.definition: n. 期待, 期望的事物, 嘱望, 希望, 期望, 预期；[医] 预期
vocabulary.context: The life expectancy on the Pine Ridge Indian Reservation is 48 years for men and 52 for women, which are the second-lowest averages in the entire western hemisphere.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 松岭印第安人保留地的男性预期寿命为 48 岁，女性为 52 岁，这是整个西半球第二低的平均寿命

vocabulary.definition: n. 酒, 液体, 汁, 溶液；v.t. 浸水；v.i. 喝酒
vocabulary.context: The exact numbers are disputed, but alcohol addiction is notoriously high on many of the reservations, despite laws against the sale and purchase of liquor.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 确切的数字存在争议，但众所周知，尽管法律禁止买卖酒类，但许多保留地的酒精成瘾率很高

vocabulary.definition: adj. 清楚的, 显著的, 不同的
vocabulary.context: Many tribes continue to practice key parts of their distinct cultures.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 许多部落继续实践其独特文化的关键部分

vocabulary.definition: adv. 在战略上, 颇策略地
vocabulary.context: In one of their earliest missions, a group was assigned to attack a strategically located island in the Mediterranean Sea, near Italy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在他们最早的一项任务中，一个小组被指派攻击意大利附近地中海上一个具有战略意义的岛屿

vocabulary.definition: n. 精通, 熟练, 精练
vocabulary.context: Their proficiency struck blows at previous race-based policies in the military; they soon needed to undergo highly advanced training that African Americans had previously been barred from receiving.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们的熟练程度对以前军队中基于种族的政策造成了打击；他们很快就需要接受非裔美国人以前被禁止接受的高级培训

vocabulary.definition: adj. & adv. （尤指第一次和第二次世界大战）战前（的）
vocabulary.context: Their success was due to their extensive pre-war experience and their personal strength and drive during training and combat.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们的成功归功于他们丰富的战前经验以及训练和战斗中的个人力量和动力

vocabulary.definition: n. 种族隔离主义者
vocabulary.context: The 477th Bombardment Group faced more challenges, as one of their early commanders was an overt racial segregationist.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第 477 轰炸大队面临更多挑战，因为其早期指挥官之一是公开的种族隔离主义者

vocabulary.definition: n. 骑兵营, 分遣队, 小舰队
vocabulary.context: The 332nd Fighter Group became one of the most successful squadrons of fighter planes in the Army.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第332战斗机大队成为陆军最成功的战斗机中队之一

vocabulary.definition: n. 家庭教师, 导师, 助教, 监护人；v.t. 当...的教师, 教, 指导, 约束, 克制；v.i. 当家庭教师, 受家庭教师的指导
vocabulary.context: Alfred "Chief" Anderson, who had become an unofficial leader and tutor in the group because of his skills.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 阿尔弗雷德"酋长"安德森，由于他的技能而成为该团体的非官方领导者和导师

vocabulary.definition: n. 人员, 人事部门, 人事科(处)；[经] 人事, 全体人员, 职工
vocabulary.context: The charges were soon dropped because they were so unfair, but the events demonstrated the severe racism African American military personnel continued to face even though they were so successful.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些指控很快就被撤销，因为它们太不公平了，但这些事件表明，尽管非洲裔美国军人取得了如此成功，但他们仍然面临着严重的种族主义

vocabulary.definition: n. 护送者, 护卫者, 护航舰；v.t. 护卫, 护送
vocabulary.context: In later assignments, they became most famous for their ability to escort larger bomber planes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在后来的任务中，他们因护航大型轰炸机的能力而闻名

vocabulary.definition: n. 肤色, 情况, 局面；[医] 体质; 面色, 面容
vocabulary.context: A rash, affecting my complexion,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 皮疹影响了我的肤色，

vocabulary.definition: adv. 暂时, 一时, 临时
vocabulary.context: Temporarily scars my reputation,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 暂时伤了我的名誉，

vocabulary.definition: v. 避开, 躲避；n. 诡计, 躲藏
vocabulary.context: I try to dodge all the darts that you're throwing at me,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我试图躲开你向我投掷的所有飞镖，

vocabulary.definition: n. 虐待, 迫害运动, 迫害, 烦扰；[法] 迫害, 虐待, 困扰
vocabulary.context: I question why the truth has led to persecution.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我质疑为什么真相会导致迫害

vocabulary.definition: n. 名誉, 名声, 声望；[法] 名声, 名誉, 公认证据
vocabulary.context: Temporarily scars my reputation,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 暂时伤了我的名誉，

vocabulary.definition: n. 抓痕, 搔, 抓, 擦伤, 刮擦声, 乱写, 零分, 起跑线；v.t. 搔, 抓, 挖出, 擦, 刮, 乱涂, 勾抹掉；v.i. 搔, 抓, 发刮擦声, 勉强糊口；adj. 碰巧的, 凑合的, 打草稿用的；[计] 擦除
vocabulary.context: I try to scratch off the lies that are said against me,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我努力撕掉那些针对我的谎言，

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无罪的, 不懂事的, 无知的；n. 天真的人, 笨蛋
vocabulary.context: And you will find me innocent,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你会发现我是无辜的，

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 指责, 控告, 归咎于；v.i. 指责, 控告
vocabulary.context: How you're accusing me,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你是如何指责我的

vocabulary.definition: n. 谎言, 假象, 位置；v.i. 躺着, 说谎, 位于, 展现, 存在, 停泊；v.t. 谎骗
vocabulary.context: He will show you who is lying.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他会告诉你谁在说谎

vocabulary.definition: n. 中产阶级化
vocabulary.context: declined and gentrification increased, new residents felt they could safely move into lower cost, "up-and-coming" neighborhoods.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 随着人口的减少和中产阶级化的增加，新居民认为他们可以安全地搬进成本较低的"新兴"社区

vocabulary.definition: n. 再开发；重点恢复
vocabulary.context: But such murals, often done by local graffiti artists who were themselves deeply rooted in the Chicano community, were forced to make room for "street art" in the context of neighborhood change and urban redevelopment.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但这些壁画通常是由扎根于奇卡诺社区的当地涂鸦艺术家创作的，在社区变革和城市重建的背景下，被迫为"街头艺术"腾出空间

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使中产阶级化; 使显得高雅; 修复或改善; 使优化；v.i. 进行改善工作
vocabulary.context: Today, many cities, from Pittsburgh to Pretoria, invite street artists to help brand neighborhoods that are being revitalized and gentrified as legitimately hip destinations for business owners, home buyers and influencers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如今，从匹兹堡到比勒陀利亚，许多城市都邀请街头艺术家来帮助正在振兴和高档化的社区打造品牌，使其成为企业主、购房者和影响者的时尚目的地

vocabulary.definition: adv. 违法地, 不正地
vocabulary.context: Rather, police and district attorneys, backed by a morally panicked public, were making an example of graffiti writers, charging them with felonies, giving them six-figure fines and sending them to prison for illicitly marking walls.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 相反，警察和地方检察官在道德恐慌的公众的支持下，以涂鸦作家为例，指控他们犯有重罪，对他们处以六位数的罚款，并因非法在墙壁上做标记而将他们送进监狱

vocabulary.definition: adv. 充满活力地
vocabulary.context: The vibrantly colored walls in such places attract travelers to parts of town once deemed "sketchy." These same neighborhoods are home to bookstores that carry graffiti coffee table books and universities that offer courses on graffiti art.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些地方色彩鲜艳的墙壁吸引着游客前往曾经被认为"简陋"的城镇部分地区。这些街区还有出售涂鸦咖啡桌书籍的书店和提供涂鸦艺术课程的大学

vocabulary.definition: n. 美学
vocabulary.context: In the midst of this struggle over wall space and aesthetics, many of my friends were invited inside to tag the walls of the Art in the Streets exhibition.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在这场关于墙壁空间和美学的斗争中，我的许多朋友被邀请进去为"街头艺术"展览的墙壁贴上标签

vocabulary.definition: n. <美>(住在美国的)花衣墨西哥(裔)少年流氓
vocabulary.context: Self-described critical Chicana muralists, such as Judith Baca, and pachuco graffiti writers such as Chaz Bojórquez, had been painting on walls around Los Angeles as early as the 1970s.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 早在 20 世纪 70 年代，朱迪思·巴卡 (Judith Baca) 等自称为批判奇卡纳壁画家的朱迪思·巴卡 (Judith Baca) 和查兹·博霍尔克斯 (Chaz Bojórquez) 等帕丘科涂鸦作家就一直在洛杉矶周围的墙壁上作画

vocabulary.definition: n. 名字，绰号( moniker的名词复数 )
vocabulary.context: Law enforcement didn't seem to understand what the writing on walls meant or who was behind those cryptic images and personal monikers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 执法部门似乎不明白墙上的文字意味着什么，也不明白这些神秘图像和个人绰号背后的人是谁

vocabulary.definition: adv. 正当地；合理地
vocabulary.context: Today, many cities, from Pittsburgh to Pretoria, invite street artists to help brand neighborhoods that are being revitalized and gentrified as legitimately hip destinations for business owners, home buyers and influencers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如今，从匹兹堡到比勒陀利亚，许多城市都邀请街头艺术家来帮助正在振兴和高档化的社区打造品牌，使其成为企业主、购房者和影响者的时尚目的地

vocabulary.definition: adj. 长期存在的
vocabulary.context: While physical displacement was being experienced firsthand by long-standing residents, the transformation of the walls in these communities symbolized a broader cultural change.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 虽然长期居住的居民亲身经历了实际的流离失所，但这些社区墙壁的改造象征着更广泛的文化变革

vocabulary.definition: n. 波尔图（葡萄牙港口）
vocabulary.context: Omnia mea mecum porto , as they say.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 正如他们所说，Omnia mea mecum porto

vocabulary.definition: adj. 高傲的, 自大的
vocabulary.context: I repeat, she is a lovely person, and all your remarks and attitudes - well, excuse me, but you're just being stuck-up...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我再说一遍，她是一个可爱的人，而你所有的言论和态度--好吧，对不起，但你只是自以为是......

vocabulary.definition: adj. 相貌好看的, 吸引人的
vocabulary.context: I know he's not very good-looking, but he's a good man, an honest man...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我知道他长得不太好看，但他是一个好人，一个诚实的人......

vocabulary.definition: n. 养老金, 退休金, 津贴, 年金, 抚恤金, 膳宿学校, 膳宿费；v.t. 发给退休金, 用津贴拉拢
vocabulary.context: I don't gamble anymore, I gave it up, but the main thing is you're all girls, you get a military pension, and I don't!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我不再赌博了，我放弃了，但最主要的是你们都是女孩，你们有军人抚恤金，而我没有！

vocabulary.definition: adv. 心不在焉地
vocabulary.context: ( MÁSHA looks up absently and whistles under her breath.)
vocabulary.contextTranslation: （玛莎心不在焉地抬起头，低声吹口哨。）

vocabulary.definition: adj. 笔直的, 率直的, 明确的, 简单的, 直接的
vocabulary.context: Natásha is a lovely person, honest and straightforward and well brought up, in my opinion.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在我看来，娜塔莎是一个可爱的人，诚实、直率、有教养

vocabulary.definition: n. 抵押, 约束性义务, 抵押借款；v.t. 抵押, 以...作担保, 把...许给
vocabulary.context: (Pause) In the third place - I have something more to say - I mortgaged this house, and I didn't get your permission.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: （停顿）第三--我还有话要说--这房子是我抵押的，我没有得到你的许可

vocabulary.definition: adj. 琐碎的, 小规模的, 小气的, 委琐的；[经] 小额的, 微小的, 小规模的
vocabulary.context: IRÍNA: Andréy has gotten so petty, so slow, and so old, living with that woman.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: IRÍNA：安德烈和那个女人住在一起变得如此小气，如此缓慢，如此苍老

vocabulary.definition: n. 闲谈；v.i. 闲谈
vocabulary.context: He shoved away his desire to schmooze with Santa, but days later, Santa drew his focus again when we drove by glittering lights on trees in our town's main green.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他放弃了与圣诞老人闲聊的愿望，但几天后，当我们开车经过镇上主要绿地的树木上闪烁的灯光时，圣诞老人再次吸引了他的注意力

vocabulary.definition: adv. 实事求是地, 切合实际地, 就事论事地
vocabulary.context: "I don't celebrate Christmas," he said matter-of-factly.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我不庆祝圣诞节，"他实事求是地说

vocabulary.definition: adv. 对抗地；挑战地
vocabulary.context: As a child, when someone asked me what I wanted from Santa, I often responded defiantly and rudely.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 小时候，当有人问我想从圣诞老人那里得到什么时，我经常挑衅和粗鲁地回答

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使...惊讶得发呆
vocabulary.context: I was dumbfounded and proud.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我既傻眼又自豪

vocabulary.definition: adj. 纺锤形的, 细长的
vocabulary.context: Just behind her, gold ball ornaments shimmered on the cafe's spindly Christmas tree.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在她身后，金球装饰品在咖啡馆细长的圣诞树上闪闪发光

vocabulary.definition: n. 向前推的人, 支持者, 后援者, 升压器；[化] 爆管; 扩爆药; 传爆药; 升压机; 增压装置; 升压器; 助促进剂
vocabulary.context: He fell silent in his booster seat.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他在加高座椅上陷入了沉默

vocabulary.definition: n. 疑问, 疑问号, 质问, 查询；v. 询问, 质问；[计] 查询
vocabulary.context: The well-meaning woman had asked what she probably saw as an innocent query.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这位善意的女士问了她可能认为是无辜的问题

vocabulary.definition: n. 尊崇, 尊敬, 效忠
vocabulary.context: On the eighth night, we plan to attend a friend's "ChrisKwanukah" celebration, a party paying homage to three winter holidays.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第八天晚上，我们计划参加一个朋友的"ChrisKwanukah"庆祝活动，这是一个纪念三个寒假的聚会

vocabulary.definition: n. 自我肯定
vocabulary.context: It is a time of communal self-affirmation - when famous Black heroes and heroines, as well as late family members - are celebrated.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是一个集体自我肯定的时刻--著名的黑人英雄和女英雄以及已故的家庭成员都受到庆祝

vocabulary.definition: n. (黑人穿的)颜色花哨的短袖套衫
vocabulary.context: Wearing an African dashiki, he led those in attendance - Blacks and whites and those of other ethnicities - in Kwanzaa songs and recitations.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他戴着非洲大什基，带领出席者--黑人、白人和其他族裔--唱宽扎节歌曲和朗诵

vocabulary.definition: n. 宽扎（安哥拉货币单位）
vocabulary.context: Its name is derived from the phrase "matunda ya kwanza" which means "first fruits" in Swahili, the most widely spoken African language.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 其名称源自短语"matunda ya kwanza"，在非洲使用最广泛的语言斯瓦希里语中意为"初熟果实"

vocabulary.definition: n. 画像, 肖像, 偶像, 图标, 像标；[计] 像标, 图标
vocabulary.context: Those in attendance, young and old, Black and white, held hands and chanted slogans celebrating Black heroes and heroines, as diverse as the civil rights icons, Rosa Parks and Rev.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 出席者，无论年轻还是年长，黑人还是白人，都手拉着手，高呼口号，庆祝黑人英雄和女英雄，包括民权偶像罗莎·帕克斯和牧师

vocabulary.definition: n. 肯定, 断言, 证实；[医] 肯定, 确认
vocabulary.context: It is a time of communal self-affirmation - when famous Black heroes and heroines, as well as late family members - are celebrated.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是一个集体自我肯定的时刻--著名的黑人英雄和女英雄以及已故的家庭成员都受到庆祝

vocabulary.definition: n. 听众席, 礼堂；[医] 大讲堂, 大会堂
vocabulary.context: The auditorium was packed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 礼堂里挤满了人

vocabulary.definition: adj. 值得花时间的, 值得做的, 有真实价值的
vocabulary.context: For the African-American community, Kwanzaa is not just any "Black holiday." It is a recognition that knowledge of Black history is worthwhile.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对于非裔美国人社区来说，宽扎节不仅仅是一个"黑色节日"。人们认识到了解黑人历史是有价值的

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 符合, 通信, 相当；[法] 符合, 一致, 相当
vocabulary.context: On a table decorated in kente cloth, a traditional African fabric, was a kinara, which contains seven holes, to correspond to the Seven Principles of Kwanzaa.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在一张用肯特布（一种传统的非洲织物）装饰的桌子上，放着一个基纳拉（kinara），它有七个孔，与宽扎节的七项原则相对应

vocabulary.definition: n. 处理者, 操作者, 拳击教练；[经] 管理者
vocabulary.context: Player with Railroads and the Nation's Freight Handler;
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 铁路玩家和国家货运搬运工；

vocabulary.definition: n. 枪手, 持枪的歹徒, 制造枪械者；[法] 持枪歹徒, 持枪抢劫或杀人者, 枪炮工人
vocabulary.context: And they tell me you are crooked and I answer: Yes, it is true I have seen the gunman kill and go free to kill again.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们告诉我你是骗子，我回答：是的，这是真的，我看到枪手杀人，然后再次杀人

vocabulary.definition: n. 荡妇, 水性杨花的女人；adj. 恶意的, 不负责任的, 无节制的, 嬉戏的, 繁茂的, 淫荡的；v.i. 变化无常, 嬉戏, 闲荡, 放肆；v.t. 挥霍
vocabulary.context: And they tell me you are brutal and my reply is: On the faces of women and children I have seen the marks of wanton hunger.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们告诉我你很残忍，我的回答是：在妇女和儿童的脸上，我看到了肆意饥饿的痕迹

vocabulary.definition: adj. 半裸的
vocabulary.context: Laughing the stormy, husky, brawling laughter of Youth, half-naked, sweating, proud to be Hog Butcher, Tool Maker, Stacker of Wheat, Player with Railroads and Freight Handler to the Nation.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 欢笑青年的暴风雨、沙哑、吵闹的笑声，半裸、汗流浃背，自豪地成为生猪屠夫、工具制造者、小麦堆垛机、铁路玩家和国家货运搬运工

vocabulary.definition: n. 打击力强的选手, 重击者

vocabulary.definition: n. 荒地, 无人地带, 真空地带, 无主土地

FDR denounced the court for creating a "'no-man's-land' where no Government - State or Federal - can function." He asked Congress to empower him to appoint an additional justice for any member of the court over age 70 who did not retire.

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 俄狄浦斯从她衣服上取下两颗别针，挖出了自己的眼睛

vocabulary.definition: v. 预言, 预报
vocabulary.context: The Oracle prophesied that if Laius should have a son, the son would kill his father and marry his mother, Jocasta.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 神谕预言，如果拉伊俄斯生一个儿子，这个儿子就会弑父娶母伊俄卡斯塔

vocabulary.definition: adj. 未被认出的, 未被认定的, 未被承认的
vocabulary.context: Here he encounters a chariot, driven by his (unrecognized) birth-father, King Laius.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在这里，他遇到了一辆战车，由他（未被认出的）生父国王拉伊俄斯驾驶

vocabulary.definition: n. 二轮战车
vocabulary.context: Here he encounters a chariot, driven by his (unrecognized) birth-father, King Laius.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在这里，他遇到了一辆战车，由他（未被认出的）生父国王拉伊俄斯驾驶

vocabulary.definition: n. 双打比赛；灯笼裤；四人舞；四人单桨无舵手（four的复数）
vocabulary.context: The riddle was: "What walks on four feet in the morning, two in the afternoon and three at night?" Oedipus answers: "Man; as an infant, he crawls on all fours, as an adult, he walks on two legs and, in old age, he relies on a walking stick." Oedipus was the first to answer the riddle correctly.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这个谜语是："什么东西早上用四只脚走路，下午用两只脚走路，晚上用三只脚走路？"俄狄浦斯回答说："人，婴儿时用四肢爬行，成年时用两条腿行走，老年时则依靠拐杖。"俄狄浦斯是第一个正确回答这个谜语的人

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不知情地；不知不觉地；不经意地
vocabulary.context: They fight over who has the right to go first and Oedipus kills Laius in self defense, unwittingly fulfilling part of the prophecy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们为谁有权先行而争吵，俄狄浦斯出于自卫杀死了拉伊俄斯，无意中实现了部分预言

vocabulary.definition: v. 恳求, 乞求
vocabulary.context: Jocasta, finally realizing Oedipus' true identity, entreats him to abandon his search for Laius' murderer.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 伊俄卡斯塔终于意识到俄狄浦斯的真实身份，恳求他放弃寻找杀害拉伊俄斯的凶手

vocabulary.definition: n. 独占, 专卖；[经] 专利, 垄断
vocabulary.context: Trujillo built his wealth by ruling the economy with shear force, monopolization, and government subsidies.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 特鲁希略通过用剪切力、垄断和政府补贴统治经济来积累财富

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 独占, 垄断；[经] 垄断, 专营, 专利
vocabulary.context: Trujillo at this point was at his peak of power, monopolizing the Dominican economy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 此时的特鲁希略正处于权力巅峰，垄断了多米尼加的经济

vocabulary.definition: n. 补助金, 津贴；[经] 补助金, 津贴, 补贴
vocabulary.context: Trujillo built his wealth by ruling the economy with shear force, monopolization, and government subsidies.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 特鲁希略通过用剪切力、垄断和政府补贴统治经济来积累财富

vocabulary.definition: v. （动植物的）变种( morph的过去式和过去分词 ); 变体; 语子; 语素形式
vocabulary.context: By 1929, when the National Police morphed into the National Army, he became a brigadier general and was then appointed head of the National Army.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1929年，当国家警察演变为国民军时，他成为准将，然后被任命为国民军司令

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无准备的, 即席的, 不期而遇的
vocabulary.context: This long break left the capital and nation unprepared to deal with this disaster leaving them vulnerable.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这段漫长的休息时间使首都和国家没有做好应对这场灾难的准备，使他们变得脆弱

vocabulary.definition: adj. 战争的, 军事的, 尚武的, 威武的；[医] 含铁的
vocabulary.context: This disaster led to the dictator declaring a state of emergency and martial law.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这场灾难导致独裁者宣布进入紧急状态和戒严

vocabulary.definition: n. 残忍, 无慈悲, 野蛮的行为
vocabulary.context: The country would not tolerate such brutality against women.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这个国家不会容忍这种针对妇女的暴力行为

vocabulary.definition: adj. 腐败的, 贪污的, 讹误充斥的；v.t. 使腐烂, 腐蚀, 使恶化；v.i. 腐烂, 堕落
vocabulary.context: Female influence would result in international exposure of a corrupt dictator, pressure a scrambling Trujillo, and eventually lead to his assassination.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 女性的影响力将导致腐败独裁者的国际曝光，给混乱的特鲁希略施加压力，并最终导致他被暗杀

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不一致地
vocabulary.context: The gods were highly emotional and behaved inconsistently and sometimes immorally.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 众神非常情绪化，行为不一致，有时甚至是不道德的

vocabulary.definition: n. 美化了的东西
vocabulary.context: The glorification of the human form and of human accomplishment defined ancient Greek art, philosophy, literature, and religion.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对人类形态和人类成就的颂扬定义了古希腊艺术、哲学、文学和宗教

vocabulary.definition: adv. 淫荡地; 不正经地; 不道德地; 品行不良地
vocabulary.context: The gods were highly emotional and behaved inconsistently and sometimes immorally.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 众神非常情绪化，行为不一致，有时甚至是不道德的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 多神教的, 多神论者的, 信奉多神的
vocabulary.context: The ancient Greeks were polytheistic - that is, they worshipped many gods.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 古希腊人是多神论者--也就是说，他们崇拜许多神

vocabulary.definition: adv. 口头, 口语, 口述, 口, 用口发声, 口部
vocabulary.context: These two poems were passed down orally over many generations.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这两首诗被世代口耳相传

vocabulary.definition: adj. 绝无错误的, 绝对可靠的；n. 一贯正确的人
vocabulary.context: The Greek gods had human emotions, looked like humans, and behaved more like people than infallible gods.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 希腊众神有人类的情感，看起来像人类，行为也更像人，而不是绝对正确的神

vocabulary.definition: n. 歌剧
vocabulary.context: A Soap Opera from Hellas
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 希腊肥皂剧

vocabulary.definition: adv. 活跃地, 积极地
vocabulary.context: In myths, gods often actively intervened in the day-to-day lives of humans.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在神话中，神经常积极干预人类的日常生活

vocabulary.definition: n. 实际性, 实用性, 实际事物
vocabulary.context: These alliances were based more on practicality than cultural similarities.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些联盟更多地基于实用性而不是文化相似性

vocabulary.definition: n. 没收物, 罚金, 丧失；[经] 没收, 没收物, 罚金
vocabulary.context: The significant loss of French presence in North America might have benefitted Native Americans at one point, but the forfeiture left this territory open to British (and later American) expansion and rule.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 法国在北美的存在的重大损失可能一度使美洲原住民受益，但这种丧失使这片领土向英国（以及后来的美国）扩张和统治开放

vocabulary.definition: n. 馈赠
vocabulary.context: For example, the British failed to understand a common gift-giving practice among many tribes; they received much but gave little back.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 例如，英国人无法理解许多部落之间常见的送礼习俗；他们得到了很多，但回报却很少

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 付还, 偿还, 赔偿；[经] 偿付, 赔还, 付还; 偿还
vocabulary.context: Pitt turned command of recruitment and supplies over to local authorities in America and promised to reimburse them for their efforts.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 皮特将招募和补给的指挥权移交给了美国地方当局，并承诺补偿他们的努力

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使平静, 使缓和
vocabulary.context: But the spirits of the slain are to be satisfied in either of two ways; the first is by the spilling of the blood of the nation by which they fell; the other by covering the bodies of the dead , and thus allaying the resentment of their relations.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但是被杀者的灵魂可以通过两种方式得到满足：第一个是导致他们倒下的国家的鲜血流淌；另一个是覆盖死者的尸体，从而减轻他们亲属的怨恨

vocabulary.definition: adv. 在军事上
vocabulary.context: Militarily, the tide began to turn, as the British captured Louisbourg, an important strategic port the British used to close the St.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 军事上，随着英国占领了路易斯堡，英国用来关闭圣劳伦斯河的重要战略港口，形势开始发生转变

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 再排列, 重新整理；[计] 重新排列; 重新整理
vocabulary.context: He committed more troops and rearranged commanding officers, replacing old war heroes with energetic young ones.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他增派了兵力，重新安排了指挥官，用精力充沛的年轻人取代了老英雄

vocabulary.definition: n. 剧痛, 阵痛；[医] 剧痛
vocabulary.context: Meanwhile, England was in the throes of civil war.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 与此同时，英国正处于内战的阵痛之中

vocabulary.definition: n. 把持, 支持, 保持；[法] 租借地, 占有物, 拥有的财产
vocabulary.context: After losses were incurred during King George's War, the French maintained their North American holdings only by ceding land to Britain elsewhere.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在乔治国王战争期间遭受损失后，法国人只能通过在其他地方割让土地给英国来维持其在北美的领土

vocabulary.definition: n. 上级法院向下级法院/准司法机构调取案卷的令状；[经] 复审令
vocabulary.context: The justices choose about 90% of their 80 or so annual cases by writ of certiorari, an order to send up a case record from a lower court.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每年大约 80 起案件中，法官们通过调卷令（下级法院提交案件记录的命令）选择大约 90%

vocabulary.definition: n. 参变数, 参变量, 参数, 参量；[计] 参量; 参数
vocabulary.context: The Constitution provides broad parameters for the judicial nomination process.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 《宪法》为司法提名程序提供了广泛的参数

vocabulary.definition: adv. 过细地, 细致地
vocabulary.context: Despite meticulously outlining qualifications for the House of Representatives, the Senate, and the presidency, the Constitution is silent on judicial qualifications.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管宪法详细规定了众议院、参议院和总统的资格，但宪法对司法资格却只字不提

vocabulary.definition: adj. 政治的, 统治上的, 政府的；[法] 政府的, 统治的, 政治上的
vocabulary.context: Experience - Most nominees have had substantial judicial or governmental experience, either on the state or federal level.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 经验 - 大多数提名人都拥有丰富的州或联邦司法或政府经验

vocabulary.definition: adv. 定期, 循环, 间歇, 周期, 定期刊行, 期刊
vocabulary.context: They announce their decisions periodically, then disappear into their "Marble Palace."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们定期宣布他们的决定，然后消失在他们的"大理石宫殿"中

vocabulary.definition: n. 空, 空白, 空缺, 空虚, 空闲；[化] 空位
vocabulary.context: Still, many vacancies do occur during a president's term of office, and the rarest and most important of these are the seats on the Supreme Court.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管如此，在总统任期内确实会出现许多空缺，其中最稀有和最重要的是最高法院的席位

vocabulary.definition: adj. 稀罕的, 罕有的, 珍奇的, 稀薄的, 半熟的, 非常好的；adv. 非常
vocabulary.context: Still, many vacancies do occur during a president's term of office, and the rarest and most important of these are the seats on the Supreme Court.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管如此，在总统任期内确实会出现许多空缺，其中最稀有和最重要的是最高法院的席位

vocabulary.definition: n. 资格, 条件, 限制；[计] 限定
vocabulary.context: Despite meticulously outlining qualifications for the House of Representatives, the Senate, and the presidency, the Constitution is silent on judicial qualifications.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管宪法详细规定了众议院、参议院和总统的资格，但宪法对司法资格却只字不提

vocabulary.definition: adj. 非民主的, 不民主的
vocabulary.context: The position of dictator was very undemocratic in nature.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 独裁者的地位本质上是非常不民主的

vocabulary.definition: n. 浪费的人；adj. 浪费的, 挥霍无度的
vocabulary.context: A spendthrift is forbidden to exercise administration over his own goods.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 禁止挥霍者管理自己的财产

vocabulary.definition: n. 中世纪法庭, 地区元老院, 元老院, 法庭；[化] 二氧化锔
vocabulary.context: The Senate convened and passed laws in the curia, a large building on the grounds of the Roman Forum.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 元老院在罗马广场上的一座大型建筑库里亚召开并通过法律

vocabulary.definition: adj. 生而自由的, 自由民的, 适合于自由民的
vocabulary.context: The full citizen could vote, marry freeborn persons, and practice commerce.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 正式公民可以投票、与自由人结婚以及从事商业活动

vocabulary.definition: adj. 参议院的, 由参议员组成的；[法] 上议院的, 参议院的, 参议员的
vocabulary.context: Senatorial control was eventually challenged by Dictator Sulla around 82 B.C.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 元老院的控制权最终在公元前 82 年左右受到独裁者苏拉的挑战

vocabulary.definition: n. 贵族, 有教养的人；adj. 贵族的, 显贵的
vocabulary.context: In Roman society, the aristocrats were known as patricians.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在罗马社会，贵族被称为贵族

vocabulary.definition: n. 布告, 法令；[经] 布告, 法令
vocabulary.context: Around 90 B.C., non-Roman allies of the Republic gained the rights of citizenship, and by 212 A.D., under the Edict of Caracalla, all free people of the Roman Empire could become citizens.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 公元前90年左右，共和国的非罗马盟友获得了公民权，到公元212年，根据卡拉卡拉法令，罗马帝国的所有自由民都可以成为公民

vocabulary.definition: n. 演讲, 雄辩术, 演讲术, 雄辩
vocabulary.context: They practiced the skills of rhetoric and oratory to persuade other members of the ruling body.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们练习修辞和演讲技巧来说服统治机构的其他成员

vocabulary.definition: n. 贵族
vocabulary.context: In Roman society, the aristocrats were known as patricians.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在罗马社会，贵族被称为贵族

vocabulary.definition: n. 处女；adj. 处女的, 贞洁的, 纯洁的, 初始的, 纯的
vocabulary.context: Females shall remain in guardianship even when they have attained their majority (except Vestal Virgins).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 女性即使已成年（维斯塔贞女除外），仍应受到监护

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无决断力的, 不果断的, 无决心的, 未解决的, 未澄清的, 未议决的, 未分解的；[计] 非分辩的
vocabulary.context: World War II was fought over differences left unresolved after World War I.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第二次世界大战是由于第一次世界大战后未解决的分歧而爆发的

vocabulary.definition: n. 孤立主义者
vocabulary.context: "Isolationist" clubs spread across the land.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "孤立主义"俱乐部遍布全国

vocabulary.definition: n. 矛尖, 先锋队, 先头部队；v.t. 做先锋, 带头
vocabulary.context: The nuclear weapon was developed after a massive, secret research project spearheaded by the United States government.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 核武器是在美国政府牵头的一项大规模秘密研究项目之后开发出来的

vocabulary.definition: n. 法西斯主义者, 法西斯党员
vocabulary.context: Roosevelt, the United States used its industrial power to start supporting the Allies - the democratic countries fighting against the fascist "Axis" countries of Germany, Japan, and Italy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 罗斯福上任后，美国利用其工业力量开始支持同盟国--民主国家对抗德国、日本、意大利等法西斯"轴心国"

vocabulary.definition: n. 法西斯主义, 极端国家主义
vocabulary.context: Meanwhile, fascism swept Italy and Germany.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 与此同时，法西斯主义席卷了意大利和德国

vocabulary.definition: adj. 远程的, 远大的, 长期的；[化] 远程的; 长距离的; 长期的; 长远的
vocabulary.context: Germans developed rockets that could travel great distances, creating a new era of long-range warfare.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 德国人研制出可以远距离飞行的火箭，开创了远程战争的新时代

vocabulary.definition: n. 再布置, 变换布置；[经] 重新安置
vocabulary.context: As a result of this fear, and anti-Japanese racism, over 110,000 Japanese Americans were forced from their homes and sent to distant relocation camps.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由于这种恐惧和反日种族主义，超过 110,000 名日裔美国人被迫离开家园，并被送往遥远的安置营

vocabulary.definition: v. 加燃料（fuel的过去分词）
vocabulary.context: Germany, under the leadership of Adolf Hitler, fueled the most fear.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在阿道夫·希特勒领导下的德国引发了最严重的恐惧

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可防止的, 可阻止的, 可预防的
vocabulary.context: Preventable, treatable diseases like diarrhea, measles and malaria threaten the health of refugee children, especially those under 5.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 腹泻、麻疹和疟疾等可预防、可治疗的疾病威胁着难民儿童的健康，尤其是 5 岁以下的儿童

vocabulary.definition: n. 腹泻；[医] 腹泻
vocabulary.context: Preventable, treatable diseases like diarrhea, measles and malaria threaten the health of refugee children, especially those under 5.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 腹泻、麻疹和疟疾等可预防、可治疗的疾病威胁着难民儿童的健康，尤其是 5 岁以下的儿童

vocabulary.definition: adj. 好对付的, 能处理的, 能治疗的
vocabulary.context: Preventable, treatable diseases like diarrhea, measles and malaria threaten the health of refugee children, especially those under 5.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 腹泻、麻疹和疟疾等可预防、可治疗的疾病威胁着难民儿童的健康，尤其是 5 岁以下的儿童

vocabulary.definition: n. 指示, 指定, 命名；[电] 指定
vocabulary.context: They are granted refugee status by the country they entered - a designation that protects their human rights by international law and makes them eligible for many types of aid.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们被进入的国家授予难民身份--这一称号通过国际法保护他们的人权，并使他们有资格获得多种类型的援助

vocabulary.definition: adj. 没有国家的；[法] 无国籍的, 无国家主权的
vocabulary.context: Out of 63.9 million people that UNHCR calls "persons of concern" - refugees, asylum-seekers, IDPs, stateless individuals and others - 37.5 million were IDPs in 2015.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 2015年，在难民署称为"受关注人员"的6,390万人中--难民、寻求庇护者、国内流离失所者、无国籍人士和其他人--其中有3,750万人是国内流离失所者

vocabulary.definition: adj. 特大的；n. 特大号
vocabulary.context: Smaller countries are also playing an outsize role.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 较小的国家也发挥着巨大的作用

vocabulary.definition: adj. 大量的, 充足的, 丰富的
vocabulary.context: Refugees often end up in poor countries and small countries that don't have ample resources to support them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 难民往往最终来到贫穷国家和没有足够资源支持他们的小国家

vocabulary.definition: n. 比例, 比率, 均衡, 部分, 面积；v.t. 使成比例, 使均衡
vocabulary.context: Looking at the proportion of refugees to national population, UNHCR found that smaller nations have some of the highest proportions of hosted refugees.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 通过观察难民占全国人口的比例，联合国难民署发现较小的国家收容难民的比例最高

vocabulary.definition: n. 造船
vocabulary.context: Importantly, positions of power often required not only free time but also finances to fund municipal projects such as shipbuilding and festivals.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 重要的是，权力职位往往不仅需要空闲时间，还需要资金来资助造船和节日等市政项目

vocabulary.definition: n. 长官的职位, 地方行政长官；[法] 裁判司署, 地方法庭
vocabulary.context: Issues discussed in the assembly ranged from deciding magistracies to organizing and maintaining food supplies to debating military matters.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 会议讨论的问题范围从决定法官职位到组织和维持粮食供应，再到辩论军事问题

vocabulary.definition: n. (古希腊等的)将军
vocabulary.context: They were subject to votes of confidence by the Assembly, but this didn't stop Pericles, for example, from holding office as strategos for 15 consecutive years.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们受到议会的信任投票，但这并没有阻止伯里克利连续15年担任军事家

vocabulary.definition: n. 补假
vocabulary.context: Attendance was even paid for in certain periods, which was a measure to encourage citizens who lived far away and couldn't afford the time-off to attend.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在某些时段甚至可以支付出勤费用，这是鼓励那些住得很远、没有时间请假的公民参加的一项措施

vocabulary.definition: n. 长官, 监督官
vocabulary.context: During peacetime the kings were kept in check by ephors ( ephoroi ) who were themselves elected by the assembly.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在和平时期，国王受到长官（ephoroi）的控制，长官本身是由议会选举产生的

vocabulary.definition: n. 贿赂行为, 行贿, 受贿；[经] 行贿, 受贿
vocabulary.context: Many civic positions were short-term and chosen by lottery to ensure bribery was kept to a minimum.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 许多公民职位都是短期的，通过抽签选出，以确保将贿赂保持在最低限度

vocabulary.definition: n. 演示, 样本唱片；[计] 演示
vocabulary.context: The word democracy derives from the Greek demos , which referred to the entire citizen body.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 民主一词源自希腊语 demos ，指的是整个公民团体

vocabulary.definition: n. 约束, 约定, 契约；[经] 订定, 规定, 条款
vocabulary.context: Sometimes, though, they had a minimum property stipulation for attendees (as in the Boeotia federation).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但有时，他们对参加者有最低财产规定（如维奥蒂亚联盟）

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使成为魔鬼（demonize的现在分词形式）
vocabulary.context: This feeling was especially evidenced in the demonizing of the Persian kings Darius and Xerxes, the tyrants par excellence .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这种感觉在妖魔化波斯国王大流士和薛西斯这两个卓越的暴君时尤其明显

vocabulary.definition: n. 占用者, 居住者, 军事占领者；[法] 占用者, 居住者, 军事占领者
vocabulary.context: The Gauls saw the Romans as conquerors and occupiers and so, when Hannibal began his operations in the Iberian Peninsula, they did little to stop him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 高卢人将罗马人视为征服者和占领者，因此，当汉尼拔开始在伊比利亚半岛行动时，他们几乎没有采取任何措施阻止他

vocabulary.definition: adj. 较好的；adv. 比较好
vocabulary.context: It was a supreme example of generalship, never bettered in history.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是历史上从未有过的将军才能的最高典范

vocabulary.definition: adv. 数字, 数值, 用数字表示
vocabulary.context: Though now numbering less than 26,000 total, Hannibal seized towns and marched south toward Rome, defeating a numerically superior Roman force at the Ticino River.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管现在总人数不到 26,000 人，汉尼拔还是占领了城镇并向南进军罗马，在提契诺河击败了数量上占优势的罗马军队

vocabulary.definition: n. 唯利是图者, 雇佣兵；adj. 为钱而工作的, 被雇的, 图利的
vocabulary.context: Unlike his father, who had to rely on mercenaries in the First Punic War, Hannibal swelled his ranks with Carthaginians, Gauls, Spaniards, and Libyans who hated Rome.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 与他的父亲在第一次布匿战争中不得不依靠雇佣兵不同，汉尼拔与憎恨罗马的迦太基人、高卢人、西班牙人和利比亚人一起壮大了自己的队伍

vocabulary.definition: n. 将军的才能, 将军职, 将军任期
vocabulary.context: It was a supreme example of generalship, never bettered in history.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是历史上从未有过的将军才能的最高典范

vocabulary.definition: n. 助手, 副官；[计] 数据输入的可说明性
vocabulary.context: According to Durant, one of his aides famously remarked to him, "You know how to win a victory, Hannibal, but you do not know how to use it." While it is understandable how one would conclude this after the brilliant win at Cannae, Hannibal was actually right.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 据杜兰特说，他的一位助手对他说过一句著名的话："汉尼拔，你知道如何赢得胜利，但你不知道如何利用它。"虽然在坎尼取得辉煌胜利后得出这样的结论是可以理解的，但汉尼拔实际上是对的

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 免职, 废黜, 作证；v.i. 作证, 供证
vocabulary.context: Fabius was then deposed and the armies were given two new leaders who followed Rufus' policy of action in the field.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 法比尤斯随后被废黜，军队任命了两位新领导人，他们遵循鲁弗斯的战场行动政策

vocabulary.definition: n. 敌意, 憎恨
vocabulary.context: According to legend, Hannibal's father, Hamilcar Barca (the great Carthaginian general of the First Punic War) made his son swear an oath of enmity towards Rome for life.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 据传说，汉尼拔的父亲哈米尔卡·巴尔卡（第一次布匿战争中的迦太基大将）让他的儿子发誓终生与罗马为敌

vocabulary.definition: n. 骑马者, 马术师, 养马者
vocabulary.context: They did; and when the Romans followed them into the pocket, the subtle Carthaginian, himself in the thick of the fray, ordered his veterans to close in upon the Roman flanks and bade his cavalry smash through the opposed horsemen to attack the legions from behind.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们做到了；当罗马人追随他们进入包围圈时，狡猾的迦太基人自己也身处激烈的战斗中，他命令他的老兵逼近罗马的侧翼，并命令他的骑兵冲破对手的骑兵，从后面攻击军团

vocabulary.definition: n. 散播, 传播, 普及；[医] 散布, 播散
vocabulary.context: The point is that there's still no sign of any direct relationship between the clandestine dissemination of TV shows and agitation against the government.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 关键是，目前还没有迹象表明电视节目的秘密传播与反政府煽动之间存在任何直接关系

vocabulary.definition: adj. 怀疑论的, 怀疑的
vocabulary.context: Some support their government; others are apathetic or downright sceptical, and some even leave in search of a better life.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有些人支持他们的政府；有些人则支持他们的政府。其他人则冷漠或完全怀疑，有些人甚至离开去寻找更好的生活

vocabulary.definition: adj. 准法律的，准合法的
vocabulary.context: This cross-border smuggling supplies a quasi-legal market that has blossomed in North Korea since the mid-1990s.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这种跨境走私提供了一个自 20 世纪 90 年代中期以来在朝鲜蓬勃发展的准合法市场

vocabulary.definition: adv. 各种各样, 种种, 不同, 多方面, 多才多艺, 许多, 各个, 个别, 杂色, 彩色
vocabulary.context: Op-eds in major news outlets variously advocate for talks, a strategy of deterrence combined with progress on humanitarian and economic issues, and even regime change.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 主要新闻媒体的专栏文章不同程度地主张对话、威慑战略以及人道主义和经济问题上的进展，甚至政权更迭

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 诽谤, 贬低；[法] 诋毁, 中伤, 诽谤
vocabulary.context: When demonising the "rogue" behaviour of an enemy state, it's easy to vilify its citizens or tar them all with the same brush.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当妖魔化敌国的"流氓"行为时，很容易诽谤其公民或一并抹黑他们

vocabulary.definition: adv. 奥妙, 密封, 不透气, 不漏气, 与外界隔绝；[计] 密封的
vocabulary.context: This means that the idea that the North Korean people are hermetically sealed off is outdated.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这意味着朝鲜人民被封闭的观念已经过时

vocabulary.definition: adj. 缺乏感情的, 无动于衷的, 缺乏兴趣的；[医] 无情[感]的, 淡漠的
vocabulary.context: Some support their government; others are apathetic or downright sceptical, and some even leave in search of a better life.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有些人支持他们的政府；有些人则支持他们的政府。其他人则冷漠或完全怀疑，有些人甚至离开去寻找更好的生活

vocabulary.definition: n. 领事, 领事任期, 领事馆；[经] 领事馆
vocabulary.context: Others who make it to China focus on getting to a third country, where they can present themselves at a South Korean embassy or consulate.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 其他到达中国的人则专注于前往第三国，在那里他们可以在韩国大使馆或领事馆露面

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 宽恕, 赦免, 免除, 汇出, 缓解, 减轻, 把...提交, 使恢复原状, 推迟；v.i. 缓解, 汇款；n. 移交的事物
vocabulary.context: Many remit money back to their families in the north via brokers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 许多人通过经纪人将钱汇回北方的家人

vocabulary.definition: n. 圣徒传, 圣徒言行录
vocabulary.context: This group has produced all the major works dramatizing the personal histories of the leaders, including the "Immortal History" ( Pulmyŏl ŭi Yŏksa ) and "Immortal Leadership" ( Pulmyŏl ŭi Hyangdo ) series, which constructed the official hagiography of Kim Il Sung and Kim Jong Il, respectively.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 该小组创作了所有描写领导人个人历史的主要作品，包括《不朽的历史》（Pulmyŏl ŭi Yŏksa）和《不朽的领导》（Pulmyŏl ŭi Hyangdo）系列，分别构建了金日成和金正日的官方圣传

vocabulary.definition: n. 聚合器, 整合者; 汇集者, 聚合
vocabulary.context: These have, in turn, spawned foreign feeds like the excellent KCNA Watch media aggregator and satirical sites such as "Kim Jong Un Looking at Things."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些反过来又催生了国外的内容，例如优秀的 KCNA Watch 媒体聚合器和讽刺网站，例如"Kim Jong Un Looking at Things"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 令人难以置信的
vocabulary.context: In a country where schoolchildren ritualistically memorize idealized accounts of their leader and his ancestors, it must have been mind-boggling to see a new leader on TV that they knew almost nothing about.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在一个学童例行公事地记住领导人及其祖先的理想化描述的国家，在电视上看到一位他们几乎一无所知的新领导人一定是令人难以置信的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 教条的, 武断的
vocabulary.context: Difficult to access and written in a highly stylized, dogmatic prose, North Korea's domestic propaganda is not only largely ignored abroad, but it's also difficult for even South Koreans to understand.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 朝鲜的国内宣传难以接触，而且是用高度程式化、教条主义的散文写成的，不仅在国外很大程度上被忽视，而且连韩国人也很难理解

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 自负地谈论, 执行教皇职务
vocabulary.context: At one point he pontificates to one of his advisers about the value of youthful thinking:
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有一次，他向他的一位顾问高谈阔论年轻思维的价值：

vocabulary.definition: adj. 程式化的；按固定格式的
vocabulary.context: Difficult to access and written in a highly stylized, dogmatic prose, North Korea's domestic propaganda is not only largely ignored abroad, but it's also difficult for even South Koreans to understand.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 朝鲜的国内宣传难以接触，而且是用高度程式化、教条主义的散文写成的，不仅在国外很大程度上被忽视，而且连韩国人也很难理解

vocabulary.definition: adj. 独裁的, 专制的
vocabulary.context: No other autocratic regime today has such a well-developed stable of artists and writers producing works aligned with the party's ideological needs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 今天，没有哪个专制政权拥有如此发达的艺术家和作家队伍，他们创作的作品符合党的意识形态需求

vocabulary.definition: adv. 在外部, 外表上, 从外面, 在外面, 从外部
vocabulary.context: North Korean fiction offers a window into the ruling party's priorities that's just as informative as its official, externally directed propaganda.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 朝鲜小说为了解执政党的优先事项提供了一个窗口，其信息量与其官方的、外部指导的宣传一样丰富

vocabulary.definition: n. 散文；v. 写散文；adj. 散文的, 平凡的
vocabulary.context: Difficult to access and written in a highly stylized, dogmatic prose, North Korea's domestic propaganda is not only largely ignored abroad, but it's also difficult for even South Koreans to understand.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 朝鲜的国内宣传难以接触，而且是用高度程式化、教条主义的散文写成的，不仅在国外很大程度上被忽视，而且连韩国人也很难理解

vocabulary.definition: adj. 吸引注意力的；（尤指）成为新闻焦点的
vocabulary.context: Milgram's headline-grabbing conclusion that 62.5% of people obeyed instructions appeared to show most of us can be led to kill at an authority's bidding.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 米尔格拉姆的结论引人注目，即 62.5% 的人服从指示，这似乎表明我们大多数人都可能在当局的命令下被引导去杀人

vocabulary.definition: adj. 常春藤遮盖着的
vocabulary.context: One condition took place in the industrial town of Bridgeport, far from the ivied halls of Yale, the study's home base.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一个情况发生在布里奇波特的工业城镇，远离该研究的大本营耶鲁大学常春藤覆盖的大厅

vocabulary.definition: n. 怀疑论, 怀疑主义；[医] 多疑癖
vocabulary.context: Setting aside the broader problems with the experiment's internal validity, evidence of participant scepticism, and the lack of standardized procedures, we aimed to tease out which of the many features of his different variations accounted for whether or not teachers went to the maximum voltage on the shock machine.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 抛开实验的内部有效性、参与者怀疑的证据以及缺乏标准化程序等更广泛的问题，我们的目的是梳理出他的不同变化的众多特征中的哪些特征解释了教师是否达到了电击机上的最大电压

vocabulary.definition: n. 范例, 式样, 词形变化表, 纵聚合关系语言项
vocabulary.context: Obedience - in the Milgram paradigm at least - is not only a matter of the subordinate's relationship to the authority figure.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 服从--至少在米尔格拉姆范式中--不仅仅是下属与权威人物的关系问题

vocabulary.definition: v. 综合, 合成
vocabulary.context: Using his original data and backed up by research at Yale University's archives, we synthesized data from 21 of his experimental conditions, involving 740 participants in all.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 利用他的原始数据并得到耶鲁大学档案研究的支持，我们综合了他的 21 个实验条件下的数据，总共涉及 740 名参与者

vocabulary.definition: adj. 指导的, 指挥的, 方向的；n. 指令；[计] 指令; 命令
vocabulary.context: By implication, obedience is strongest when authority figures give concrete directives, present a united front and maintain close contact with their subordinates.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 言外之意，当权威人物发出具体指示、形成统一战线并与其下属保持密切联系时，服从性最强

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 强制, 强迫
vocabulary.context: Ironically, because they were isolated in an experimental laboratory, Milgram's subjects lacked the advantage available to others in the world outside when they are being coerced and pressured to obey.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 具有讽刺意味的是，由于米尔格拉姆的实验对象被隔离在实验实验室中，因此当他们受到胁迫和压力时，他们缺乏外界其他人可以利用的优势

vocabulary.definition: n. 刽子手；[法] 死刑执行人, 刽子手, 行刑者
vocabulary.context: Did it, as Milgram argued, illuminate the Holocaust, whose executioners claimed they were merely following orders?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它是否如米尔格拉姆所说，阐明了大屠杀，刽子手声称他们只是在执行命令？

vocabulary.definition: adj. 楔形的, 楔形文字的, 楔状骨的；n. 楔形文字, 楔状骨
vocabulary.context: Apparently, Mesopotamia's cuneiform system had some competition in the race for the world's first script.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 显然，美索不达米亚的楔形文字系统在争夺世界上第一个文字的竞赛中存在一些竞争

vocabulary.definition: n. 技术, 技艺
vocabulary.context: Pottery, textiles, and beads are evidence of skilled craftsmanship and thriving trade.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 陶器、纺织品和珠子是熟练工艺和繁荣贸易的证据

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不能修补的, 不能挽回的；[法] 不可弥补的, 不可挽回的
vocabulary.context: They argue that changing river patterns disrupted the farming and trading systems and eventually led to irreparable flooding.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们认为，河流格局的变化扰乱了农业和贸易系统，并最终导致了无法挽回的洪水

vocabulary.definition: n. 小雕像
vocabulary.context: Clay figurines of goddesses, for example, are proof that religion was important.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 例如，女神的泥塑就证明了宗教的重要性

vocabulary.definition: n. 排水；[医] 引流[法], 导液[法], 排水[设备]
vocabulary.context: Sophisticated drainage systems throughout the city carried dirty water and sewage outside of living spaces.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 整个城市的复杂排水系统将脏水和污水排到生活空间之外

vocabulary.definition: adj. 卫生的；n. 公共厕所
vocabulary.context: The findings clearly show that Harappan societies were well organized and very sanitary.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 研究结果清楚地表明哈拉帕社会组织良好且非常卫生

vocabulary.definition: n. 纺织品, 纺织业；adj. 织的, 纺织的
vocabulary.context: Pottery, textiles, and beads are evidence of skilled craftsmanship and thriving trade.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 陶器、纺织品和珠子是熟练工艺和繁荣贸易的证据

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 念咒文召唤, 变戏法, 想象；v.i. 变戏法, 施魔法
vocabulary.context: The phrase "early civilizations" usually conjures up images of Egypt and Mesopotamia and their pyramids, mummies, and golden tombs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "早期文明"一词通常会让人想起埃及和美索不达米亚及其金字塔、木乃伊和金色坟墓

vocabulary.definition: n. 血统, 种系
vocabulary.context: 7 8 Some traced their heritage through the father's bloodline, some through the mother's.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 7 8 有些人通过父亲的血统追溯其遗产，有些则通过母亲的血统

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 倒填...的日期, 把...的日期填早, 在日期上早于, 在日期上先于；[经] 提前日期
vocabulary.context: Most African tribes had a noble class, and slavery in Africa predates the written record.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大多数非洲部落都有一个贵族阶级，非洲的奴隶制早于有文字记录

vocabulary.definition: n. 冒险家, 投机者；[法] 冒险者, 投机者
vocabulary.context: Hardly living up to the "Dark Continent" label given by European adventurers, Africa's cultural heritage runs deep.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 非洲的文化遗产根深蒂固，实不辜负欧洲冒险家所赋予的"黑暗大陆"的标签

vocabulary.definition: n. 纯度检验证明, 品质证明；v.t. 加盖纯度检验证明
vocabulary.context: Powerful Kingdoms, beautiful sculpture, complex trade, tremendous wealth, and centers for advanced learning - all are hallmarks of African Civilization on the eve of the Age of Exploration.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 强大的王国、美丽的雕塑、复杂的贸易、巨大的财富和高等学习中心--所有这些都是大航海时代前夕非洲文明的标志

vocabulary.definition: n. 自卑, 次等；[医] 下位, 下级, 次级, 劣等
vocabulary.context: The slavery known to Africans prior to European contact did not involve a belief in inferiority of the slaves.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在欧洲接触之前非洲人所了解的奴隶制并不涉及奴隶低等的信念

vocabulary.definition: adv. 可论证地；可争辩地；正如可提出证据加以证明的那样地
vocabulary.context: The great "View of Timbuktu" by Heinrich Barth is in the city of Timbuktu, home to arguably the public domain.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 海因里希·巴特 (Heinrich Barth) 的伟大作品"廷巴克图景观"位于廷巴克图市，这里可以说是公共领域的所在地

vocabulary.definition: adj. 熟练的；[经] 熟练的, 有技能的
vocabulary.context: African art was primarily religious, and each community had artisans skilled at producing works that would please the tribal gods.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 非洲艺术主要是宗教艺术，每个社区都有擅长制作取悦部落神灵的作品的工匠

vocabulary.definition: adv. 主要地, 首先地
vocabulary.context: Although primarily an agricultural people, West Africans held many occupations.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 虽然西非人主要是农业民族，但他们也从事多种职业

vocabulary.definition: n. 有知识者, 知识分子, 凭理智做事者；adj. 智力的, 用脑力的, 聪明的
vocabulary.context: world's oldest university, was the intellectual center of its age.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 世界上最古老的大学，是当时的知识中心

vocabulary.definition: n. 平凡；平常(ordinary的变形)
vocabulary.context: The unique archaeological evidence from Pompeii allows us the rarest of opportunities-the possibility to reconstruct the actual thoughts, hopes, despair, wit and even the very ordinariness of these people who lived so long ago.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 庞贝古城独特的考古证据为我们提供了最难得的机会--有可能重建这些生活在很久以前的人们的真实想法、希望、绝望、智慧，甚至是他们的平凡

vocabulary.definition: n. 布鲁氏菌病；[医] 波状热, 布鲁氏[杆]菌病
vocabulary.context: Diseases such as tuberculosis, brucellosis, and malaria were also rife.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 结核病、布鲁氏菌病和疟疾等疾病也很流行

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 再度觉醒
vocabulary.context: The area around Vesuvius received its first warning sign that the mountain was perhaps reawakening when a massive earthquake struck on the 5th of February 62 A.D.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当公元 62 年 2 月 5 日发生大地震时，维苏威火山周围地区收到了第一个警告信号，表明这座山可能正在苏醒

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 窒息；v.t. 使窒息
vocabulary.context: Then, at 11 p.m., the huge cloud hanging above the volcano collapsed from its own weight and blasted the town in six devastating waves of super-heated ash and air, which asphyxiated and literally baked the bodies of the entire population.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后，晚上 11 点，悬在火山上方的巨大云层因其自身重量而塌陷，并在六波毁灭性的超热火山灰和空气中炸毁了整个城镇，使全体居民窒息并烤焦了身体

vocabulary.definition: adj. 圆柱状的, 立有圆柱的
vocabulary.context: The typical entrance of these plush residences was a small street doorway with an entrance corridor that opened out into a large columned atrium with a rectangular pool of water open to the sky and from which other rooms were accessed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些豪华住宅的典型入口是一个小街道门口，有一个入口走廊，通向一个大的柱状中庭，中庭有一个向天空开放的矩形水池，从那里可以进入其他房间

vocabulary.definition: n. 长方形廊柱大厅, 长方形教堂
vocabulary.context: The town presents an astonishing mix of several thousand buildings: shops, large villas, modest housing, temples, taverns, a pottery studio, an exercise ground, baths, an arena, public latrines, a market hall, schools, water towers, a flower nursery, fulleries to make wool cloth, a basilica, brothels, and theatres.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 该镇拥有数千栋令人惊叹的建筑：商店、大型别墅、简陋的住房、寺庙、酒馆、陶艺工作室、运动场、浴室、竞技场、公共厕所、市场大厅、学校、水塔、花圃、羊毛布工厂、大教堂、妓院和剧院

vocabulary.definition: n. 水管, 沟渠, 导管；[医] 水管
vocabulary.context: The water supply to the town was also severely affected with damage to aqueducts and underground pipes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 该镇的供水也受到严重影响，渡槽和地下管道遭到破坏

vocabulary.definition: n. 漂布工场
vocabulary.context: The town presents an astonishing mix of several thousand buildings: shops, large villas, modest housing, temples, taverns, a pottery studio, an exercise ground, baths, an arena, public latrines, a market hall, schools, water towers, a flower nursery, fulleries to make wool cloth, a basilica, brothels, and theatres.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 该镇拥有数千栋令人惊叹的建筑：商店、大型别墅、简陋的住房、寺庙、酒馆、陶艺工作室、运动场、浴室、竞技场、公共厕所、市场大厅、学校、水塔、花圃、羊毛布工厂、大教堂、妓院和剧院

vocabulary.definition: adj. 全景的
vocabulary.context: The coast of Campania was a favorite playground for Rome's well-to-do, and many of the villas were particularly grand with panoramic sea-side views.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 坎帕尼亚海岸是罗马富人最喜欢的游乐场，许多别墅都特别宏伟，可以欣赏到海边全景

vocabulary.definition: n. 轻石, 浮石；v.t. 用浮石磨光
vocabulary.context: At this point, it may have seemed that the mountain was doing nothing more than offering a harmless pyrotechnic display, but at midday an even bigger explosion blew off the entire cone of Vesuvius and a massive mushroom cloud of pumice particles rose 27 miles into the sky.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在这一点上，这座山似乎只是在进行无害的烟火表演，但在中午，一场更大的爆炸炸毁了整个维苏威火山锥体，巨大的浮石颗粒蘑菇云升到了 27 英里的天空

vocabulary.definition: n. 饮料；[化] 饮料(如牛奶、茶、咖啡、啤酒等)
vocabulary.context: If he did not vomit, and the beverage remained within, he was considered guilty as charged and suffered the king's wrath.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果他没有呕吐，并且饮料留在里面，他就被认为有罪并受到国王的愤怒

vocabulary.definition: n. 集合, 装配, 一群人；[法] 配合, 集合, 集合物
vocabulary.context: Beating drums resounded throughout the area signaling the court's assemblage, and people gathered to speak their minds.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 擂鼓声响彻全场，标志着朝廷集结，人们聚集在一起畅所欲言

vocabulary.definition: n. 调制, 调合, 调合物；[医] 加热合剂(药物); 消化
vocabulary.context: According to Islamic reports, the criminally accused was given a foul concoction to drink that consisted of sour and bitter-tasting wood and water.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 据伊斯兰报道，刑事被告被喝了一种由酸苦的木头和水组成的恶臭混合物

vocabulary.definition: n. 出现, 浮现, 发生
vocabulary.context: Strategic governing coupled with great location led to the rapid emergence of a very wealthy empire.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 战略统治加上优越的地理位置导致了一个非常富裕的帝国的迅速崛起

vocabulary.definition: n. 自治, 自治权；[医] 自主性
vocabulary.context: In territories where order and obedience prevailed and taxes were properly paid, autonomy was granted.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在秩序和服从盛行且纳税正常的地区，自治权被授予

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 招徕顾客, 兜售物品；v.t. 招徕, 刺探...情报；n. 兜售者, 侦查者
vocabulary.context: Based on animal luxuries alone, it is no wonder that foreigners touted Ghana's kings as the richest men in the world.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 仅凭动物的奢侈，难怪外国人将加纳国王吹捧为世界上最富有的人

vocabulary.definition: n. 长毛绒, 长毛绒裤；adj. 长毛绒制的, 豪华的
vocabulary.context: Between the 9th and 11th centuries A.D., the kingdom of Ghana was so rich that its dogs wore golden collars, and its horses were adorned with silken rope halters and slept on plush carpets.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 公元9世纪到11世纪之间，加纳王国非常富裕，以至于它的狗都戴着金项圈，它的马都戴着丝绳缰绳，睡在毛绒地毯上

vocabulary.definition: adj. 丝的, 绸制的, 柔软的, 圆滑的
vocabulary.context: Between the 9th and 11th centuries A.D., the kingdom of Ghana was so rich that its dogs wore golden collars, and its horses were adorned with silken rope halters and slept on plush carpets.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 公元9世纪到11世纪之间，加纳王国非常富裕，以至于它的狗都戴着金项圈，它的马都戴着丝绳缰绳，睡在毛绒地毯上

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 把...归入, 把...纳入, 把...列入某一类, 把...归类
vocabulary.context: ...and negative behaviors toward the mother) and aspects of their experiences as a parent (including feelings of guilt and being subsumed by parenthood).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...以及对母亲的负面行为）以及他们作为父母的经历的各个方面（包括内疚感和被父母身份所包容）

vocabulary.definition: adj. （人）能很好地适应社会的
vocabulary.context: Mothers with middle school children also tended to perceive more negative behaviors from their children, and to perceive their children as less well-adjusted.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有中学生的母亲也倾向于认为孩子有更多的消极行为，并且认为孩子的适应能力较差

vocabulary.definition: n. 父母身分
vocabulary.context: ...negative behaviors toward the mother) and aspects of their experiences as a parent (including feelings of guilt and being subsumed by parenthood).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...对母亲的负面行为）以及他们作为父母的经历的各个方面（包括内疚感和被父母身份所包容）

vocabulary.definition: n. 省亲, 育儿
vocabulary.context: In the early years, when motherhood is often portrayed as especially demanding, mothers reported high levels of parenting "overload." They felt that mothering crowded out time and energy for themselves and for other facets of their identities.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 早年，当母亲经常被描述为要求特别高的时候，母亲们报告说养育子女的"超负荷"程度很高。他们觉得，母爱挤占了他们自己以及他们身份的其他方面的时间和精力

vocabulary.definition: n. (多面体的)面, 方面, 琢面；[医] 小平面, 小面
vocabulary.context: The participants responded to a series of questions designed to assess multiple facets of their well-being, including aspects of their personal adjustment (such as stress and life satisfaction), perceptions of their child's behavior (including both positive and negative behaviors toward...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 参与者回答了一系列旨在评估他们幸福感的多个方面的问题，包括他们的个人适应方面（例如压力和生活满意度）、对孩子行为的看法（包括对......的积极和消极行为）

vocabulary.definition: n. 抵消, 把...并列, 旁系, 支管, 用胶印法印；v.t. 弥补, 抵消, 胶印；v.i. 装支管；n. 偏移量；[计] 偏移量
vocabulary.context: This suggests that the early challenges of motherhood were partially offset by high rewards.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这表明早期作为母亲所面临的挑战被高回报所部分抵消

vocabulary.definition: adj. 受过良好教育的
vocabulary.context: The paper, by Suniya Luthar and Lucia Ciciolla of Arizona State University, reports the findings from an Internet-based survey of 2,247 relatively well-educated American mothers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这篇论文由亚利桑那州立大学的 Suniya Luthar 和 Lucia Ciciolla 撰写，报告了对 2,247 名受过良好教育的美国母亲进行的互联网调查的结果

vocabulary.definition: adj. 就学前的；n. 育幼院, 幼稚园
vocabulary.context: The mothers were also classified according to the ages of their children, with categories including infancy, preschool, elementary school, middle school, high school and adulthood.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 妈妈们还根据孩子的年龄进行了分类，包括婴儿期、学前班、小学、初中、高中和成年期

vocabulary.definition: adj. 母亲的, 母系的, 母方的；[医] 属母的, 母的, 母性的
vocabulary.context: Contrary to the idea that mothers suffer from an empty nest, the data suggested that mothers of adult children enjoy relatively high levels of maternal well-being.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 与母亲遭受空巢之苦的观点相反，数据表明，成年子女的母亲享有相对较高水平的母亲福祉

vocabulary.definition: n. 反暴动
vocabulary.context: Carlson treated his war with the jail like the counterinsurgency he'd fought in Iraq.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 卡尔森对待他与监狱的战争就像他在伊拉克进行的平叛一样

vocabulary.definition: n. 偶然事件
vocabulary.context: By happenstance, the week of David Carlson's sentencing hearing, retired Judge Donald Hassin, Jr.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 碰巧的是，在戴维·卡尔森量刑听证会的那一周，退休法官小唐纳德·哈辛 (Donald Hassin, Jr.) 被任命为法官

vocabulary.definition: n. 思想的形式
vocabulary.context: Most treatment for PTSD involves winding down from the combat mind-set, and learning not to treat the world around you like a war zone.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 创伤后应激障碍 (PTSD) 的大多数治疗方法包括摆脱战斗心态，并学会不要将周围的世界视为战区

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 豪饮；n. 酒, 酒宴
vocabulary.context: The judge read out his record: drugs, drunken driving, stealing booze while on parole, battery while in prison.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 法官宣读了他的记录：吸毒、醉酒驾驶、假释期间偷酒、监狱期间殴打

vocabulary.definition: n. 伏地挺身；俯卧撑
vocabulary.context: He started exercising to the extreme, doing thousands of pushups and long, CrossFit-style workouts.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他开始进行极限锻炼，做了数千次俯卧撑和长时间的 CrossFit 式锻炼

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 比...长久, 从...中逃生
vocabulary.context: "My training always geared around very good cardio, because I knew no matter how good a fighter was, as long as I could outlast him, I would win.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我的训练总是围绕着非常好的有氧运动，因为我知道无论一个战士有多优秀，只要我能比他坚持得更久，我就会获胜

vocabulary.definition: adj. 治疗的, 有益于健康的；[医] 治疗的; 治疗学的
vocabulary.context: "For my PTSD issues, jail is the least therapeutic atmosphere you could ever imagine.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "对于我的创伤后应激障碍（PTSD）问题，监狱是你能想象到的最没有治疗气氛的环境

vocabulary.definition: n. 同住者, 被收容者；[法] 内部的, 接近中心的, 内在的
vocabulary.context: He even recruited other inmates to his cause.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他甚至招募其他囚犯加入他的事业

vocabulary.definition: n. 再介绍；再引入
vocabulary.context: After the reintroduction of gray wolves
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 灰狼重新引入后

vocabulary.definition: n. 红隼
vocabulary.context: and falcon, bald eagle, kestrel, and with them
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 还有猎鹰、秃鹰、红隼，还有它们

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 采, 摘, 拣；n. 拣出的等外品, 被剔出的动物
vocabulary.context: to Yellowstone and, as anticipated, their culling
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 到黄石公园，正如预期的那样，他们的剔除
